name: Fundraisly
tagline: AI fundraising agent that finds investors and books meetings
tagline_zh: 寻找投资者并安排会议的AI筹款代理
description: Fundraisly: ultimate AI agent for fundraising. It analyzes 300K+ investors and millions of deals, identifies the relevant ones actively investing in your space, maps warm paths to them from your own network, then covers the rest with targeted cold outreach. The result: 20-40 qualified investor meetings. Built by founders who raised over $1B.
description_zh: Fundraisly：终极筹款AI助手。它分析超过30万名投资者和数百万笔交易，识别出活跃投资于您所在领域的相关投资者，从您自己的网络中为他们绘制温馨路径，然后通过有针对性的冷推广覆盖其余投资者。结果：20-40次合格投资者会面。由筹集资金超过10亿美元的创始人打造。

name: Brew
tagline: Like Claude design for email marketing
tagline_zh: 像克劳德为电子邮件营销所做的设计
description: Brew is the fastest way to design and send beautiful, on-brand emails and automations that render perfectly in every inbox. Describe a campaign or a multi-step automation in plain English, and Brew builds the whole thing in seconds: copy, design, audience, and logic. Works with any AI agent: paste our docs into OpenClaw, Viktor, Claude, or Lovable. No lock-in: send from Brew or export to your ESP. Free to get started.
description_zh: Brew是设计和发送精美、符合品牌风格的电子邮件和自动化的最快方式，这些邮件和自动化在每个收件箱中都能完美呈现。用通俗易懂的语言描述一个活动或多步骤自动化流程，Brew会在几秒钟内构建出整个流程：文案、设计、受众和逻辑。适用于任何AI代理：将我们的文档粘贴到OpenClaw、Viktor、Claude或Lovable中。无锁定：可以从Brew发送或导出到您的ESP。免费开始使用。

name: StoreClaw
tagline: Grow your store profits with agents that know how to sell
tagline_zh: 与懂得如何销售的代理商合作，提升您的店铺利润
description: StoreClaw is the first AI commerce platform with agents that know how to sell, so you can make more money with less effort and less stress. Connect StoreClaw to your existing store and it will study your numbers, current sales figures, and growth trajectory, and then offer proactive suggestions that it can execute on your behalf — once you give it your approval. Ask StoreClaw how your business is doing any time, anywhere. Sell more with less stress: StoreClaw.
description_zh: StoreClaw是首个配备智能销售代理的人工智能商务平台，让您能够以更少的精力和压力赚取更多收入。将StoreClaw与您现有的店铺连接，它将分析您的数据、当前销售情况和增长轨迹，并在您批准后，主动提出可执行的优化建议。随时随地，您都可以向StoreClaw查询您的业务状况。轻松销售，无压力：StoreClaw。

name: Unabyss
tagline: MCP-native self-updating context layer for your AI
tagline_zh: 为您的AI提供原生MCP的自更新上下文层
description: Set it up once and never re-explain yourself to AI again. Connect the apps you use daily - Unabyss will extract, structure, and update your context automatically. Share it with any AI tool via MCP, with granular control over what each tool can see.
description_zh: 只需设置一次，便无需再向AI重复解释。连接您日常使用的应用——Unabyss将自动提取、整理并更新您的上下文信息。您可通过MCP与任何AI工具共享这些信息，并可精细控制每个工具可查看的内容。

name: Bond
tagline: The AI to-do list that does itself
tagline_zh: 能自我执行的AI待办事项清单
description: Bond is an AI Chief of Staff for executives. It connects to your tools, learns how your company works, and turns scattered tasks into a self-managing to-do list that always knows what you need to do next. You can ask Bond to prepare you for your next meeting, draft a follow-up, send an email, create action items, identify blockers, surface risks, or delegate tasks to team members.
description_zh: Bond是一款专为高管打造的AI助手。它能与您的工具相连接，了解您公司的运作方式，并将零散的任务转化为一个自我管理的待办事项清单，始终掌握您下一步需要做什么。您可以要求Bond为您准备下次会议，起草跟进邮件，发送电子邮件，创建行动项，识别障碍，揭示风险，或将任务委派给团队成员。

name: Goldfish
tagline: Press Option. It knows your work and replies like you
tagline_zh: 按下选项键。它了解你的工作，并像你一样回复
description: Most AI tools make you explain the context before they can help. Goldfish already has it. It privately remembers what you’ve been working on across your Mac, then helps you write better from any app. Press Option in a text field to draft replies, summarize threads, rewrite sentences, or recall important details from your recent work without copying, pasting, or re-explaining the whole backstory.
description_zh: 大多数人工智能工具都需要你解释上下文后才能提供帮助。而Goldfish已经具备这一功能。它会在你的Mac上私密地记住你一直在处理的内容，然后帮助你在任何应用程序中写出更好的文字。在文本字段中按下Option键，即可快速起草回复、总结线索、重写句子，或从最近的工作中回忆起重要细节，而无需复制、粘贴或重新解释整个背景故事。

name: Upstream
tagline: The inbox designed for humans and agents
tagline_zh: 专为人类和代理设计的收件箱
description: Finally, an inbox you'll look forward to. Agents sort your messages, draft your replies, and clear the grunt work behind the scenes, all in a client so well-crafted that email feels light, fast, fun.
description_zh: 最后，一个让你期待的收件箱。代理会整理你的邮件，起草你的回复，并处理幕后的繁琐工作，所有这些都在一个精心设计的客户端中完成，让电子邮件变得轻便、快速、有趣。

name: Publora
tagline: A publishing API for agents to post on 10 social platforms
tagline_zh: 一个发布API，供代理在10个社交平台上发布内容
description: Publora is a publishing API for 10 social platforms. One REST API call handles multi-network distribution — no SDKs, no OAuth wiring. The native MCP server with 18 tools gives AI agents like Claude and Cursor a full engagement loop: post, comment, react, pull analytics — across LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Threads, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, Bluesky, Mastodon, and Telegram
description_zh: Publora是一个面向10个社交平台的发布API。一次REST API调用即可处理多网络分发——无需SDK，也无需OAuth配置。配备18种工具的原生MCP服务器为Claude和Cursor等AI代理提供了一个完整的互动循环：发布、评论、点赞、拉取分析数据——覆盖LinkedIn、X、Instagram、Threads、TikTok、YouTube、Facebook、Bluesky、Mastodon和Telegram等平台

name: mailX by mailwarm
tagline: Email deliverability toolkit for humans and AI agents
tagline_zh: 面向人类和人工智能代理的电子邮件送达能力工具包
description: Your emails go to spam. mailX shows you why, and how to fix it in seconds with clear answers and exact steps. Built for humans and AI agents. API and MCP ready.
description_zh: 你的邮件被标记为垃圾邮件。mailX会告诉你原因，并提供清晰明确的答案和具体步骤，让你在几秒钟内解决问题。它既适用于人类用户，也适用于人工智能代理。同时支持API和MCP接口。

name: Pancake
tagline: OpenClaw in Slack that makes your company autonomous
tagline_zh: Slack中的OpenClaw让你的公司实现自主化
description: Every other AI product is a tool that makes you more productive. A copilot. An assistant. A coworker. Something you use. Pancake makes your company autonomous. Agents with roles, goals, and a heartbeat working while you sleep. You set direction, approve the irreversible, the rest runs. Prepare yourself to be prompted by Pancake.
description_zh: 其他所有的人工智能产品都是让你更高效的工具。它们是副驾驶、助手、同事，是你使用的东西。而Pancake则让你的公司实现自主运营。在你睡觉的时候，有角色、目标和心跳的代理人在工作。你设定方向，批准不可撤销的事项，其余的则由它们来执行。准备好接受Pancake的提示吧。

name: Elentaria
tagline: Your GTM: from diagnosis to execution
tagline_zh: 你的GTM：从诊断到执行
description: Elentaria is the AI operator for B2B: it analyzes your business, scores 22 channels, ships the plan that fits, and learns what moved revenue so it can make the next week sharper. Every week, on your stack, in your voice.
description_zh: Elentaria是B2B的AI运营工具：它分析您的业务，对22个渠道进行评分，发送适合的计划，并学习推动收入的因素，以便在下周做出更明智的决策。每周，它都会为您的业务提供支持，以您的声音发声。

name: SellerClaw
tagline: A team of AI agents that runs your stores across channels
tagline_zh: 一个由人工智能代理组成的团队，负责跨渠道运营您的店铺
description: Running even one online store is a full-time job. SellerClaw is a team of AI agents that runs it for you: specialized agents for product sourcing, store management, and advertising, coordinated by a supervisor you direct. Tell it what to sell — the agents build listings, manage ads and pricing, and handle fulfillment and support across Shopify, eBay, and more. You stay in control: every action is visible and approvable, and you set how much runs on its own. Free to start.
description_zh: 经营一家网店都需要全身心投入。SellerClaw则是由一组人工智能代理组成的团队，为你打理一切：专门负责产品采购、店铺管理和广告宣传的代理，由你直接指导的管理员负责协调。你只需告诉它要卖什么——代理们就会在Shopify、eBay等平台上创建商品列表、管理广告和定价，并处理订单履行和客户服务。一切尽在掌控：你的每一步操作都清晰可见且可审批，自主运营的额度也由你设定。免费开始使用。

name: Tycoon AI
tagline: Run one-person companies entirely with AI agents
tagline_zh: 完全依靠人工智能代理来运营一人公司
description: Tycoon.us enables you to run an entire company with AI agents, powered by Astra, an AI CEO, and 10+ ready-to-use AI agents you can choose from, from CMO who manages X to CTO who codes. Astra also manages Claude Code/Hermes. Give Astra a KPI or project, like “10x traffic this month,” or “launch onboarding flows.” She creates a plan, assigns agents, tracks progress, and asks for approval when needed. Every agent is out of box, so no setup, coding, or API keys required.
description_zh: Tycoon.us使您能够通过AI代理运营整个公司，这些代理由AI首席执行官Astra以及10多个现成的AI代理提供支持，您可以从管理X的CMO到负责编码的CTO中选择。Astra还管理Claude Code/Hermes。为Astra设定一个关键绩效指标（KPI）或项目，如“本月流量增长10倍”或“启动入职流程”。她会制定计划，分配代理，跟踪进度，并在需要时请求批准。每个代理都是即开即用的，因此无需设置、编码或API密钥。

name: Honen
tagline: Automated teaching + learning infrastructure for any company
tagline_zh: 面向任何公司的自动化教学+学习基础设施
description: Create employee training that keeps up with your company. Honen turns team knowledge into interactive AI-led courses in seconds, complete with adaptive lessons, simulations, and learner insights. When your docs, tools, or processes change, courses update automatically.
description_zh: 打造与公司发展同步的员工培训。Honen可在几秒钟内将团队知识转化为由人工智能引导的互动课程，并配有自适应课程、模拟练习和学习者洞察。当您的文档、工具或流程发生变化时，课程会自动更新。

name: Stitch 3.0 by Google
tagline: Generate and iterate UI screens with AI on a live canvas
tagline_zh: 在实时画布上使用人工智能生成并迭代用户界面屏幕
description: Stitch generates UI screens for mobile and web from text prompts, with streaming edits, in-place AI changes, and one-click export to Figma, Netlify, Lovable, and Bolt. For product designers and developers prototyping fast.
description_zh: Stitch可根据文本提示为移动端和网页生成用户界面（UI）屏幕，支持实时编辑、现场AI修改，并可一键导出到Figma、Netlify、Lovable和Bolt。助力产品设计师和开发者快速制作原型。

name: minimi
tagline: Your ambient memory for Claude
tagline_zh: 你对克劳德的环境记忆
description: Every great Claude response starts with context. minimi listens across your Mac - docs, calls, messages, tabs - and gives Claude the full picture. No prompting. All on-device and private.
description_zh: 每一个出色的Claude回应都从上下文开始。minimi会在你的Mac设备上监听——文档、通话、消息、标签页——并为Claude提供完整视图。无需提示。所有操作均在设备上完成，且内容私密。

name: Framer 3.0
tagline: With Agents, Branching, Community, and an all-new design
tagline_zh: 包含代理、分支、社区以及全新设计
description: Agents bring AI to the canvas to help you design, write, analyze, and organize your sites. We’re also launching Branching, a new way for teams to explore ideas before they go live, and unveiling the new Framer Community, where creators can share and earn. Together, these launches change how teams create, maintain, and scale websites. We think you’ll love it.
description_zh: 代理工具将人工智能带入创作领域，助您设计、编写、分析并整理网站。我们还推出了Branching，这是一种团队在创意上线前进行探索的新方式，同时揭幕了全新的Framer社区，创作者们可以在这里分享并获得收益。这些新功能的推出将改变团队创建、维护和扩展网站的方式。我们相信您会喜欢它。

name: Honestly
tagline: See what Reddit and TikTok honestly think about your product
tagline_zh: 看看Reddit和TikTok用户对您产品的真实看法
description: As bots and AI agents overrun the internet, finding real customer opinions is only getting harder. Honestly cuts through the chaos by discovering verified conversations about your product across Reddit, TikTok, X, YouTube, Instagram, & Facebook then turning them into insights your team can act on.
description_zh: 随着机器人和人工智能代理在互联网上泛滥，寻找真实的客户意见变得越来越难。Honestly通过在Reddit、TikTok、X、YouTube、Instagram和Facebook上发现关于您产品的经过验证的对话，然后将它们转化为团队可以采取行动的见解，从而在混乱中脱颖而出。

name: VC Boom
tagline: Score your deck, meet investors who fit, and raise more
tagline_zh: 给你的项目打分，找到合适的投资者，并筹集更多资金
description: VC Boom scores your pitch deck in under 90 seconds and tells you the single fastest fix, matches you with the right investors from 47,000+ (each with a one-line reason they fit), then drafts personalized cold emails you send from your own inbox. Prep for each investor, then book the calls. Founders using VC Boom have already raised $95M. Built by an 8-year VC who raised hundreds of millions and deployed across 47 startups. Free to start, no subscription.
description_zh: VC Boom能在90秒内为您的商业计划书打分，并告诉您最快的改进点，从47,000多名投资者中为您匹配合适的投资者（每位投资者都附有一行简短的匹配理由），然后为您起草个性化的自荐邮件，您可以从自己的收件箱发送。为每位投资者做好准备，然后预约通话。使用VC Boom的创始人已经筹集了9500万美元。该工具由一位从业8年的风险投资人打造，他曾筹集数亿美元，并投资于47家初创公司。免费开始使用，无需订阅。

name: Vokal
tagline: A collaboration space for 10x teammates with their Al agents
tagline_zh: 一个协作空间，供10x团队成员与其Al（人工智能）助手共同使用
description: Your Codex and my Codex can’t talk, so we play human telephone in Slack: copy prompts, paste summaries, ask for reviews, and lose the run. Vokal brings 10x teammates and their agents into one live workspace in minutes, whether they run local Codex, Claude Code, or Hermes — or in the cloud. Name your agents, give them roles, access, and memory, and work will happen in a shared collaboration space instead of through copy-paste handoffs.
description_zh: 你的Codex和我的Codex无法对话，所以我们通过Slack进行人工电话沟通：复制提示、粘贴摘要、请求审阅，然后各自忙碌。Vokal可在几分钟内将10倍的团队成员及其代理整合到一个实时工作空间中，无论他们是运行本地Codex、Claude Code还是Hermes——无论是在本地还是在云端。为你的代理命名，分配角色、权限和内存，工作将在共享协作空间中进行，而不是通过复制粘贴的方式进行交接。

name: Wandesk
tagline: Build Your Own AI Desktop
tagline_zh: 打造你自己的AI桌面
description: Wandesk is an AI desktop. Build the apps you need just by describing them. Plug in Claude Code, Codex, DeepSeek, OpenAI, Kimi, Qwen — anything OpenAI-compatible. Apps share context. AI remembers you. All local. No signup.
description_zh: Wandesk是一款人工智能桌面应用。只需通过描述，即可构建您所需的应用。可接入Claude Code、Codex、DeepSeek、OpenAI、Kimi、Qwen等任何与OpenAI兼容的应用。应用间可共享上下文。人工智能会记住您。全部本地化。无需注册。

name: Browse.sh
tagline: Give your agents muscle memory for automating the web
tagline_zh: 让您的代理拥有自动化网页的肌肉记忆
description: browse.sh — an open catalog of browser automation skills for any website. Find reusable SKILL.md recipes that teach AI agents to complete tasks online, and install them with the browse CLI.
description_zh: browse.sh — 一个面向任何网站的浏览器自动化技能开放目录。查找可重复使用的SKILL.md配方，这些配方可教AI代理在线完成任务，并使用browse CLI进行安装。

name: Mina Meeting Assistant
tagline: Your AI Teammate now responds and executes during your calls
tagline_zh: 你的AI队友现在会在你呼叫时做出响应并执行任务
description: Mina is an AI meeting assistant that actively participates in meetings, responds in real time, pulls context from your tools, and helps move work forward while the conversation is still happening. Unlike traditional meeting tools, Mina can speak during calls, use skills, generate outputs, and support sales calls, interviews, standups, customer conversations, and team workflows before, during, and after meetings.
description_zh: Mina是一款人工智能会议助手，她能积极参与会议，实时回应，从您的工具中提取上下文信息，并在对话进行的同时帮助推进工作。与传统会议工具不同，Mina能够在通话中发言，运用技能，生成输出，并在会议前后及会议期间支持销售通话、面试、站立会议、客户对话和团队工作流程。

name: TestSprite 3.0
tagline: Let a fleet of parallel agents test your app in minutes
tagline_zh: 让一组并行代理在几分钟内测试您的应用程序
description: TestSprite generates and runs end-to-end tests for your app, autonomously. For backend, we can now generate complex integration tests with dynamic variables, auto-cleanup, and Data Flow debugging. For frontend, we now send a fleet of parallel AI agents to explore your app first — clicking through every feature like real users, then feeding results into testing. We're the first to do this. 3.0 also adds auto-heal for UI drift, auto-auth for regression, and a CLI for Claude Code, Codex users.
description_zh: TestSprite能够自主为您的应用生成并运行端到端的测试。对于后端，我们现在可以生成包含动态变量、自动清理功能和数据流调试的复杂集成测试。对于前端，我们会先派遣一组并行的人工智能代理来探索您的应用——像真实用户一样点击每个功能，然后将结果输入到测试中。我们是第一个这样做的公司。3.0版本还增加了针对用户界面偏移的自动修复功能、针对回归测试的自动认证功能，以及针对Claude Code和Codex用户的命令行界面（CLI）。

name: Clipto
tagline: Fully local, natural language search over terabytes of media
tagline_zh: 对数TB级媒体进行完全本地化的自然语言搜索
description: Like Google Photos, but fully local. Turn the terabytes of video, audio, meetings, and files you work with into searchable memories, without uploading anything to the cloud. Clipto automatically tags people, dialogue, and scenes, so you can instantly find any moment buried in your media just by describing what you're looking for. It's fast too: on a MacBook Pro M5, Clipto indexed 2TB of videos in just 24 hours.
description_zh: 就像谷歌相册，但完全本地化。将您处理的大量视频、音频、会议和文件转化为可搜索的记忆，而无需将任何内容上传到云端。Clipto会自动标记人物、对话和场景，因此您只需描述要查找的内容，即可立即找到埋藏在媒体中的任何时刻。它也非常快速：在MacBook Pro M5上，Clipto仅用24小时就为2TB的视频建立了索引。

name: Asmi AI
tagline: AI that handles your personal chores in the real world
tagline_zh: 在现实世界中处理你个人琐事的AI
description: Asmi calls you every morning. You talk - it handles the day. It calls services (dentist, salon, plumber, bank, insurance) or people (friends, colleagues) to coordinate, book or resolve things. Updates you on iMessage or WhatsApp when done. It can navigate IVRS, wait on hold and handle complex conversations well.
description_zh: 阿斯米每天早上都会给你打电话。你们聊聊天，它就能帮你搞定一整天的事。它会联系各种服务（牙医、美发沙龙、水管工、银行、保险公司）或人（朋友、同事）来协调、预约或解决问题。完成后，它会通过iMessage或WhatsApp向你更新情况。它还能操作交互式语音应答系统（IVRS），等待接通，并很好地处理复杂的对话。

name: TypingMind
tagline: Pay per use, no subscription, 18 model providers supported
tagline_zh: 按使用付费，无需订阅，支持18家模型提供商
description: TypingMind is the most popular app to use LLM AI models with API keys. It brings you all the best models across 18 providers in one powerful AI workspace without having to pay for subscriptions to each one. TypingMind also provides the best AI experience ever with features focused on pro users like Projects, Fork/Parallel chat, Plugins/MCP/Skills, and a wide range of customizable options that you literally cannot find anywhere else! Go give it a try at www.typingmind.com :)
description_zh: TypingMind是使用API密钥来使用大型语言模型（LLM）AI的最受欢迎的应用程序。它在一个强大的AI工作区中为您提供了来自18家提供商的所有最佳模型，而无需为每家提供商的订阅付费。TypingMind还提供了前所未有的最佳AI体验，其功能专注于专业用户，如项目、分叉/并行聊天、插件/MCP/技能，以及一系列您在其他任何地方都找不到的可定制选项！快来www.typingmind.com试试吧：）

name: Slashy
tagline: The AI assistant that does email for you
tagline_zh: 为你处理电子邮件的AI助手
description: Slashy is an AI-native email client and assistant that drafts replies in your voice, triages what matters, and makes sure no follow-up slips, so you spend less time in your inbox and more time on what matters. It connects to your email, calendar, CRM, and meeting notes and learns how you work, so you can ask Slashy to prep you for your next meeting, draft a follow-up, clear your inbox to zero, track who still owes you a reply, or fire off an email from iMessage or Slack while you're on the go.
description_zh: Slashy是一款基于人工智能的电子邮件客户端和助手，它能以你的声音起草回复，筛选重要邮件，并确保没有遗漏任何后续跟进，这样你就能在收件箱上花费更少的时间，把更多时间用在重要的事情上。它能够连接你的电子邮件、日历、客户关系管理系统和会议笔记，并学习你的工作方式，这样你就可以让Slashy为你准备下一次会议，起草后续跟进邮件，将收件箱清空为零，追踪谁还没有给你回复，或者在移动中通过iMessage或Slack发送电子邮件。

name: Powabase
tagline: Build AI apps with Postgres, RAG, and agents
tagline_zh: 使用Postgres、RAG和代理构建人工智能应用程序
description: Powabase is a backend-as-a-service for AI-native applications, combining Postgres, RAG, agents, memory, workflows, and automation primitives in one platform. It helps agencies and in-house IT teams build new AI apps or add AI automation to existing products without stitching together fragmented infrastructure. Designed to work seamlessly with modern coding agents, Powabase helps teams ship faster while building more robust, token-efficient systems.
description_zh: Powabase是一款面向人工智能原生应用的后端即服务产品，它将Postgres、RAG、代理、内存、工作流和自动化原语整合于一个平台之中。它助力机构和内部IT团队构建全新的人工智能应用，或在现有产品中增添人工智能自动化功能，而无需将零散的基础设施拼凑在一起。Powabase旨在与现代编码代理无缝协作，帮助团队更快地交付产品，同时构建更稳健、更高效的系统。

name: Bluedot 2.1
tagline: Record on Apple Watch. Sync with Claude
tagline_zh: 在Apple Watch上记录。与Claude同步
description: Bluedot 2.1 brings your real-world conversations into Claude. Record conversations directly from your Apple Watch, then sync them with Claude through MCP. Capture customer calls, hallway chats, interviews, coffee meetings, and in-person conversations, without a laptop or meeting bot. Bluedot turns every conversation into searchable, AI-ready context that Claude can summarize, search, and act on.
description_zh: Bluedot 2.1 将您的真实对话引入 Claude。您可以直接从 Apple Watch 录制对话，然后通过 MCP 与 Claude 同步。无需笔记本电脑或会议机器人，即可捕捉客户电话、走廊聊天、面试、咖啡会谈和面对面对话。Bluedot 将每一次对话转化为可搜索、支持人工智能的上下文，以便 Claude 进行总结、搜索和采取行动。

name: Respan Gateway
tagline: One AI gateway with built-in observability and evals
tagline_zh: 一个内置可观察性和评估功能的AI网关
description: Respan AI Gateway connects your app to 1,000+ AI models through one endpoint. But routing is the easy part. Respan keeps production AI reliable and under control with fallbacks, retries, caching, spend limits, alerts, and full traces for every call. Gateway, observability, evals, prompt management, monitors, and cost controls all run on one platform, so you do not need to stitch together five tools to debug production.
description_zh: Respan AI Gateway通过一个端点将您的应用程序连接到1000多个AI模型。但路由只是最简单的部分。Respan通过回退、重试、缓存、支出限制、警报以及每个调用的完整跟踪，确保生产环境中的AI可靠且受控。网关、可观察性、评估、提示管理、监控和成本控制都运行在一个平台上，因此您无需将五个工具拼接在一起进行生产环境调试。

name: Claude Code Artifacts
tagline: Preview and share your coding work live as it happens
tagline_zh: 实时预览并分享你的编程作品
description: Preview your in-progress work in Claude Code as a live, interactive artifact—built from your full session context and shareable with your team.
description_zh: 在Claude Code中，您可以将正在进行的工作预览为一个实时、交互式的工件——该工件基于您的完整会话上下文构建，并且可以与您的团队共享。

name: Invoko
tagline: A little hand on your Mac
tagline_zh: 一只小手放在你的Mac上
description: Invoko is an AI desktop helper you can talk to while you work. Bring it beside anything on your screen, ask it questions, or let it handle tasks across your apps.
description_zh: Invoko是一款人工智能桌面助手，您可以在工作时与它对话。将它放在屏幕上的任何内容旁边，向它提问，或让它处理您应用程序中的任务。

name: Spotlight by Backplanes
tagline: Session reports for Claude Code & Codex to improve your code
tagline_zh: 关于Claude Code & Codex的会话报告，旨在提升您的代码质量
description: Keep up with your agents. Spotlight reads your Claude Code and Codex sessions and shows you what your agents actually did, and how to get recursively better every session: what to fix now, what to ship better next time, what's worth sharing. One harness or seven, solo or across your team. Free.
description_zh: 与你的代理保持同步。Spotlight会读取你的Claude Code和Codex会话，向你展示你的代理实际执行的操作，并指导你在每个会话中如何逐步提升：现在要修复什么，下次要如何更好地发布，以及哪些内容值得分享。无论是一个还是七个，独自一人还是整个团队，均免费。

name: Astra Autonomous Pentest
tagline: AI agents that find, validate, and fix every vulnerability
tagline_zh: 能够发现、验证并修复所有漏洞的人工智能代理
description: Astra Autonomous Pentesting makes self-healing software the new standard, a category we’re defining after 8 years and 5,000+ real-world pentests. An army of offensive pentesters and bounty hunter agents that discovers complex chained vulnerabilities, an independent validator layer drives false positives to near-zero, and AI-fix agents deliver remediation as native Cursor, Copilot, and Claude Code prompts. The reactive pentest era is over.
description_zh: Astra自主渗透测试使自修复软件成为新标准，这是我们在历经8年、5000多次真实渗透测试后所定义的一个新类别。一支由进攻型渗透测试人员和赏金猎人组成的团队，能够发现复杂的连锁漏洞；一个独立的验证层将误报率降至接近零；而AI修复代理则能像原生Cursor、Copilot和Claude Code提示一样提供修复方案。被动渗透测试的时代已经结束。

name: Swytchcode CLI
tagline: Give agents reliable access to 2,000+ APIs w/ durable state
tagline_zh: 为代理提供对2000多个具有持久状态的API的可靠访问
description: Write agent logic, and skip the plumbing. Give AI agents reliable access to 2,000+ APIs with retries, idempotency, policy enforcement, and durable state.
description_zh: 编写代理逻辑，跳过繁琐的底层开发。为人工智能代理提供可靠访问2000多个API的途径，支持重试、幂等性、策略执行和持久状态。

name: Emdash
tagline: One app. Every coding agent. Open-source.
tagline_zh: 一个应用。每个编码代理。开源。
description: Emdash is an open-source desktop app for running multiple coding agents in parallel; one place to monitor sessions, review diffs, and turn issues into PRs.
description_zh: Emdash是一款开源桌面应用程序，用于并行运行多个编码代理；用户可以在一个地方监控会话、审查差异，并将问题转化为拉取请求（PR）。

name: MakersClaw
tagline: Hire AI employees that live in your Slack, Teams, Telegram
tagline_zh: 雇佣那些活跃于你的Slack、Teams、Telegram的AI员工
description: Hire AI employees that run 24/7 in their own container with their own memory. One-click into your Slack, Telegram, or Teams. Pre-built for support, sales, research, SEO, or anything you write yourself. Pay per call for the tools they use.
description_zh: 雇佣人工智能员工，让他们在自己的容器中全天候运行，拥有自己的内存。一键接入你的Slack、Telegram或Teams。这些员工已预先构建，可用于支持、销售、研究、搜索引擎优化（SEO）或任何你自己编写的工作。他们使用的工具按通话付费。

name: Journey Now
tagline: Learning copilot for human ambition
tagline_zh: 为人类雄心壮志学习副驾驶
description: Journey Now turns anything you want to learn or master into a personalized, step-by-step plan — with daily guidance, reflection, and a view of how friends are progressing too. As your pace or goals change, the plan adjusts itself, so progress never stalls on a missed deadline.
description_zh: Journey Now能将你想学习或掌握的任何内容转化为个性化的、循序渐进的计划——提供每日指导、反思，还能查看朋友们的进度。随着你的进度或目标的变化，计划会自动调整，这样就不会因为错过截止日期而停滞不前。

name: Novu Connect
tagline: Ship agents where your users already work
tagline_zh: 用户已在使用哪些船舶代理
description: Novu Connect lets any AI agent have two-way conversations across Slack, Teams, WhatsApp, Telegram, and email without building each channel integration yourself. Bring your own agent logic, model, or code. Novu handles the communication layer: delivery, identity resolution, threading, routing, and channel-specific formatting, so your agent can reach users where they already work.
description_zh: Novu Connect让任何人工智能代理都能通过Slack、Teams、WhatsApp、Telegram和电子邮件进行双向对话，而无需自行构建每个渠道的集成。你可以带来自己的代理逻辑、模型或代码。Novu负责处理通信层：消息传递、身份解析、线程处理、路由选择以及特定渠道的格式化，这样你的代理就能触及用户已经在使用的工作方式。

name: Leni
tagline: The world’s most accurate AI for investors
tagline_zh: 全球最精准的投资者辅助人工智能
description: Leni is the most accurate and verifiable AI for serious investment work. Built on 21,000+ decision traces and processing 100M+ rows daily, it delivers finance-grade outputs with full auditability through source links, timestamps, and grounded comps. Leni outperforms GPT, Claude, and Manus on independent benchmarks for accuracy, modeling, and valuation while giving teams the trust they need when millions are on the line. Leni is part of Google Startups and a serious machine for investors.
description_zh: Leni是用于严肃投资工作最准确、最可验证的人工智能。它基于21,000多个决策轨迹构建，每天处理超过1亿行数据，通过源链接、时间戳和有依据的对比案例，提供具有完全可审计性的金融级输出。在独立基准测试中，Leni在准确性、建模和估值方面优于GPT、Claude和Manus，同时为团队在涉及数百万资金时提供所需的信任。Leni是谷歌初创公司的一部分，是投资者的重要工具。

name: Terminal Mode by Even Realities
tagline: Keep coding agents always in sight
tagline_zh: 始终保持编码代理在视线范围内
description: Terminal Mode by Even Realities unlocks an ambient terminal on Even G2 smart glasses. When a coding agent stalls, you catch it: see which agent needs you now, give direction, and approve key steps while your laptop runs long tasks, so token-maxers get more from every run and vibe coders stay in flow.
description_zh: Even Realities的终端模式为Even G2智能眼镜解锁了一个环境终端。当编码代理程序停滞时，您能及时发现：查看当前哪个代理程序需要您的帮助，给出指导，并在您的笔记本电脑运行长时间任务时批准关键步骤，这样代币最大化者每次运行都能获得更多收益，而氛围编码者也能保持高效工作状态。

name: Jesse
tagline: Stop building Apollo/Clay lists. Search the live internet.
tagline_zh: 别再建阿波罗/克莱名单了。去搜索实时网络。
description: Sales teams have been stuck with stale databases for 15 years. Jesse changes everything.. the first internet-wide search engine built for sales & marketing. Ask in plain English: "Find newly opened soccer facilities in the Midwest needing turf solutions." Jesse scans the live web and finds the right buyers in the market today. We are an anti database company, we don’t scrape and store stale databases and sell them at premium. Every lead is found fresh from the live internet and delivered.
description_zh: 销售团队已经忍受陈旧的数据库长达15年之久。杰西改变了一切……它是首个专为销售和营销打造的互联网级搜索引擎。用通俗易懂的语言提问：“寻找中西部地区新开放的、需要草坪解决方案的足球设施。”杰西扫描实时网络，在当今市场上找到合适的买家。我们是一家反数据库公司，我们不会抓取和存储陈旧的数据库，并以高价出售。每一个销售线索都是从实时互联网上新鲜找到并交付的。

name: Cleo
tagline: The AI PM that runs your team
tagline_zh: 管理你团队的AI项目经理
description: Cleo is the AI product manager for founders and lean teams. It lives in Telegram and Slack - learns your tone, knows your team, and runs the PM work (standups, follow-ups, decisions) while you ship the product. What's different: every fact Cleo learns is transparent - you see the source, the confidence, and can confirm or correct it. No black-box memory. Five trust levels, from observer to operator. Free in Telegram. 1 min setup
description_zh: Cleo是专为创始人和精简团队打造的人工智能产品经理。它存在于Telegram和Slack中——能感知你的语气，了解你的团队，并在你发布产品时负责项目管理（站立会议、跟进、决策）。与众不同的是：Cleo学到的每一个事实都是透明的——你可以看到来源、置信度，并可以确认或纠正。没有黑箱记忆。有五个信任级别，从观察者到操作者。在Telegram上免费使用。1分钟即可完成设置

name: Gemini Omni
tagline: Create anything from any input – starting with video
tagline_zh: 从任何输入内容开始，创造任何东西——从视频开始
description: Create anything from anything, starting with video. Gemini Omni is where Gemini’s ability to reason meets the ability to create. It delivers a leap in world understanding, multimodality, and editing.
description_zh: 从任何事物中创造任何东西，从视频开始。Gemini Omni是Gemini推理能力与创造能力相结合的产物。它实现了对世界的理解、多模态和编辑的飞跃。

name: SocialEcho 2.0
tagline: AI social media copilot for teams and agents
tagline_zh: 团队和代理的AI社交媒体辅助工具
description: SocialEcho is an AI social media copilot for teams managing social campaigns across multiple brands, accounts, and channels. See what’s trending, create content that resonates, optimize posts for every platform, publish from one workspace, manage every conversation, and track what drives engagement. Built on official social APIs, SocialEcho gives AI agents like OpenClaw, Hermes, and custom automations a secure way to manage connected social accounts without brittle scraping or risky workarounds.
description_zh: SocialEcho是一款面向团队的AI社交媒体辅助工具，可帮助团队管理跨多个品牌、账户和渠道的社交活动。用户可查看热门趋势，创作能引起共鸣的内容，为每个平台优化帖子，从单一工作区发布内容，管理每条对话，并追踪推动互动的因素。SocialEcho基于官方社交API构建，为OpenClaw、Hermes等AI代理和自定义自动化提供了一种安全的方式来管理关联的社交账户，无需脆弱的爬取或危险的变通方法。

name: Taste Lab
tagline: Extract any website's design DNA
tagline_zh: 提取任何网站的设计基因
description: Point your AI agent at any website. Get back a complete design breakdown — colors, type, spacing, and the reasoning behind every decision — ready to use in your next build.
description_zh: 将你的AI代理对准任何网站。即可获得一个完整的设计分析——包括颜色、字体、间距以及每个决策背后的原因——以备在下一次构建中使用。

name: Dreambeans by Google Labs
tagline: Daily AI stories personalised from your Google apps
tagline_zh: 根据您的谷歌应用为您定制的每日人工智能故事
description: Dreambeans synthesises your Gmail, Calendar, Photos, YouTube, and Search overnight to deliver daily AI-generated story collections. For Google AI Ultra subscribers who want personal context surfaced proactively.
description_zh: Dreambeans会在夜间综合您的Gmail、日历、照片、YouTube和搜索记录，为您呈现每日由人工智能生成的故事集锦。对于希望主动获取个性化背景信息的Google AI Ultra订阅用户而言，这无疑是一个绝佳选择。

name: Slashspace AI
tagline: Canvas first AI experience for sustained, complex work
tagline_zh: Canvas首次推出AI体验，助力持续、复杂的工作
description: An AI native user today copy-pastes prompts across a dozen apps. It's a broken experience for any kind of meaningful work. Every new chat box collapses context to zero. Slashspace solves that with an AI canvas where AI lives on the canvas, and you can run many chats as nodes. The canvas becomes the context space, and all the agents can see each other. Canvas is stored as files on your computer. Built with 1600 power users for over 1.5 years, we're the most mature canvas AI on the market.
description_zh: 如今，一个熟悉人工智能的用户会在十几个应用中复制粘贴提示。对于任何有意义的工作来说，这都是一种糟糕的体验。每个新的聊天框都会将上下文归零。Slashspace通过一个AI画布解决了这个问题，AI就存在于画布上，你可以将多个聊天作为节点运行。画布成为上下文空间，所有的代理都能相互看到。画布以文件形式存储在你的电脑上。经过1600名高级用户超过1.5年的开发，我们是市场上最成熟的画布AI。

name: Dune Keypad
tagline: Context-aware Mac keypad, w/ Claude + community extensions
tagline_zh: 支持上下文的Mac键盘，配备Claude +社区扩展功能
description: Dune is a context-aware keypad for Mac that now builds around you. Create shortcuts just by talking to Claude, browse a Marketplace of community-built scripts, and assign any workflow to your three keys across the apps you use. From meetings to dev tools to everyday tasks, Dune adapts instantly so the right action is always one keypress away.
description_zh: Dune是一款为Mac打造的情境感知键盘，现在它已围绕您而建。只需与Claude对话即可创建快捷方式，浏览社区构建的脚本市场，并为您使用的应用程序中的三个键分配任何工作流程。从会议到开发工具再到日常任务，Dune都能即时适应，让您只需一键即可执行正确操作。

name: Bond
tagline: Outbound campaigns powered by real buying signals
tagline_zh: 由真实购买信号驱动的出站营销活动
description: Bond is your AI GTM Engineer. Tell it who you want to reach. It builds the audience, plans the campaign, writes the messaging, and executes it end to end. Every data provider and outreach tool you need, in one workflow. Build your first campaign in 15 minutes.
description_zh: Bond是你的AI GTM（Go-To-Market）工程师。告诉它你想联系谁。它会构建受众群体，规划活动，撰写信息，并从头到尾执行。你需要的每个数据提供者和外联工具，都在一个工作流程中。15分钟内就能构建你的第一个活动。

name: Yansu
tagline: AI that learns how you work and turns it into software
tagline_zh: 人工智能学习你的工作方式，并将其转化为软件
description: Yanshu learns from the work you already do. It spots repeated tasks across files, messages, and workflows, then turns the best patterns into apps and automations. No process mapping or blank canvas—just the routines worth systemizing. Use it to automate recurring work, build lightweight internal tools, and speed up daily ops without writing code.
description_zh: Yanshu从您已经完成的工作中学习。它能够识别文件、消息和工作流程中的重复任务，然后将最佳模式转化为应用程序和自动化流程。无需流程映射或空白画布——只需将值得系统化的例程。使用它来自动化重复性工作，构建轻量级的内部工具，并在无需编写代码的情况下加快日常运营速度。

name: /monitor by Firecrawl
tagline: Notify your AI agent when the web changes
tagline_zh: 当网页发生变化时，通知您的AI代理
description: /monitor notifies your agent via webhook the moment pages or sites change. Use up to 90% fewer LLM tokens by only ingesting what changes on a page.
description_zh: /monitor会在页面或网站发生更改时，立即通过Webhook通知您的代理。仅摄取页面上发生更改的内容，最多可减少90%的LLM标记使用量。

name: Ava 2.0
tagline: Your AI BDR that runs outbound sales autonomously
tagline_zh: 您的人工智能BDR（业务发展代表）能够自主进行出站销售
description: Ava is an AI BDR that runs your entire outbound on autopilot. She sources leads from 250M+ professionals, runs multi-channel outreach, and books qualified meetings. Fully autonomously.
description_zh: Ava是一款人工智能业务开发机器人（AI BDR），能全自动地管理您的整个外联工作。她能从2.5亿多名专业人士中挖掘潜在客户，通过多渠道进行外联，并预约合格的会议。全程完全自主。

name: Databox MCP
tagline: Chat with your business data inside Claude, ChatGPT and more
tagline_zh: 在Claude、ChatGPT等工具中与您的业务数据进行交互
description: Databox MCP connects your business data to Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and n8n. Ask about revenue, campaigns, or pipeline in plain language and get answers grounded in your real metrics and business context.
description_zh: Databox MCP可将您的业务数据与Claude、ChatGPT、Cursor和n8n相连。用通俗易懂的语言询问收入、活动或潜在客户，即可获得基于您真实数据和业务背景的答案。

name: Vaani
tagline: Lip-synced AI dubbing for creators, brands and studios
tagline_zh: 为创作者、品牌和工作室提供AI唇形同步配音
description: Vaani is a voice-preserving AI dubbing tool to help you dub in 40+ languages, in one go, at a fraction of the cost of a traditional dub session. Where other tools give you a generic AI voice and lips that drift off-beat, Vaani clones your voice, preserves your music, and holds the meaning across languages, with frame-accurate lip sync. Built for anyone creating videos, from creators and brands to media companies, OTTs and studios.
description_zh: Vaani是一款保留原声的人工智能配音工具，可帮助您一次性完成40多种语言的配音，而成本仅为传统配音会话的一小部分。其他工具只能为您提供通用的AI声音和不合拍的嘴唇动作，而Vaani则能克隆您的声音，保留您的音乐，并在不同语言之间保持含义一致，实现帧精确的唇形同步。Vaani专为所有视频创作者而设计，无论是创作者、品牌、媒体公司、OTT还是工作室，都能从中受益。

name: Skybridge
tagline: The full-stack open source React framework for MCP Apps
tagline_zh: 适用于MCP应用程序的全栈开源React框架
description: MCP apps are the new website: they're real, interactive apps that run right inside AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude. The tooling to build them didn't exist, so we built it. Meet Skybridge, the React framework that handles the infrastructure and the dev loop so you can focus on your features: MCP server, view rendering, client compatibility, testing tunnel, and more. Code once, ship everywhere. Already +500K downloads and dozens of apps in the stores!
description_zh: MCP应用是新型网站：它们是真正的交互式应用，直接在ChatGPT和Claude等AI助手内部运行。构建它们的工具尚不存在，因此我们自行开发了。来认识一下Skybridge吧，这是一个React框架，负责处理基础设施和开发循环，这样你就可以专注于自己的功能：MCP服务器、视图渲染、客户端兼容性、测试隧道等等。只需编写一次代码，即可发布到所有平台。目前已有超过50万次下载，数十款应用上架商店！

name: Pitch Agent
tagline: On-brand presentations, generated in seconds
tagline_zh: 几秒钟内生成的品牌风格演示文稿
description: Most AI tools apply your colors to generic layouts and call it “on brand.” Pitch Agent builds from your template, design language, and image style. Generate slides from a prompt and file attachments, then refine them via chat. Agent lives inside Pitch, the workspace where teams collaborate on and deliver presentations.
description_zh: 大多数人工智能工具会将您的颜色应用于通用布局，并称之为“符合品牌”。Pitch Agent则根据您的模板、设计语言和图像风格进行构建。您只需提供提示和文件附件，即可生成幻灯片，然后通过聊天进行优化。Agent存在于Pitch中，这是团队协作和演示的工作空间。

name: Kimi K2.7 Code
tagline: Kimi’s most capable coding model yet
tagline_zh: Kimi迄今为止最强大的编码模型
description: Kimi K2.7 Code is Moonshot AI’s latest coding-focused agentic model, built for long-horizon software engineering, 256K context, multi-step tool use, multimodal inputs, and around 30% lower reasoning-token usage than K2.6. Available in Kimi Code, Kimi API, and as open weights/code.
description_zh: Kimi K2.7代码是Moonshot AI最新的以编码为重点的代理模型，专为长期软件工程而构建，具有256K上下文、多步骤工具使用、多模态输入，并且推理标记使用量比K2.6低约30%。该模型可通过Kimi Code、Kimi API以及开放权重/代码的形式获取。

name: Tabstack Dev Tools
tagline: Ditch your scraper. Make one API call with any tool.
tagline_zh: 丢掉你的爬虫吧。用任何工具发起一个API调用。
description: Ditch your scraper. One API gives your code everything it needs from the web: structured JSON, clean markdown, cited research, and browser automation. No browser, LLM, or pipeline for you to run. Use it from the tools you already work in: an MCP server, CLI, Raycast extension, or as an Agent Skill. Grab a key and make your first call in less than three minutes. Mozilla-backed. Your data is never sold, never trained on.
description_zh: 丢掉你的爬虫吧。一个API就能为你的代码提供从网络上所需的一切：结构化的JSON、整洁的Markdown、引用的研究资料以及浏览器自动化功能。无需运行浏览器、大型语言模型（LLM）或处理流程。你可以在你已经使用的工具中使用它：MCP服务器、命令行界面（CLI）、Raycast扩展程序或作为代理技能。获取一个密钥，在不到三分钟内完成首次调用。由Mozilla提供支持。你的数据永不售卖，也永不用于训练。

name: zero.xyz
tagline: Give your AI agent access to ~8k tools, APIs and services
tagline_zh: 让你的AI代理能够访问约8000种工具、API和服务
description: **Product Hunt: Claim $5 at zero.xyz, the free power tool for AI agents** Zero unblocks your agents so they can discover services to accomplish tasks, no APIs keys or config. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, OpenClaw, Hermes and most other CLI agents. Make your agents better with Zero.
description_zh: **Product Hunt：在zero.xyz领取5美元，这是AI代理的免费工具**Zero可解除对您的代理的阻止，使其能够发现服务以完成任务，无需API密钥或配置。适用于Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、OpenClaw、Hermes以及大多数其他CLI代理。使用Zero，让您的代理更强大。

name: Mintlify Workflows
tagline: Self-updating knowledge bases
tagline_zh: 自我更新的知识库
description: Keep your docs moving as fast as your product. Mintlify Workflows lets teams turn on pre-built automations that update knowledge bases, generate changelogs, maintain translations, and handle repetitive documentation tasks whenever triggered. Instead of chasing every product change manually, teams can set up Workflows once and let Mintlify keep docs accurate, current, and ready for users.
description_zh: 让您的文档与产品同步更新。Mintlify Workflows 可帮助团队启用预构建的自动化功能，这些功能可在触发时更新知识库、生成变更日志、维护翻译内容，并处理重复的文档任务。团队无需手动追踪每个产品变更，只需设置一次 Workflows，即可让 Mintlify 确保文档准确、最新，随时可供用户使用。

name: Rezonant
tagline: Talk, spec, ship: get your product ideas into production
tagline_zh: 讨论、规划、发货：将您的产品创意转化为产品
description: Rezonant helps product teams turn messy ideas into code-ready specs, tickets, and engineering tasks. Collaborate with PMs, engineers, designers, and AI agents in one shared workspace. Ground decisions in your actual codebase, keep everyone aligned on the same version, and create work that humans and coding agents can confidently ship.
description_zh: Rezonant助力产品团队将零散的想法转化为可编码的规范、工单和工程任务。在一个共享的工作空间中，与项目经理、工程师、设计师和人工智能代理进行协作。将决策落实到实际的代码库中，确保所有人都在同一版本上保持一致，并创造出人类和编码代理都能自信交付的工作成果。

name: ZeroGPU
tagline: The compute efficient layer for AI inference
tagline_zh: 用于AI推理的计算高效层
description: The world can't build compute fast enough to keep up with AI demand. So we took a different path. ZeroGPU is AI infrastructure powered by small language models running on a hybrid edge network reusing compute that already exists. Not every task needs a frontier model. Our purpose-built, edge-optimized models run 10x faster, 50% cheaper and offload 70–80% of production tasks to small models with frontier-level accuracy.
description_zh: 全球的计算能力无法快速提升以跟上人工智能（AI）的需求。因此，我们选择了不同的路径。ZeroGPU是由运行在混合边缘网络上的小型语言模型提供支持的人工智能基础设施，该网络可重复利用现有的计算资源。并非每项任务都需要前沿模型。我们专门构建的、针对边缘优化的模型运行速度提高了10倍，成本降低了50%，并将70%至80%的生产任务卸载到具有前沿级准确度的小型模型上。

name: Supaboard 3.0
tagline: AI data analysts that understand your business
tagline_zh: 了解您业务的AI数据分析师
description: Supaboard helps your team turn business data into answers faster. Skip SQL, dashboard digging, and report delays. Ask questions in plain English, analyze data, and generate dashboards in minutes.
description_zh: Supaboard助力您的团队更快地将业务数据转化为答案。无需SQL、仪表板挖掘和报告延迟。只需用简单英语提问，即可在几分钟内分析数据并生成仪表板。

name: Empromptu AI
tagline: Train Fine Tuned Models With AI Apps You're Already Building
tagline_zh: 利用您已在构建的AI应用来训练微调模型
description: Most AI apps launch on someone else’s model and stay there forever. Empromptu AI turns live AI features into custom models you own. As your app runs, Empromptu AI captures real-world usage, human corrections, and edge cases from live AI workflows, then uses that signal to train a custom model you own. Improve accuracy, lower inference costs, and stop depending forever on rented intelligence from the same providers moving into your category.
description_zh: 大多数人工智能（AI）应用都是在别人的模型上启动，并永远停留在那里。Empromptu AI则将实时AI功能转化为属于你自己的定制模型。当你的应用运行时，Empromptu AI会从实时AI工作流程中捕捉真实世界的使用情况、人工修正和边缘案例，然后利用这些信号来训练属于你自己的定制模型。提高准确性，降低推理成本，并永远不再依赖从同一提供商那里租用的智能进入你的领域。

name: Qursor
tagline: Point at any UI to send exact context to your AI
tagline_zh: 指向任何用户界面（UI），即可向您的人工智能（AI）发送确切的上下文信息
description: I kept wasting AI tokens describing UI changes to agents that edited the wrong element. So I built Qursor. Point at any element, copy structured context (selectors, classes, styles, fonts, colors), paste into your AI agent. No vague screenshots. No burned credits. - Inspect fonts, colors, spacing - Copy AI-ready element context - Extract components as HTML/CSS/JSX - Color picker and font detector - Download assets from any page
description_zh: 我一直在浪费AI代币，描述编辑错误元素的代理的UI更改。因此，我构建了Qursor。指向任何元素，复制结构化上下文（选择器、类、样式、字体、颜色），粘贴到你的AI代理中。没有模糊的截图。没有消耗的信用点。- 检查字体、颜色、间距 - 复制AI就绪的元素上下文 - 将组件提取为HTML/CSS/JSX - 颜色选择器和字体检测器 - 从任何页面下载资源

name: ModelHub
tagline: The missing menu bar app for local LLMs on Mac.
tagline_zh: Mac本地大型语言模型（LLM）缺少的菜单栏应用程序。
description: ModelHub is a native macOS menu bar app for developers working with local LLMs. It helps you discover models from Hugging Face, download the right local build, manage your model library, and use Hugging Face models with Ollama, MLX, LM Studio, llama.cpp, and the tools you already have without bouncing between browser tabs, terminal commands, model cards, and local folders. Ollama, MLX, and LM Studio are great tools. ModelHub is the missing discovery and management layer around them.
description_zh: ModelHub是一款适用于本地大型语言模型（LLM）开发人员的原生macOS菜单栏应用程序。它可帮助您从Hugging Face发现模型，下载正确的本地构建版本，管理您的模型库，以及将Hugging Face模型与Ollama、MLX、LM Studio、llama.cpp以及您已有的工具一起使用，而无需在浏览器标签页、终端命令、模型卡片和本地文件夹之间来回切换。Ollama、MLX和LM Studio都是出色的工具。而ModelHub则是围绕它们缺失的发现和管理层。

name: WorkClaw
tagline: Collaborative, proactive AI coworkers who work in Slack
tagline_zh: 在Slack中协作、积极主动的人工智能同事
description: Meet the AI team for your team. WorkClaws are collaborative, proactive AI coworkers who work in Slack and Microsoft Teams just like every other colleague. They're fully customizable to get work done your way by learning skills and routines. Unlike most AI products that pair one person with one assistant, WorkClaws can collaborate 24/7 with your whole team. Each Claw has a job title, a manager in your org chart, and a cloud-hosted ClawOS computer with the ability to access more than 3,000 apps.
description_zh: 来认识一下你团队的人工智能助手们吧。WorkClaws是协作型、主动式的人工智能同事，他们像其他同事一样，在Slack和Microsoft Teams中工作。他们完全可定制，能够通过学习和掌握技能和流程，以你的方式完成工作。与大多数一对一匹配的人工智能产品不同，WorkClaws可以全天候与你的整个团队协同工作。每个Claw都有一个职位头衔、一个在组织结构图中的经理，以及一台云端托管的ClawOS电脑，能够访问3000多个应用程序。

name: General Compute
tagline: AI models that run on an inference cloud optimized for speed
tagline_zh: 在为速度优化的推理云上运行的AI模型
description: GPUs are built for training, not inference. General Compute is an inference cloud running on ASICs — purpose-built alternatives to Nvidia silicon designed specifically for inference. We deliver 5x faster responses and higher per-user throughput for latency-sensitive workloads like coding and voice agents. Our OpenAI-compatible API means you swap your base URL, keep your existing workflows, and run real-time AI on infrastructure built for the job.
description_zh: GPU是为训练而构建的，而非用于推理。通用计算是一种在专用集成电路（ASIC）上运行的推理云——专为推理而设计的、替代英伟达（Nvidia）芯片的专用方案。对于编码和语音代理等对延迟敏感的工作负载，我们提供快5倍的响应速度和更高的每用户吞吐量。我们的API与OpenAI兼容，这意味着您只需更换基础URL，保持现有工作流程，即可在专为该任务构建的基础设施上运行实时人工智能。

name: Google Gemma 4 12B
tagline: Run multimodal AI locally with an encoder-free architecture
tagline_zh: 采用无编码器架构，在本地运行多模态人工智能
description: Gemma 4 12B processes text, vision, and audio natively without separate encoders, running on 16GB VRAM. For developers building local agentic applications who need multimodal capability without cloud dependency.
description_zh: Gemma 4 12B无需单独的编码器即可原生处理文本、视觉和音频，运行在16GB的显存上。适用于构建本地代理应用程序的开发人员，他们需要多模态能力且不依赖云服务。

name: Wobo - AI Job Search
tagline: Tinder for jobs: swipe right and AI applies for you
tagline_zh: Tinder式求职：向右滑动，AI帮你申请
description: Swipe right. Applied. Wobo is your personal AI recruiter. It matches pre-vetted jobs to your background, then applies on each company's own site for you. Your resume, cover letter, and every application question: all written in your voice, so it reads like you wrote it, not a bot. No endless forms. No ghost listings. Just swipe, and wake up to interviews.
description_zh: 向右滑动。已申请。Wobo是你的私人AI招聘助手。它会根据你的背景匹配预先审核过的职位，然后为你向每家公司官网提交申请。你的简历、求职信和每一个申请问题：全部以你的口吻撰写，读起来就像是你自己写的，而不是机器人写的。无需填写冗长的表格。没有虚假职位。只需滑动几下，就能获得面试机会。

name: Freu AI
tagline: Automate any Mac app with $0 recurring run cost
tagline_zh: 自动化任何Mac应用，无需任何持续运行成本
description: Freu AI is an AI agent for Mac that automates any desktop app with natural language. It “sees” your UI to compile a cross‑app workflow once, then runs it locally via a deterministic DSL—no brittle coordinates/selectors and no recurring token bills. Bonus: we’re open‑sourcing freu-cli (our browser automation engine) today.
description_zh: Freu AI是一款适用于Mac的人工智能助手，可通过自然语言自动化任何桌面应用程序。它能够“看到”你的用户界面，一次性编译跨应用工作流程，然后通过确定性领域特定语言（DSL）在本地运行——无需脆弱的坐标/选择器，也无需重复的令牌账单。额外福利：我们今天开源了freu-cli（我们的浏览器自动化引擎）。

name: folk
tagline: the AI in your texts that gets stuff done
tagline_zh: 你文本中那个能帮你完成任务的AI
description: Folk is your AI friend that lives in any messaging app: iMessage, Telegram, Discord, and more. It joins meetings, plans your date, knows where you are, and gets smarter with every conversation. The longer you use it, the more it knows you. And now it's multiplayer, so you and your friends can team up and reach your goals together.
description_zh: Folk是您的人工智能伙伴，它存在于任何消息应用程序中：iMessage、Telegram、Discord等等。它能参加会议、计划约会、了解您的位置，并且每次对话都会让它变得更聪明。您使用它的时间越长，它对您的了解就越多。现在它支持多人模式，因此您和您的朋友可以组队，共同实现目标。

name: Wave
tagline: Turn your voice into text — local or cloud, your choice
tagline_zh: 将您的语音转换为文本——本地或云端，任您选择
description: Wave lets you invoke an AI model anywhere on macOS using just your voice. Hold a hotkey, speak, and release—your speech is transcribed, processed, and the result appears exactly where you need it. If you're typing, it replaces or inserts text. If you're reading, it shows a floating answer. Works across all apps with selected text as context.
description_zh: Wave让你只需用语音就能在macOS上的任何地方调用AI模型。按住热键，说话，然后松开——你的语音将被转录、处理，结果会准确无误地出现在你需要的地方。如果你正在打字，它会替换或插入文本。如果你正在阅读，它会显示一个浮动的答案。它适用于所有以选定文本为上下文的应用程序。

name: Zernio WhatsApp API
tagline: One API for WhatsApp: messaging, calling, and AI agents
tagline_zh: WhatsApp的统一API：消息传递、通话和AI代理
description: You knew Zernio as the API for social media. Now it does WhatsApp too, the whole thing. Connect a number and you've got the entire WhatsApp Business API behind it: messaging and broadcasts, in-chat forms, calls you can route to AI agents, chatbots, group chats, and numbers in 53 countries. Whatever you need to build on WhatsApp, it's one integration. Made for developers and the agents they build: REST, SDKs, CLI, and a hosted MCP server. Official WhatsApp Business API. Zero markup on usage.
description_zh: 您知道Zernio是社交媒体的API。现在它也支持WhatsApp，涵盖了所有功能。只需连接一个号码，您就能获得整个WhatsApp Business API的支持：消息传递和广播、聊天表单、可路由至AI代理的通话、聊天机器人、群聊以及53个国家的号码。无论您需要在WhatsApp上构建什么，只需一次集成即可。专为开发人员及其构建的代理而设计：REST、SDK、CLI和托管的MCP服务器。官方WhatsApp Business API。使用零加价。

name: Typeahead
tagline: AI autocomplete for every app on your Mac
tagline_zh: 为Mac上的每个应用提供AI自动补全功能
description: Typeahead is the writing assistant that writes with you, not for you. It works in every text field on your Mac, helping you type faster and smarter with inline suggestions that appear as you write. It runs on a local AI model, works offline and keeps your writing on your device.
description_zh: Typeahead是一款写作辅助工具，它与你一起写作，而非代替你写作。它适用于Mac上的每个文本字段，通过在你写作时出现的内联建议，帮助你更快、更智能地打字。它基于本地人工智能模型运行，可离线工作，并将你的写作内容保存在你的设备上。

name: Second Brain for AI
tagline: Persistent memory for Claude, ChatGPT & Cursor. Free.
tagline_zh: 为Claude、ChatGPT和Cursor提供持久内存。免费。
description: Every AI conversation starts from zero. Your projects, decisions, and preferences disappear as soon as you close the chat. Second Brain fixes that. It is a self-hosted memory layer that works with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and any MCP client. You can store context once and recall it by meaning instead of keywords. It includes duplicate detection, semantic search, and a web UI. Built on Cloudflare, it offers a free tier and your data remains yours. MIT licensed.
description_zh: 每一次人工智能对话都是从零开始。你的项目、决策和偏好会在你关闭聊天窗口后立即消失。Second Brain解决了这个问题。它是一个自托管的记忆层，可与Claude、ChatGPT、Cursor和任何MCP客户端配合使用。你可以一次性存储上下文，并通过意思而非关键词进行回忆。它包括重复检测、语义搜索和网页用户界面。它基于Cloudflare构建，提供免费套餐，且你的数据始终归你所有。采用MIT许可协议。

name: Gigacatalyst
tagline: Give your Sales and CS teams engineering superpowers
tagline_zh: 让你的销售和客服团队拥有超强的工程能力
description: Gigacatalyst.com's AI builder learns your APIs and embeds in your product, so your sales and CS teams can build missing features that customers need to your platform. When your software adapts to every customer's workflow, they utilize your software more, retain for longer, and expand quicker, because they get most custom implementation for their exact usecase.
description_zh: Gigacatalyst.com的人工智能构建器能够学习您的应用程序编程接口（API），并将其嵌入到您的产品中，这样您的销售和客户服务团队就可以为您的平台构建客户所需的缺失功能。当您的软件适应了每个客户的工作流程时，他们就会更多地使用您的软件，保留时间更长，扩展速度更快，因为他们能够获得针对其特定用例的定制化实施。

name: AutoEdit
tagline: Your Claude AI Video Editor for Premiere Pro
tagline_zh: 适用于Premiere Pro的Claude AI视频编辑器
description: AutoEdit helps content creators edit their videos 10x faster by turning raw footage into a clean rough cut in minutes. It works directly inside Adobe Premiere Pro as an AI Plugin. Claude AI understands content, automatically removing silences, filler words, bad takes, restarts, and repeated sections while generating captions and structuring timelines. Editors stay in control of creative decisions while AutoEdit handles the repetitive, boring work.
description_zh: AutoEdit可在几分钟内将原始素材转化为整洁的粗剪，帮助内容创作者将视频编辑速度提升10倍。它作为AI插件直接在Adobe Premiere Pro中运行。Claude AI能够理解内容，自动去除静默、填充词、错误拍摄、重拍和重复部分，同时生成字幕并构建时间线。编辑人员可以掌控创意决策，而AutoEdit则处理重复且枯燥的工作。

name: Revolte
tagline: AI for Software Engineering
tagline_zh: 软件工程中的AI
description: Revolte is for engineering teams to turn intent into production-ready software faster, safer, and with more control. Its agents plan changes, generate code, run quality and security checks, create PRs, support deployment, monitor runtime behavior, and surface risks early. Engineers approve the important decisions. Revolte handles the delivery heavy lifting. Built for higher delivery throughput across SDLC, stronger governance, and more value shipped per engineer.
description_zh: Revolte旨在帮助工程团队更快、更安全、更有控制地将意图转化为可投入生产的软件。其代理程序能够规划变更、生成代码、执行质量和安全检查、创建拉取请求（PR）、支持部署、监控运行时行为，并及早发现风险。工程师负责批准重要决策，而Revolte则负责处理交付中的繁重工作。Revolte旨在提高整个软件开发生命周期（SDLC）的交付吞吐量，加强治理，并使每位工程师能交付更多价值。

name: Runtime
tagline: Sandboxed coding agents for everyone on your team
tagline_zh: 为团队中的每个人提供沙盒编码代理
description: Turn coding agents into teammates anyone can use from Slack, Linear, CLI, API or your browser. Ship features, query data, build dashboards, automate workflows. All within your company's context, skills, integrations, and security guardrails.
description_zh: 将编码代理转变为任何人都可以通过Slack、Linear、CLI、API或浏览器使用的队友。发布功能、查询数据、构建仪表板、自动化工作流程。所有这些都在你公司的上下文、技能、集成和安全防护范围内进行。

name: Memdex
tagline: Turn every AI conversation into reusable local memory
tagline_zh: 将每一次人工智能对话转化为可重复使用的本地记忆
description: Memdex is a Chrome extension that turns every AI conversation into reusable memory. It auto-captures your chats across ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini, stores them encrypted on your laptop (IndexedDB, never uploaded), and underlines reusable context in your next prompt like Grammarly underlines typos. One click to inject when you need it just like grammarly. Free for your 10 most recent chats. Pro for unlimited.
description_zh: Memdex是一款Chrome扩展程序，它将每一次人工智能对话转化为可重复使用的记忆。它会自动捕捉你在ChatGPT、Claude和Gemini上的聊天内容，并以加密方式存储在你的笔记本电脑上（使用IndexedDB，且内容永不上传），并在你的下一个提示中突出显示可重复使用的上下文，就像Grammarly突出显示拼写错误一样。当你需要时，只需一键即可注入，就像使用Grammarly一样。对于你最近的10次聊天，该功能免费。购买专业版则可享受无限使用。

name: Ava Studio
tagline: Your AI creative team for video ads
tagline_zh: 您的视频广告AI创意团队
description: Ava Studio researches your product, develops hooks and creative angles, then generates 50+ editable short-form ad variants ready for TikTok, Reels, Meta, and any platform you want to ship on.
description_zh: Ava Studio会研究您的产品，设计吸引人的文案和创意点，然后生成50多个可编辑的短视频广告版本，这些版本适用于TikTok、Reels、Meta以及您希望投放的任何平台。

name: Kickbacks.ai
tagline: Get paid to wait for Claude Code to finish
tagline_zh: 等待Claude Code完成，即可获得报酬
description: Kickbacks.ai helps developers get paid for AI-agent wait states. Advertisers bid for a tiny sponsored status line; users get 50% of ad revenue.
description_zh: Kickbacks.ai帮助开发者通过AI代理等待状态获得收益。广告主竞标一小块赞助状态行；用户获得50%的广告收入。

name: Google Antigravity 2.0
tagline: Orchestrate multi-agent workflows from a desktop app
tagline_zh: 通过桌面应用程序编排多代理工作流
description: Google Antigravity 2.0 is a standalone desktop app for orchestrating multiple AI agents in parallel, with scheduled background tasks, subagent workflows, and native integrations with AI Studio, Firebase, and Android. Built for developers building production apps.
description_zh: Google Antigravity 2.0是一款独立的桌面应用程序，用于并行编排多个AI代理，具有预定的后台任务、子代理工作流以及与AI Studio、Firebase和Android的原生集成。专为构建生产级应用的开发者打造。

name: Co-Invest
tagline: Trade 500+ markets directly from ChatGPT & Claude
tagline_zh: 直接通过ChatGPT和Claude交易500多个市场
description: Co-Invest by Liquid lets you research and place real trades inside ChatGPT or Claude. Access 500+ markets across crypto, equities, FX, commodities, and prediction markets—24/7. Fund in-chat, use on-chain signals (wallet activity, positioning, funding, order flow), and execute in plain language with stops/targets. Your AI also handles support with full context.
description_zh: Liquid的Co-Invest功能让您可以在ChatGPT或Claude内部进行研究和执行真实交易。您可以全天候访问加密货币、股票、外汇、大宗商品和预测市场等500多个市场。您可以在聊天中注入资金，使用链上信号（钱包活动、持仓、资金、订单流），并以通俗易懂的语言执行交易，设置止损/目标。您的AI还会提供全面支持，并给出完整上下文。

name: Veltrix AI
tagline: AI finance copilot for cash flow, margins, and growth
tagline_zh: 现金流、利润率和增长的AI财务副驾驶
description: Veltrix AI gives founders and finance teams instant clarity on cash flow, profitability, burn, and business performance. Connect QuickBooks, Xero, Shopify, Square, and HubSpot, then ask finance questions in plain English to get source-backed answers, anomalies, and recommended next steps. Replace spreadsheet chaos and static dashboards with real-time financial intelligence built to help you make faster, smarter business decisions.
description_zh: Veltrix AI让创始人和财务团队能够即时了解现金流、盈利能力、烧钱情况和业务表现。连接QuickBooks、Xero、Shopify、Square和HubSpot，然后用通俗易懂的语言提出财务问题，即可获得有数据支持的答案、异常情况报告以及下一步行动建议。用实时财务智能取代混乱的电子表格和静态仪表板，助您做出更快、更明智的业务决策。

name: Oasis Browser for Mac
tagline: A privacy-first AI browser you can train anonymously
tagline_zh: 一款隐私优先的人工智能浏览器，可匿名训练
description: Oasis is a refuge from noisy, scattered browsing. Privacy comes first, in an elegant experience that AI makes feel lighter and more capable, not busier. Your data is your data. Period. As you train Oasis on what matters to you, it grows sharper, quicker, and truer to your everyday flow.
description_zh: Oasis是一个远离嘈杂、分散浏览的避风港。在这里，隐私是第一位的，通过人工智能打造的优雅体验，让你感觉更轻松、更有能力，而不是更忙碌。你的数据就是你的数据。就这么简单。当你训练Oasis了解对你而言重要的事项时，它会变得更加敏锐、迅速，更贴近你的日常流程。

name: PandaProbe Cloud
tagline: Agent Engineering, Fully Managed.
tagline_zh: 代理工程，全托管。
description: PandaProbe Cloud gives your team full-stack tracing, evals, and monitoring for agents with zero infrastructure to manage. Ship better agents without the ops overhead.
description_zh: PandaProbe Cloud为您的团队提供全栈追踪、评估和监控代理服务，无需管理任何基础设施。无需运维开销，即可交付更优的代理。

name: WeWeb 3.0
tagline: Vibe-code apps with the safety net of a no-code editor
tagline_zh: Vibe-code应用程序，配备无代码编辑器的安全保障
description: WeWeb is the only AI app builder that gives full editing control to non-coders. Prompt AI to generate your app, then refine every screen, workflow, and database in a powerful no-code editor where you always understand what’s happening under the hood. No more black box.
description_zh: WeWeb是唯一一款为非程序员提供全面编辑控制权的AI应用构建器。只需提示AI生成您的应用，然后在一个强大的无代码编辑器中优化每个屏幕、工作流程和数据库，您始终可以了解底层运行情况。再也不用担心黑箱操作了。

name: AgentX
tagline: Evaluate AI agent, pinpoint issues, and fix with one click.
tagline_zh: 一键评估AI代理、精准定位问题并修复。
description: Evaluate AI agents before they fail. Create test suites, run evaluations, and pinpoint issues before they reach production. AgentX provides full observability and traceability for your AI agents. AI analysis not only identifies problems but also suggests fixes-like an AI doctor for your agents. Simulate run your agents across multiple LLM providers to compare performance, cost, and latency, helping you make better decisions about which LLM to go. Run eval before deploy. Like CI/CD for AI agents.
description_zh: 在人工智能代理失败之前对其进行评估。创建测试套件，运行评估，并在问题进入生产环境之前查明问题。AgentX为您的人工智能代理提供全面的可观察性和可追溯性。人工智能分析不仅能识别问题，还能提出修复建议，就像为您的代理请了一位人工智能医生。模拟在多个大型语言模型（LLM）提供商的环境中运行您的代理，以比较性能、成本和延迟，从而帮助您更好地决定选择哪个大型语言模型。在部署之前运行评估。就像人工智能代理的持续集成/持续部署（CI/CD）一样。

name: Wingbits AI
tagline: AI agents for real-time aircraft monitoring and alerts
tagline_zh: 用于实时飞机监控和警报的人工智能代理
description: Create agents that monitor airspace activity 24/7 - military aircraft in a region, private or government jets, a GPS-jamming spike, or a travelling friend or family member - and get alerts the moment something relevant happens. Or just ask anything about what's flying right now. Powered by our own independent network of 5,600+ antennas across 120 countries. No code, no data engineering, no terabytes to store.
description_zh: 创建全天候监控空域活动的代理——监控区域内的军用飞机、私人或政府飞机、GPS干扰尖峰，或是旅行中的朋友或家人——并在相关事件发生时立即收到警报。或者，只需询问当前正在飞行的任何东西。由我们遍布120个国家的5600多个天线的独立网络提供支持。无需编写代码、无需数据工程、无需存储大量数据。

name: Job Postings API
tagline: View, monitor, and analyze 1.8M+ US jobs
tagline_zh: 查看、监控和分析美国180多万个工作岗位
description: A free, hosted job listings API with 1.8M+ listings across 60k companies. Get comprehensive active and historical job data from 30+ applicant tracking systems, with companies spanning industries and stages.
description_zh: 一个免费的、托管的职位列表API，涵盖6万家公司的180多万个职位。从30多个求职者跟踪系统中获取全面的活跃和历史职位数据，这些公司遍布各个行业和阶段。

name: Ideogram 4.0
tagline: Generate design-ready image with open weight, layout control
tagline_zh: 生成设计就绪图像，具有开放权重和布局控制功能
description: Ideogram 4.0 is an open-weight text-to-image model trained from scratch, with bounding-box layout control, multilingual text rendering, and native 2K output. For developers and enterprises building on visual AI.
description_zh: Ideogram 4.0是一个从零开始训练的轻量级文本到图像模型，具有边界框布局控制、多语言文本渲染和原生2K输出功能。面向基于视觉AI进行开发的开发者和企业。

name: Pond
tagline: Fundraising, GTM, and bounties for startups
tagline_zh: 初创公司的融资、GTM（获取客户）和奖金
description: Pond is the market infrastructure for the new startup economy. Verified founders raise capital, acquire customers, and access 20,000+ contributors in one place. · Markets: Stripe-verified metrics + Vault-protected funding. One startup raised $150K in 3 minutes. · Bounties: 10,000+ submissions, $36K+ distributed. Ethereum Foundation, GPTZero, PhotoBase. · AI Growth Agent: CRM, pipeline, and GTM on autopilot. 400+ startups · 154 countries · Archetype & Coinbase Ventures.
description_zh: Pond是新创经济体的市场基础设施。经过验证的创始人可以在此筹集资金、获取客户，并访问20,000多名贡献者。· 市场：Stripe验证的指标+ Vault保护的融资。一家初创公司在3分钟内筹集了15万美元。· 赏金：10,000多份提交，分配了36,000多美元。以太坊基金会、GPTZero、PhotoBase。· AI增长代理：客户关系管理（CRM）、渠道和自动化的GTM。400多家初创公司·154个国家·Archetype和Coinbase Ventures。

name: Brief
tagline: Navigate your agents to product-market fit
tagline_zh: 引导你的代理团队实现产品与市场的契合
description: AI agents can ship quickly, but without the right product context, they're often flying blind. Brief gives product teams a living source of truth that captures decisions, preserves product intent, and serves relevant context to humans and agents through chat, Slack, CLI, and MCP. It keeps strategy, decisions, and execution connected from vision to impact.
description_zh: 人工智能（AI）代理可以快速配送，但如果没有正确的产品上下文，它们往往会像盲人飞行一样。Brief为产品团队提供了一个生动的信息源，它能够捕捉决策、保留产品意图，并通过聊天、Slack、命令行界面（CLI）和MCP向人类和代理提供相关的上下文。它使策略、决策和执行从愿景到影响保持连贯。

name: WordPress 7.0
tagline: Introducing AI tools, new admin experience & design controls
tagline_zh: 引入人工智能工具，全新管理体验与设计控制
description: WordPress 7.0 marks the start of a new era, laying the foundation for AI across the WordPress experience. Greeting you with a modern, more intuitive dashboard, 7.0 introduces enhanced customization and development tools that inspire creativity and tap into endless potential. Whether you’re a creator, business owner or developer – WordPress 7.0 let’s you create in a way that is uniquely your own.
description_zh: WordPress 7.0 标志着新时代的开始，为人工智能在 WordPress 体验中的应用奠定了基础。7.0 版本以一个更现代、更直观的控制面板与您见面，并引入了增强的自定义和开发工具，激发创造力并挖掘无限潜力。无论您是创作者、企业主还是开发者，WordPress 7.0 都让您能够以独特的方式创作。

name: Franz 6
tagline: All your messaging apps in one window — with private AI
tagline_zh: 所有消息应用汇聚一窗——配备私人AI
description: WhatsApp, Slack, Signal, Telegram, Gmail, Outlook and 75+ services in one fast desktop app — no more juggling ten browser tabs. Franz 6 adds a built-in AI assistant that summarizes long chats, transcribes voice notes, triages your inbox and drafts replies — all on-device, so your conversations stay private (EU-hosted Cloud optional). 1M+ downloads. Free, cross-platform, made in Vienna. Winner: Product Hunt Golden Kitty, Desktop App of the Year 2016.
description_zh: WhatsApp、Slack、Signal、Telegram、Gmail、Outlook以及75+种服务，尽在一款快捷的桌面应用中——再也不用在十个浏览器标签页之间切换。Franz 6新增内置AI助手，可总结长篇聊天内容、转录语音笔记、分类整理收件箱并起草回复——所有操作均在设备上完成，确保您的对话私密（可选择欧盟托管的云服务）。下载量超过100万。免费、跨平台、维也纳制造。荣获2016年Product Hunt金猫奖——年度最佳桌面应用。

name: Midjourney Scanner
tagline: 60 second ultrasound-based full-body scanner that beats MRI
tagline_zh: 60秒超声波全身扫描仪，优于核磁共振成像
description: Midjourney Medical is reimagining health scanning. Step into a shallow pool of warm, golden light and a ring of sensors uses gentle sound waves to map your body in detail—in about 60 seconds. No radiation, no stress. It pairs with the Midjourney Spa: a relaxing place with hot tubs, saunas, and cold plunges where the scan is just a side effect. Go often, build a rich library of health data over time, and catch things early. Affordable, casual body imaging for everyone.
description_zh: Midjourney Medical正在重新构想健康扫描的方式。只需踏入一个充满温暖金色光线的浅水池中，一圈传感器就会利用温和的声波详细绘制你的身体地图——大约60秒即可完成。无辐射，无压力。它与Midjourney Spa相辅相成：一个配备热水浴缸、桑拿房和冷水浴池的放松场所，在这里，扫描只是附带的服务。经常光顾，随着时间的推移，你就能建立一个丰富的健康数据图书馆，及早发现问题。为每个人提供经济实惠、轻松随意的身体成像服务。

name: PeakRoutine
tagline: Personalized health coaching powered by your biomarkers
tagline_zh: 基于您的生物标志物的个性化健康指导
description: PeakRoutine connects your sleep, sunlight, exercise, calories, nutrition, mood, hydration, and more — correlates them against each other — then tells you exactly what it means for your body. No generic plans. Just a proactive AI coach that learns your biology and builds habits around it.
description_zh: PeakRoutine将您的睡眠、阳光、锻炼、卡路里、营养、情绪、水分摄入等联系起来——并分析它们之间的相互关系——然后告诉您这些因素对您的身体究竟意味着什么。没有通用的计划。只有一个积极主动的人工智能教练，它会了解您的生理状况，并据此培养您的习惯。

name: Google Antigravity CLI
tagline: Run coding agents directly from your terminal
tagline_zh: 直接从终端运行编码代理
description: Antigravity CLI brings multi-step reasoning, multi-file editing, tool calling, and persistent history to the terminal. Optimised for SSH sessions and keyboard-first workflows. For developers who live in the command line.
description_zh: Antigravity CLI 为终端带来了多步骤推理、多文件编辑、工具调用和持久历史记录功能。它针对 SSH 会话和键盘优先的工作流程进行了优化。适合那些习惯使用命令行的开发者。

name: Quartz
tagline: AI email client built for focus. Runs locally on your Mac
tagline_zh: 专为专注而打造的AI电子邮件客户端。可在Mac本地运行
description: Quartz turns Gmail into a focused inbox. It sorts every message by importance, and learns what matters to you over time. When you reply, it drafts in your own voice. And the AI runs entirely on your own Mac, so your mail stays end-to-end encrypted and never shared with AI providers.
description_zh: Quartz将Gmail转变为一个专注的收件箱。它会根据重要性对每封邮件进行分类，并随着时间的推移了解对你而言重要的内容。当你回复邮件时，它会以你自己的语气起草回复。而且，该人工智能完全运行在你自己的Mac上，因此你的邮件保持端到端的加密状态，绝不会与人工智能提供商共享。

name: MAI-Image-2.5
tagline: Generate and edit images with precise scene control
tagline_zh: 通过精确的场景控制来生成和编辑图像
description: MAI-Image-2.5 is a text-to-image and image editing model that handles localized edits, identity preservation, and text rendering. Available via Foundry and OpenRouter for developers building production image workflows.
description_zh: MAI-Image-2.5是一款文本到图像和图像编辑模型，能够处理局部编辑、保持身份特征和文本渲染。开发者可通过Foundry和OpenRouter构建生产图像工作流程。

name: Daemons by Charlie Labs
tagline: Keep PRs, issues, CI, and docs moving with AI agents
tagline_zh: 利用人工智能代理，保持PRs、issues、CI和文档的持续更新
description: Charlie Labs gives engineering teams always-on AI daemons that keep work moving after coding agents create it. Define recurring roles in your repo, then let Daemons monitor PRs, issues, CI, docs, and Sentry errors over time. Instead of waiting for another human prompt, Daemons leave reviewable updates where your team already works: GitHub, Linear, Slack, and Sentry.
description_zh: Charlie Labs 为工程团队提供持续运行的人工智能守护进程，在编码代理创建工作后，这些守护进程能够保持工作持续进行。在您的仓库中定义重复出现的角色，然后让守护进程随时间监控拉取请求（PR）、问题、持续集成（CI）、文档和 Sentry 错误。守护进程无需等待其他人的提示，而是将可审查的更新留在您的团队已经工作的平台：GitHub、Linear、Slack 和 Sentry。

name: Elvin
tagline: Proactive AI that finds and finishes work before you ask
tagline_zh: 主动式人工智能，在你开口之前就发现并完成工作
description: Stop acting as the routing layer between AI and your actual work. Elvin is proactive AI that finds coordination work across your tools, handles the messy multi-step parts, and asks before taking action. It turns scattered context from messages, meetings, docs, and task tools into ready-to-approve drafts, follow-ups, updates, and next steps.
description_zh: 别再充当AI和你实际工作之间的路由层了。Elvin是一款主动式AI，能在你的各种工具间寻找协同工作，处理复杂的多步骤任务，并在行动前先征询你的意见。它将来自消息、会议、文档和任务工具的零散上下文信息转化为待批准的草稿、跟进信息、更新内容和后续步骤。

name: Agent A by Ahrefs
tagline: The AI Marketing Agent Powered by Ahrefs Data
tagline_zh: 由Ahrefs数据驱动的AI营销助手
description: Meet Agent A — the AI agent built on Ahrefs' industry-leading dataset of 170T+ indexed pages. Analyzes, builds, and acts on marketing insights so you can focus on strategy.
description_zh: 认识一下Agent A——这款人工智能助手基于Ahrefs行业领先的170万亿+索引页面数据集构建而成。它能够分析、构建营销洞察并据此采取行动，让您专注于制定战略。

name: TabTasker
tagline: Zero servers. Total privacy. Your new favorite toolbox.
tagline_zh: 零服务器。完全隐私。您的新宠工具箱。
description: A free web toolbox running 100% offline in your browser. We built TabTasker so you can edit PDFs, process images, transcribe audio, and access 50+ utilities without uploading a single file. Lastly, it is free to use.
description_zh: 一个在浏览器中100%离线运行的免费网络工具箱。我们开发了TabTasker，这样您无需上传任何文件，即可编辑PDF、处理图像、转录音频，并使用50多种实用工具。最后，它完全免费。

name: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
tagline: Latest audio model for live speech-to-speech translation
tagline_zh: 最新的实时语音到语音翻译音频模型
description: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate brings near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate and Google Meet.
description_zh: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate 为 Google AI Studio、Google Translate 和 Google Meet 带来了近乎实时的自然语音翻译功能。

name: tweet.md
tagline: X posts as clean Markdown
tagline_zh: X 篇帖子，格式为简洁的 Markdown 格式
description: Get any X post or thread as clean Markdown for LLMs, agents, and research. Swap x.com for tweet.md or use the API.
description_zh: 获取任何X帖子或主题，以纯净的Markdown格式供大型语言模型（LLMs）、代理和研究使用。将x.com替换为tweet.md或使用API。

name: Prometheus by Firecrawl
tagline: A Forward Deployed Agent for web data.
tagline_zh: 一个用于网络数据的前沿部署代理。
description: An experimental Forward Deployed Agent for web data from Firecrawl. Describe the web data you need and it writes Firecrawl code to collect it. Run it yourself or let us host and automatically maintain it as pages change.
description_zh: Firecrawl 提供的用于网络数据的实验性前沿部署代理。描述您需要的网络数据，它会编写 Firecrawl 代码来收集这些数据。您可以自行运行，也可以让我们托管并随着页面变化自动维护。

name: agmsg
tagline: Stop copy-pasting between your AI coding agents
tagline_zh: 停止在AI编码代理之间进行复制粘贴
description: Stop being the copy-paste relay between your AI coding agents. agmsg lets Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and Copilot CLI message each other directly through a shared SQLite database — no daemon, no network, no Python. Just bash + sqlite3, installed as an Agent Skill. Unlike built-in subagents (single-vendor, ephemeral) or MCP (an agent calling tools), agmsg is vendor-agnostic and persistent. Run several agents — even multiple Claude Code instances — in one room, working together.
description_zh: 别再充当你的AI编码代理之间的复制粘贴中转站了。agmsg让Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI和Copilot CLI通过一个共享的SQLite数据库直接相互通信——无需守护进程、无需网络、无需Python。只需安装bash + sqlite3作为代理技能即可。与内置的子代理（单一供应商，临时性）或MCP（代理调用工具）不同，agmsg不受供应商限制且具有持久性。你可以在一个空间内运行多个代理——甚至是多个Claude Code实例——它们可以协同工作。

name: Replicas
tagline: Run Claude Code and Codex in the cloud
tagline_zh: 在云端运行Claude Code和Codex
description: Run background coding agents from anywhere. Spawn Claude Code or Codex in a VM with code and tooling ready to go. Hand off tasks from Slack, Linear, or GitHub Replicas runs Claude Code, Codex, or any coding agent in the cloud. Agents run in isolated VMs with real dev environments, and you can bring your own subscriptions and API keys. Trigger tasks from Slack, Linear, or GitHub and come back to a PR ready to review.
description_zh: 随时随地运行后台编码代理。在虚拟机（VM）中生成Claude Code或Codex，代码和工具准备就绪。通过Slack、Linear或GitHub Replicas分配任务。在云中运行Claude Code、Codex或任何编码代理。代理在具有真实开发环境的隔离虚拟机中运行，您可以携带自己的订阅和API密钥。从Slack、Linear或GitHub触发任务，然后返回一个准备审核的拉取请求（PR）。

name: iArt.ai
tagline: Turn ideas & designs into stunning video/animation.
tagline_zh: 将创意和设计转化为令人惊叹的视频/动画。
description: A faster agent delivers promos/shorts, explainers, kinetic type and PRO motion graphics with audio. Ditch AE/PR/CapCut. Chat to refine and ship impact.
description_zh: 更高效的代理能够提供带有音频的宣传片/短视频、解说、动态字体和PRO动态图形。无需AE/PR/CapCut。通过聊天来优化并实现影响力。

name: CrustRecruiter
tagline: Turn Claude into a recruiter that thinks like you
tagline_zh: 让克劳德成为一个像你一样思考的招聘人员
description: Recruiting is half judgment, half grunt work. Claude brings the judgment, i.e. the reasoning and the memory, while Crustdata brings 800M+ candidate profiles and 5 recruiting skills via MCP, meaning the manual work runs itself and you get genuinely personalized recruiting at scale, all inside one chat.
description_zh: 招聘工作一半是判断，一半是繁琐的工作。克劳德（Claude）负责判断，即推理和记忆，而Crustdata则通过MCP带来超过8亿份候选人资料和5项招聘技能，这意味着手动工作可以自行运行，你只需通过一次聊天就能获得真正大规模的个性化招聘服务。

name: iPromise
tagline: Bring "Body Doubling" to your Mac notch
tagline_zh: 将“Body Doubling”功能引入你的Mac缺口
description: Freedom kills focus. iPromise is a new deep work protocol built on the principle of Body Doubling, the idea that having a "witness" boosts accountability. // Your AI Buddy lives elegantly in your Mac notch. It understands your active window’s context. When you drift into distractions, it gently nudges you back. // Make a promise. Your buddy helps you keep it.
description_zh: 自由会消磨专注力。iPromise是一种基于“身体陪伴”原则的新型深度工作协议，该原则认为有“见证人”会增强责任感。//你的AI伙伴优雅地存在于你的Mac状态栏中。它能理解你当前活动窗口的上下文。当你分心时，它会温柔地提醒你。//许下一个承诺。你的伙伴会帮助你坚守承诺。

name: Coworker AI
tagline: More AI for less spend with context-aware model routing
tagline_zh: 通过上下文感知模型路由，以更少的支出获得更多的人工智能
description: Same AI. 5x the tokens. Coworker provides deep company context and automatically routes to the right model for every task. More chat, cowork and code with the same spend.
description_zh: 同样的AI技术，5倍的令牌数量。同事提供深入的公司背景信息，并自动为每项任务选择合适的模型。同样的投入，可实现更多的聊天、协作和编码。

name: Buffer API
tagline: One API to publish across every social platform.
tagline_zh: 一个API，即可发布到所有社交平台。
description: Buffer's API lets you publish and manage content across 11 social platforms through a single endpoint. Connect it to AI assistants, no-code automation tools, or build full custom integrations. Ships with an MCP server, pre-built automation templates, a CLI, and an interactive API explorer. Available on every Buffer plan, including Free.
description_zh: Buffer的API允许您通过单一端点在11个社交平台上发布和管理内容。您可以将其连接到AI助手、无代码自动化工具，或构建完整的自定义集成。该产品附带一个MCP服务器、预构建的自动化模板、一个命令行界面（CLI）和一个交互式API资源管理器。所有Buffer计划（包括免费计划）均提供此功能。

name: Paste MCP & AI Tools
tagline: Infinite clipboard for Claude, Codex and other AI tools
tagline_zh: 适用于Claude、Codex和其他AI工具的无限剪贴板
description: Privacy-first, lightning fast, searchable, and avaialbe across all devices. Save snippets, sync securely, and boost productivity with smart shortcuts and instant paste history.
description_zh: 隐私优先，速度如闪电，可搜索，且跨所有设备可用。保存片段，安全同步，并通过智能快捷方式和即时粘贴历史记录提高生产力。

name: MCP Bridge by Appfactor
tagline: Connect any API to any AI agent
tagline_zh: 将任何API连接到任何AI代理
description: Point MCP Bridge at any REST, GraphQL, SOAP, or gRPC API. It auto-generates MCP tool definitions with typed schemas, auth, rate limiting, and response processing. Your LLM agents call enterprise APIs through one standard interface.
description_zh: 在任何REST、GraphQL、SOAP或gRPC API上接入MCP桥接。它能够自动生成带有类型化模式、身份验证、速率限制和响应处理的MCP工具定义。您的LLM代理通过一个标准接口调用企业API。

name: Hermes Desktop
tagline: The agent that grows with you
tagline_zh: 与你共同成长的代理
description: Hermes Desktop — the open-source agent that grows with you, now a native app for macOS, Windows, and Linux. By Nous Research.
description_zh: Hermes Desktop——这款开源代理软件，可随您一同成长，现已推出适用于macOS、Windows和Linux的原生应用。由Nous Research开发。

name: Firecrawl Research Index
tagline: An index for agents pushing the frontier of AI/ML research
tagline_zh: 推动人工智能/机器学习研究前沿的代理指标
description: AI/ML research moves fast, and the work that matters is split between new papers and the code that implements them. Most search providers omit or misrank key papers, leaving you to review sources by hand without ever being sure you've caught everything. So we built an index for it. Firecrawl's index includes all 3M+ arXiv papers, as well as GitHub artifacts from top research repos, refreshed daily so agents always stay current.
description_zh: 人工智能/机器学习（AI/ML）研究进展迅速，而真正重要的工作既包括发表新论文，也包括实现这些论文的代码。大多数搜索提供商会遗漏或错误排序关键论文，导致您不得不手动审查资源，却无法确保自己已经掌握了所有信息。因此，我们为此构建了一个索引。Firecrawl的索引涵盖了所有300多万篇arXiv论文，以及来自顶级研究存储库的GitHub工件，并且每天都会更新，以确保代理始终保持最新状态。

name: Openstatus MCP Health Checker
tagline: Test MCP servers like a real AI client, not just a ping
tagline_zh: 像真正的AI客户端一样测试MCP服务器，而不仅仅是进行ping测试
description: Most monitors just send an HTTP ping. But a 200 OK is useless if the JSON-RPC handshake fails. Our tool is different because it performs a true protocol-level check, acting exactly like a real AI client. Key features: Full Handshake: Executes the spec-defined initialize, ping, and tools/list sequence. Deep Visibility: Inspect exact JSON-RPC payloads and negotiated versions. Smart Auth: Parses RFC 9728 headers on 401s to surface exact token requirements.
description_zh: 大多数监控工具只是发送HTTP ping请求。但如果JSON-RPC握手失败，200 OK响应就毫无用处。我们的工具与众不同，因为它会执行真正的协议级检查，表现得就像一个真正的AI客户端。主要功能包括：完整握手：执行规范定义的初始化、ping和tools/list序列。深度可见性：检查确切的JSON-RPC有效负载和协商版本。智能认证：解析401状态码上的RFC 9728头，以明确显示确切的令牌要求。

name: Slideshot
tagline: Product demo videos, recorded by your AI agent
tagline_zh: 由您的AI代理录制的产品演示视频
description: Give your AI agent a product flow to record. Slideshot drives your web app through MCP, captures the walkthrough, and returns a polished demo video and GIF with zooms, cursor motion, and custom intro animation. No manual recording or editing.
description_zh: 为你的AI代理提供一个产品流程进行录制。Slideshot通过MCP驱动你的网页应用，捕捉操作流程，并返回一个经过润色的演示视频和GIF，其中包含缩放、光标移动和自定义的介绍动画。无需手动录制或编辑。

name: Bluerails Discovery
tagline: The rails AI agents use to find and pay you
tagline_zh: 铁路AI代理用于寻找并支付您的费用
description: Most "AI visibility" tools stop at telling you if AI mentions your brand. Bluerails goes further. We make you discoverable to AI agents and ready to get paid by them, on the rails we already run for marketplaces. What stands out: • Discovery: a peer-reviewed AI-visibility score from 400 samples, not a one-off guess. Free, no signup. • Agent-ready checkout + global settlement • Compliance built in Try your free Discovery report today; agent payments roll out next.
description_zh: 大多数“AI可见性”工具仅限于告知你AI是否提及了你的品牌。而Bluerails更进一步。我们使你在AI代理中可被发现，并准备好通过他们获得收益，这一切都在我们已为市场运行的轨道上实现。其独特之处在于：• 发现：基于400个样本的同行评审AI可见性评分，而非一次性猜测。免费，无需注册。• 代理就绪结账+全球结算 • 内置合规性 今天就尝试你的免费发现报告；代理支付功能即将推出。

name: Alai 2.0
tagline: AI design partner for presentations, social posts, and more
tagline_zh: 演示文稿、社交帖子等内容的AI设计合作伙伴
description: Alai captures every little detail about your brand in a design system. Use it to create presentations, social assets, ads, or any canvas size, all perfectly on-brand. Make precise edits manually or with AI. And choose your own AI models to balance cost, quality, and latency.
description_zh: Alai在设计系统中捕捉到关于您品牌的每一个细节。利用它来创建演示文稿、社交媒体素材、广告，或任何尺寸的画布，所有内容都完美地符合品牌风格。您可以手动或使用AI进行精确编辑。同时，您可以选择自己的AI模型来平衡成本、质量和延迟。

name: Agent 37
tagline: Give every customer their own Hermes or OpenClaw agent
tagline_zh: 为每位客户分配专属的Hermes或OpenClaw客服代表
description: Agent 37 is managed hosting for persistent agents like Hermes, OpenClaw and ClaudeCode. So you don't need to run them on Mac minis or VPS yourself. One API call gives each of your customers their own always-on agent, from $3.44/mo. Founders use it to ship vertical agents to their own clients without babysitting servers.
description_zh: Agent 37 是为 Hermes、OpenClaw 和 ClaudeCode 等持久代理提供托管服务的平台。因此，您无需自己在 Mac mini 或 VPS 上运行它们。只需一次 API 调用，即可为您的每位客户提供各自专属的永久在线代理，起价每月 3.44 美元。创始人使用它向自己的客户交付垂直代理，而无需照看服务器。

name: Build Club Campus
tagline: Virtual AI School: Upskill in AI and Become Great at it Fast
tagline_zh: 虚拟人工智能学校：提升人工智能技能，快速成为高手
description: Build Club Campus is a fun, gamified and community-driven virtual AI school for learning AI by building with it. Static courses get old fast in AI, so Campus helps you stay current through bite-sized courses, real projects, role-based use cases and community templates that evolve with the tools. Earn certifications in OpenAI, Claude, Copilot and more, and become great at AI fast - for work, startups or side hustles. It’s 100% free, as part of our mission to enable anyone to build with AI.
description_zh: Build Club Campus是一所充满乐趣、游戏化且由社区驱动的虚拟人工智能学校，旨在通过动手构建来学习人工智能。在人工智能领域，静态课程很快就会过时，因此Campus通过随工具发展而更新的小课程、真实项目、基于角色的用例和社区模板，帮助您保持最新状态。您可以在OpenAI、Claude、Copilot等平台获得认证，并快速掌握人工智能技能——无论是为了工作、创业还是副业。它是100%免费的，这是我们使命的一部分，即让任何人都能用人工智能进行构建。

name: AppWizzy
tagline: Rent a private VM with Codex to build production apps
tagline_zh: 使用Codex租用私有虚拟机来构建生产级应用
description: AppWizzy gives you a private VM with Codex installed where you build, run, and host production web apps by chatting with AI. Your code is yours, the workspace persists, and the app lives in the same environment where it was created. Pay only for AI usage, hosting days, and optional templates
description_zh: AppWizzy为您提供了一个安装了Codex的私有虚拟机（VM），您可以在其中通过与人工智能（AI）交互来构建、运行和托管生产Web应用程序。您的代码归您所有，工作区会持续存在，应用程序会一直运行在创建它的相同环境中。您只需为AI使用、托管天数和可选模板付费

name: Android 17
tagline: Android becomes an intelligence system
tagline_zh: 安卓成为一种智能系统
description: Android 17 brings AppFunctions, Android MCP, adaptive-first app requirements, App Bubbles, Continue On, stronger privacy controls, memory limits, performance improvements, and new media/camera APIs as Android starts shifting from an operating system into an intelligence system.
description_zh: 随着Android开始从操作系统向智能系统转变，Android 17带来了AppFunctions、Android MCP、自适应优先的应用要求、应用气泡、继续操作、更强的隐私控制、内存限制、性能改进以及新的媒体/相机API。

name: Tiny CV
tagline: Resume builder that fits on one page
tagline_zh: 一页纸大小的简历模板
description: Tiny CV turns markdown into one-page resumes that look right as PDFs and clean public links.
