Every audit also scores mobile UX, SEO, and your AI search visibility (AEO, GEO & LLMs.txt) so you show up in ChatGPT Search and Google AI Overviews. Share reports via link or PDF. Start free — no consultant fees, no waiting weeks.
description_zh: Smart CRO Agent是您在Shopify上的AI转化顾问。只需将其指向任何页面——主页、产品系列、产品或CMS——大约30秒内，它就会使用5个经过验证的CRO框架，根据收入影响，为您返回一个按优先级排序、适合开发人员的行动计划。每次审核还会对移动端用户体验、搜索引擎优化以及您的AI搜索可见性（AEO、GEO和LLMs.txt）进行评分，以便您在ChatGPT搜索和Google AI概览中脱颖而出。您可以通过链接或PDF分享报告。免费开始——无需咨询费，无需等待数周。

name: TextShape
tagline: Word art that fills any shape - free, exact, private
tagline_zh: 可填充任意形状的文字艺术——自由、精确、个性
description: Turn your words into art that fills any shape - a heart, an animal, a logo or your own uploaded photo. TextShape places every word precisely to trace the silhouette, and because it's deterministic (not AI), you stay in control: same input, same result. It runs entirely in your browser, so nothing's uploaded. Free, no signup, no watermarks. Gradients, palettes, word-cloud packing, custom fonts. Export PNG, vector SVG with a Cricut/Silhouette cut mode, or an animated reveal - then put it on merch.
description_zh: 将你的文字转化为艺术，填充任何形状——一颗心、一只动物、一个标志或你上传的自己的照片。TextShape能精确地放置每个单词以勾勒出轮廓，而且由于它是确定性的（非人工智能），你始终掌握着控制权：相同的输入，相同的结果。它完全在你的浏览器中运行，因此无需上传任何内容。免费、无需注册、无水印。渐变、调色板、词云打包、自定义字体。导出PNG、带Cricut/Silhouette切割模式的矢量SVG，或动画展示——然后将其应用于商品上。

name: DealLock AI
tagline: Smart Marketplace Meetup Booking
tagline_zh: 智能市场聚会预约
description: DealLock AI helps Facebook Marketplace and local sellers turn photos into ready-to-post listings, share a pickup booking link, and reduce back-and-forth with buyers. Sellers set available pickup times, buyers book a slot, and firm-price protection helps keep “firm” prices firm.
description_zh: DealLock AI助力Facebook Marketplace和本地卖家将照片转化为即刻可发布的商品清单，分享取货预约链接，并减少与买家的反复沟通。卖家设定可用的取货时间，买家预约取货时段，而固定价格保护则有助于保持“固定”价格的稳定性。

name: Rapha Protocol
tagline: Compute moves. Patient data stays
tagline_zh: 计算动作。患者数据保持不变
description: Rapha Protocol is a zero-trust, compute-to-data edge network for clinical AI. Instead of exporting raw patient records and risking massive GDPR/HIPAA liabilities, Rapha routes AI models into air-gapped hardware enclaves directly inside hospital server rooms. Models train locally, and only anonymized weights leave. Key features include Intel SGX/TDX isolation, Policy-as-Code compliance enforcement, and immutable Zero-Knowledge (ZK-SNARK) audit receipts anchored on Polygon Mainnet.
description_zh: Rapha协议是一个面向临床人工智能的零信任、计算到数据的边缘网络。Rapha不会导出原始患者记录，从而避免承担《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）和《健康保险流通与责任法案》（HIPAA）规定的巨额责任，而是将人工智能模型直接导入医院服务器机房内的气隙硬件隔离区。模型在本地进行训练，只有经过匿名处理的权重才会离开。其主要特点包括英特尔SGX/TDX隔离、策略即代码（Policy-as-Code）合规性执行，以及锚定在Polygon主网上的不可篡改的零知识（ZK-SNARK）审计收据。

name: Stylus
tagline: Rich, on-brand HTML emails built with Claude
tagline_zh: 用Claude构建的丰富且符合品牌调性的HTML电子邮件
description: Most email tools give you a template editor. Stylus is a skill file you upload to a Claude Project. Claude reads it once and knows your entire design system — components, brand tokens, gradients, copy rules. Describe any email you need, get ready-to-send HTML back. Three themes at launch: Pitch, Grove, Axiom (SaaS). Works with most ESP.
description_zh: 大多数电子邮件工具都提供一个模板编辑器。而Stylus是一个技能文件，你需要将其上传到Claude项目中。Claude读取一次后，就能了解你的整个设计系统——组件、品牌标识、渐变、复制规则。描述你需要的任何电子邮件，就能得到可直接发送的HTML。发布时包含三个主题：Pitch、Grove、Axiom（SaaS）。适用于大多数电子邮件服务提供商（ESP）。

name: Ship Space
tagline: Agent Developing Ecosystem
tagline_zh: 代理开发生态系统
description: ShipSpace is the agent development environment for builders shipping with AI. Run Claude, Codex, Gemini, and Cursor side by side in one workspace with up to 16 agents in parallel. Ship Agent orchestrates your swarm, while a built-in browser, IDE, GitHub integration, and drag-and-drop terminals keep everything in one window. Spin up multi-agent workspaces in under a second. Built by MSH.Tech. Built by agents. Built for builders. Ship faster. 🚀
description_zh: ShipSpace是面向人工智能航运建设者的代理开发环境。您可以在一个工作区中并行运行多达16个代理，同时运行Claude、Codex、Gemini和Cursor。Ship Agent负责编排您的集群，而内置的浏览器、集成开发环境（IDE）、GitHub集成和拖放式终端则将所有内容整合到一个窗口中。不到一秒即可启动多代理工作区。由MSH.Tech打造。由代理构建。为建设者而生。更快地启航。

name: CartAI Upsell
tagline: AI post-purchase upsells with combined shipping
tagline_zh: AI结合配送进行售后追加销售
description: CartAI Upsell helps Shopify merchants turn completed orders into a second sale. It matches each purchase with a relevant accessory, writes a personalized follow-up email, and gives the customer a one-click draft order link so the add-on can ship with the original order. Merchants control the accessory catalog and AI tone, while the dashboard tracks sends, conversions, revenue, and the full email audit trail.
description_zh: CartAI Upsell助力Shopify商家将已完成的订单转化为二次销售。它为每笔购买匹配相关配件，撰写个性化的跟进邮件，并为客户提供一键生成订单草稿的链接，以便附加商品与原始订单一起发货。商家可控制配件目录和AI语气，而控制面板则可追踪发送情况、转化率、收入以及完整的邮件审核记录。

name: Atlas
tagline: Trading built for the everyday investor
tagline_zh: 专为普通投资者打造的交易平台
description: Atlas is a unified trading platform with a built-in smart AI layer called Glob. Glob analyzes tokens and stocks, constructs and executes trading strategies, and supports backtesting before deployment. Glob can trade on your behalf with different strategies such as following breaking news, SMA, and The platform covers all major asset classes: 20,000+ tokens across 90+ networks, 260+ stocks, perpetuals, and 5,000+ prediction markets.
description_zh: Atlas是一个统一的交易平台，内置了一个名为Glob的智能AI层。Glob能够分析代币和股票，构建并执行交易策略，并在部署前支持回测。Glob能够以不同的策略代您进行交易，例如追踪突发新闻、采用移动平均线（SMA）策略等。该平台涵盖所有主要资产类别：来自90多个网络的20,000多种代币、260多种股票、永续合约以及5,000多个预测市场。

name: RootNous
tagline: Foundational Intelligence
tagline_zh: 基础智能
description: Research and Development in Artificial Intelligence and related fields, Leading research organization advancing AI technology through cutting-edge research, publications, patents and innovative software solutions.
description_zh: 人工智能及相关领域的研究与开发，一家领先的研究机构，通过前沿研究、出版物、专利和创新软件解决方案推动人工智能技术的发展。

name: Remote Prop View
tagline: Dallas Fort-Worth property intelligence platform
tagline_zh: 达拉斯-沃斯堡房地产情报平台
description: Competitors show you a price. We show you what it is actually like to live there. Remote Prop View is an AI property intelligence platform that compiles 45+ hyperlocal signals per Dallas-Fort Worth address, fusing listing data, public records, crime, school, commute, environmental and fraud intelligence into a single verified profile. The kind of depth no national portal will build, because they are not built to win one metro. We are. 200 DFW cities. One verified intelligence layer.
description_zh: 竞争对手只给你看价格。而我们则让你亲身体验居住在那里的真实感受。Remote Prop View是一个人工智能房产智能平台，它为达拉斯-沃斯堡地区的每个地址汇集了45个以上的超本地化信号，将房源数据、公共记录、犯罪情况、学校、通勤、环境和欺诈情报融合成一个经过验证的档案。这种深度是任何全国性门户网站都无法构建的，因为它们并不是为了赢得一个都会区而建立的。而我们，则致力于此。200个达拉斯-沃斯堡城市。一个经过验证的情报层。

name: Tesseract: AI Math Solver
tagline: Snap & Get Video Explanation
tagline_zh: 拍摄并获取视频说明
description: When students get stuck, they're stuck choosing between text-step apps (Photomath, ChatGPT) that build no intuition, or generic YouTube lectures made for everyone — not their exact question. Tesseract turns any question into a personalized, animated video explanation — narrated and drawn out step by step, the way the best 1-on-1 tutor would explain it. Generated for your problem, in seconds. Live worldwide on the App Store. We're shipping, not pitching.
description_zh: 当学生遇到难题时，他们要么选择无法培养直觉的文本步骤应用程序（如Photomath、ChatGPT），要么选择面向所有人、却无法针对他们具体问题的通用YouTube讲座。Tesseract则能将任何问题转化为个性化的动画视频讲解——一步步叙述和演示，就像最好的一对一辅导老师所做的那样。针对你的问题，几秒钟内即可生成。该应用已在App Store全球上线。我们提供的是产品，而非推销。

name: BidCopy
tagline: Win more freelance jobs with humanized AI proposals.
tagline_zh: 凭借人性化的AI提案，赢得更多自由职业工作。
description: BidCopy generates highly converting, personalized proposals for Upwork and other platforms. We automatically strip away generic AI jargon to make your cover letters sound 100% human, helping you stand out from the crowd and win more contracts.
description_zh: BidCopy为Upwork和其他平台生成高转化率的个性化提案。我们会自动剔除通用的人工智能术语，让您的求职信听起来100%像人类所写，帮助您脱颖而出，赢得更多合同。

name: Vibebattle
tagline: Prove you are the best vibecoders among your friends
tagline_zh: 证明你是朋友中最棒的vibecoder
description: Vibebattle is a 2-8 players vibecoding game. 2 modes: creative -> text subject reproduction -> website target You have X minutes and Y prompts then there is a voting round.
description_zh: Vibebattle是一款2至8人参与的vibecoding游戏。游戏设有两种模式：创意模式->文本主题再现模式->网站目标模式。您有X分钟的时间和Y个提示，之后将进入投票环节。

name: Lite Agent
tagline: Your Browser's new AI intern
tagline_zh: 你的浏览器新添的AI助手
description: Lite Agent is a privacy-first AI browser extension that clicks, types, remembers, and talks — all inside your browser.
description_zh: Lite Agent是一款以隐私保护为先的人工智能浏览器扩展程序，它能在您的浏览器内执行点击、输入、记忆和对话等操作。

name: RankLLM
tagline: Rank Higher in ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude & Perplexity
tagline_zh: 在ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude和困惑度方面排名更高
description: RankLLM helps brands monitor AI visibility, track citations, and get cited in ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity answers.
description_zh: RankLLM帮助品牌监控人工智能的可见度，追踪引用情况，并在ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude和Perplexity的回答中被引用。

name: n8n Freelance Autopilot
tagline: AI job hunter that finds freelance work 24/7 while you sleep
tagline_zh: AI求职助手，在你睡觉时全天候为你寻找自由职业工作
description: Tired of checking Upwork daily? n8n Autopilot finds jobs 24/7, scores with AI, generates proposals in 3 languages, sends to Telegram. • Scans Upwork, Malt, Freelancer every 30 min • AI scores jobs 0-100 by your skills • Generates proposals in 3 languages • Sends alerts to Telegram • A/B tests proposals • Weekly reports 💰 €15 one-time • €5/month APIs • No SaaS Self-hosted on Raspberry Pi or VPS 📦 7 workflows • Setup guide • Lifetime updates Built by 17-year-old from Luxembourg 🇱🇺
description_zh: 厌倦了每天查看Upwork？n8n Autopilot全天候自动查找工作，通过AI评分，生成3种语言的提案，并发送到Telegram。• 每30分钟扫描Upwork、Malt、Freelancer一次 • AI根据您的技能对工作进行0-100评分 • 生成3种语言的提案 • 向Telegram发送提醒 • 对提案进行A/B测试 • 每周报告 💰 一次性15欧元 • API每月5欧元 • 非SaaS，自行托管于Raspberry Pi或VPS 📦 7种工作流程 • 设置指南 • 终身更新 由卢森堡17岁少年开发 🇱🇺

name: My Next Body
tagline: All-in-one fitness coaching: sport, nutrition & mindset
tagline_zh: 全能健身指导：运动、营养与心态
description: Most fitness apps make you choose: train or eat well. My Next Body brings it all together. It's a French all-in-one coaching app where 4 AI coaches guide you across everything that actually matters: 🏋️ Martin — training, at home or in the gym, any level 🥗 Solène — nutrition & recipes, without restrictive diets 🧠 JB — mindset & motivation, so you actually stick with it ❤️ Gabriela — health, recovery & injury prevention
description_zh: 大多数健身应用程序都让你在训练和饮食之间做出选择。而My Next Body则将这两者完美结合。这是一款法国的一站式健身指导应用程序，由四位人工智能教练指导你完成所有真正重要的事项：🏋️ Martin——训练，无论是在家还是在健身房，适合任何水平的人 🥗 Solène——营养与食谱，无限制饮食 🧠 JB——心态与动力，让你真正坚持下去 ❤️ Gabriela——健康、恢复与损伤预防

name: Gaplyze
tagline: Stop guessing. Start building what the market wants
tagline_zh: 别再瞎猜了。开始打造市场需要的产品吧
description: Gaplyze stands out by turning startup validation into a complete workflow, not just an idea generator. Start with a niche, idea, or competitor URL and receive demand signals, competitor gaps, pricing insights, underserved audiences, idea scoring, strategy maps, business blueprints, execution roadmaps, domain ratings, prompt packs, and investor-ready exports. All of this is designed to help founders validate faster and build smarter.
description_zh: Gaplyze的独特之处在于，它将初创企业验证转变为一个完整的工作流程，而不仅仅是一个创意生成器。从利基市场、创意或竞争对手的网址开始，您将收到需求信号、竞争对手缺口、定价洞察、未被充分服务的受众、创意评分、战略地图、商业蓝图、执行路线图、域名评级、提示包以及投资者准备就绪的导出文件。所有这些设计都是为了帮助创始人更快地进行验证，并更明智地进行构建。

name: TruStar Connect
tagline: All-in-one safety software, built for COR readiness.
tagline_zh: 专为COR就绪性打造的一体化安全软件。
description: TruStar Connect is an all-in-one safety and field operations platform that helps companies get and stay COR ready. It replaces paper and spreadsheets with one connected system for inspections and forms, field observations, incident investigations with AI assistance, hazard registers, corrective actions, training tracking, and equipment maintenance. Everything is backed by audit-grade records, role-based access, and analytics. Built by Canadian safety professionals. Free trial available.
description_zh: TruStar Connect是一个集安全与现场运营于一体的平台，可帮助企业实现并保持COR（合规、合规性、合规性）就绪状态。该平台用一个互联系统取代了纸质文件和电子表格，涵盖了检查与表格、现场观察、人工智能辅助的事故调查、危险登记、纠正措施、培训跟踪以及设备维护等功能。所有内容均以审计级记录、基于角色的访问权限和分析功能为支撑。该平台由加拿大安全专业人士打造，并提供免费试用。

name: Haystack
tagline: Get your brand recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity & Gemini.
tagline_zh: 让你的品牌获得ChatGPT、Perplexity和Gemini的推荐。
description: Ask ChatGPT for the best tool in your category. It names three companies. You're probably not one of them. Those names aren't random. The model is pulling from a handful of articles it trusts, and your competitors are in them. You're not. Haystack finds the exact prompts buyers use, the exact sources behind every answer, and the journalists who can get you into them. You send the pitch, we watch the engines until your name shows up. Run it free on your own domain.
description_zh: 向ChatGPT询问你所在领域的最佳工具。它会列出三家公司。你可能并不在其中。这些名字并非随机。该模型是从它信任的几篇文章中提取出来的，而你的竞争对手就在其中。但你不在。Haystack能找出买家使用的确切提示、每个答案背后的确切来源，以及能帮你获取这些信息的记者。你发送推销文案，我们监控引擎，直到你的名字出现。在你的域名上免费运行它。

name: OpenMed Labs
tagline: The Infrastructure Layer for Healthcare AI
tagline_zh: 医疗人工智能的基础设施层
description: OpenMed Labs helps healthcare researchers and AI teams build medical AI without moving raw patient data. It combines secure medical datasets with no-code model training and clinical simulation in one platform. Contributors also get transparent ownership and attribution for how their data is used.
description_zh: OpenMed Labs助力医疗研究人员和人工智能团队在不转移原始患者数据的情况下构建医疗人工智能。该平台将安全的医疗数据集、无代码模型训练和临床模拟功能集于一体。同时，数据贡献者对其数据的使用情况享有透明的所有权和归属权。

name: HealthBridge AI
tagline: A calm place to keep everyone's health, together.
tagline_zh: 一个能让大家共同保持健康、宁静的地方。
description: A beautiful, AI-powered healtHealthBridge AI is a calm, simple health companion for your phone. Add your medicines once and it keeps track of timing and dosage. Keep your family's blood groups, allergies, and emergency contacts in one place. Snap a photo of a prescription and it reads it for you. And when you have a health question at 2am, ask the built-in AI — it only talks health, nothing else. No clutter, no sign-up forms. Open it, and it remembers you.
description_zh: 一款美观、由人工智能驱动的健康助手——HealthBridge AI，是您手机上的贴心健康伴侣。只需添加一次您的药物信息，它就能记录服药时间和剂量。您还可以将家人的血型、过敏史和紧急联系人信息集中管理。只需拍下处方照片，它就能为您解读。如果您在凌晨2点有健康问题，只需询问内置的人工智能——它只谈健康，不谈其他。没有繁琐的操作，也没有注册表格。打开它，它就会记住您。

name: reAItro
tagline: Remote sprint retros your team shows up for
tagline_zh: 远程冲刺回顾会上，你的团队成员都到场了
description: reAItro is a free AI retrospective tool built for remote & distributed agile teams. Run real-time boards, let AI cluster the feedback and write the summary. action items, and warm up quiet rooms with 5 built-in team games. No credit card, no signup to join.
description_zh: reAItro是一款专为远程和分布式敏捷团队打造的免费人工智能回顾工具。运行实时板，让AI对反馈进行聚类并撰写总结、行动项，并通过5款内置团队游戏打破沉默。无需信用卡，无需注册即可加入。

name: Redvibe Multibrowser
tagline: multibrowser, saas, workspace, browser
tagline_zh: 多浏览器、SaaS、工作空间、浏览器
description: Multi-accounting browser with unlimited profiles and zero complex setup. Redvibe is designed to manage dozens of accounts on a single computer without complex setups and technical hassles. Manage clients, scale advertising campaigns, import accounts in bulk — the AI will automatically sort them into ready-made profiles. No limits or restrictions. Launch work accounts quickly, without a cluttered interface or long preparation.
description_zh: 多账户浏览器，无限账户配置，零复杂设置。Redvibe旨在管理单台计算机上的数十个账户，无需复杂设置和技术难题。管理客户、扩展广告活动、批量导入账户——人工智能会自动将它们分类到现成的账户配置中。无限制或约束。快速启动工作账户，无需杂乱的界面或漫长的准备。

name: MakerMetrics
tagline: An open-source analytics dashboard built for Etsy shops.
tagline_zh: 专为Etsy店铺打造的开源分析仪表板。
description: MakerMetrics is an analytics dashboard for Etsy sellers, without API access needed! Import the CSV exports Etsy already gives you and get what Etsy fails to give its sellers: a useful, mobile-friendly dashboard with insights, forecasting, and an ability to connect your own AI API key.
description_zh: MakerMetrics是Etsy卖家的分析仪表板，无需访问API！导入Etsy已经为您提供的CSV导出文件，即可获得Etsy未能为其卖家提供的东西：一个实用的、适合移动设备的仪表板，其中包含洞察、预测功能，并且能够连接您自己的AI API密钥。

name: Ruki
tagline: A Windows AI assistant you can teach and that does the work
tagline_zh: 一个你可以教导的Windows AI助手，它能帮你完成工作
description: A minimal Windows desktop AI assistant you can teach and that then does the work for you, under your supervision.
description_zh: 一个最小的Windows桌面AI助手，你可以对其进行训练，然后它会在你的监督下为你完成工作。

name: LearnPilot AI
tagline: The AI university that enforces mastery before you advance
tagline_zh: 在你进步之前，这所人工智能大学会先要求你掌握知识
description: LearnPilot AI is an AI university that enforces mastery. Type any skill → AI builds your personalized curriculum → study structured lessons with YouTube videos → pass quizzes to unlock next modules → fail → AI generates targeted revision → retry → pass all modules → take a final exam → graduate. No skipping. No passive watching. Actual mastery enforced. Built with Nuxt 4, Node.js, Groq AI, and YouTube API.
description_zh: LearnPilot AI是一所致力于掌握学习的AI大学。输入任何技能→AI为您构建个性化课程→通过YouTube视频学习结构化课程→通过测验解锁下一模块→失败→AI生成针对性复习材料→重试→通过所有模块→参加期末考试→毕业。不可跳过。不可被动观看。真正掌握学习。基于Nuxt 4、Node.js、Groq AI和YouTube API构建。

name: Scuter
tagline: Ad & product intelligence for e-commerce winners
tagline_zh: 电商赢家的广告与产品智能
description: Scruter is an all-in-one e-commerce intelligence platform. Search and analyze millions of live ads across Meta, TikTok and Pinterest, spy on competitors' shops, and uncover winning products before they go viral. Unlike single-platform ad spy tools, Scruter unifies ad research, shop intelligence and product discovery in one place with a shop tracking, email-flow capture, and a full public API + MCP + Chrome extension to research from anywhere.
description_zh: Scruter是一个一体化电子商务智能平台。它能够搜索并分析Meta、TikTok和Pinterest上数以百万计的实时广告，窥探竞争对手的店铺，并在爆红之前发现畅销产品。与单平台广告窥探工具不同，Scruter将广告研究、店铺情报和产品发现功能集于一体，并提供店铺跟踪、电子邮件流捕获以及完整的公共API + MCP + Chrome扩展程序，以便随时随地进行研究。

name: Zenhook
tagline: Webhook debugging and AI summaries for humans
tagline_zh: Webhook调试和面向人类的AI摘要
description: Stop reading raw JSON. ZenHook lets you create webhook endpoints, capture requests in real time, and instantly understand incoming events with AI-powered summaries. Search, filter, and organize webhook traffic to debug integrations faster and spend less time digging through payloads. Built for developers, automation engineers, and API integrators.
description_zh: 停止读取原始JSON。ZenHook可让您创建Webhook端点，实时捕获请求，并通过人工智能摘要即时了解传入事件。搜索、过滤和组织Webhook流量，以更快地调试集成，并减少在有效负载中挖掘的时间。专为开发人员、自动化工程师和API集成人员打造。

name: prospect flow
tagline: Find verified local business leads & launch multi-channel AI
tagline_zh: 寻找经过验证的本地商业线索，并启动多渠道人工智能
description: Scaling cold outreach is painful. You have to buy a scraper (like D7), a validation service (like ZeroBounce), an email sender (like Instantly), and a CRM. ProspectFlow.ai unifies the entire workflow into a single glassmorphic workspace: 📍 Google Maps Business Scraper: Search any niche and city instantly. 🛡️ Bounce Protection MX Check: Automatically verifies emails 📣 Multi-Channel Sequences: 🎯 Intelligent Lead Scoring: Instantly ranks leads
description_zh: 扩大冷推广规模是件痛苦的事。你必须购买一个爬虫工具（如D7）、一个验证服务（如ZeroBounce）、一个邮件发送工具（如Instantly）和一个客户关系管理（CRM）系统。ProspectFlow.ai将整个工作流程整合到一个单一的玻璃形态工作空间中：📍谷歌地图商业爬虫：立即搜索任何细分市场和城市。🛡️防退信MX检查：自动验证电子邮件📣多渠道序列：🎯智能线索评分：立即对线索进行排名

name: ShBusca
tagline: Dados e IA para vender mais na Shopee
tagline_zh: 在Shopee上销售更多商品的数据和人工智能
description: SHBusca é uma extensão para Chrome que mostra, direto nas páginas da Shopee, os dados que decidem se um produto vale a pena: faturamento estimado, vendas, concorrência e margem real. Agora ela também ajuda a vender mais: a IA audita sua copy com a estrutura AIDA, detecta objeções nas avaliações e gera campanhas prontas. Tudo sem sair da Shopee. Feito no Brasil, para vendedores da Shopee Brasil.
description_zh: SHBusca是一款Chrome扩展程序，它能在Shopee的页面上直接展示决定产品是否值得购买的数据：预估收入、销量、竞争情况和实际利润率。现在，它还能帮助卖家提升销量：人工智能会使用AIDA结构审核文案，检测评价中的异议，并生成现成的广告活动。所有这些操作都无需离开Shopee平台。该工具由巴西团队开发，专为巴西Shopee卖家服务。

name: TellShots - Social forecasting platform
tagline: Lock predictions. Verify outcomes. Build reputation.
tagline_zh: 锁定预测。验证结果。建立声誉。
description: TellShots lets you lock predictions before events happen and automatically verify outcomes over time. No hindsight edits, no rewriting history, just timestamped proof of what you actually called. Compete with counter predictions, join prediction threads, and earn reputation badges based on accuracy. From sports and crypto to politics and tech, every prediction becomes a shareable proof card of your foresight. Predict. Verify. Prove.
description_zh: TellShots允许您在事件发生前锁定预测，并随时间自动验证结果。无需事后编辑，无需重写历史，只需提供您实际预测的时间戳证明。与对立预测竞争，加入预测线程，并根据准确性获得声誉徽章。从体育、加密货币到政治和科技，每一次预测都成为您远见卓识的可分享证明卡。预测。验证。证明。

name: LCPath
tagline: Your personalized Socratic AI LeetCode coach
tagline_zh: 你的专属苏格拉底式AI LeetCode教练
description: Grinding LeetCode blindly is a waste of time. LCPath is a Chrome extension that turns LeetCode into a personalized learning platform. Instead of just giving you the answers, our context-aware AI acts as a Socratic coach, reading your current code and providing gentle hints to build your intuition. It analyzes your solve history to recommend the exact problems you need to patch your knowledge gaps, utilizing spaced repetition so you never forget what you learn. Zero setup required.
description_zh: 盲目刷LeetCode是浪费时间。LCPath是一款Chrome扩展程序，它将LeetCode打造成一个个性化的学习平台。我们的情境感知AI不会直接给出答案，而是像苏格拉底式的教练一样，读取你当前的代码，并提供温和的提示来培养你的直觉。它分析你的解题历史，为你推荐恰好能弥补知识漏洞的问题，并利用间隔重复法，让你永远不会忘记所学内容。无需任何设置。

name: AppZ AU Business Advisor
tagline: AU biz automation blueprints with GST/BAS/super context
tagline_zh: 包含GST/BAS/超级上下文的AU业务自动化蓝图
description: Australian small business? Get a free, personalised automation blueprint from Gemini AI -- with GST, BAS, super, and Fair Work context built in. 30 seconds.
description_zh: 澳大利亚的小企业？从Gemini AI获取一份免费的、个性化的自动化蓝图——内置GST、BAS、super和Fair Work上下文。30秒搞定。

name: PromptCache
tagline: Version your prompts. Ship faster with your team.
tagline_zh: 为你的提示进行版本控制。与团队一起更快地发布。
description: PromptCache is version control for your AI prompts — built for teams. Get full version history, typed variable templates, role-based collaboration, and a public gallery to share and fork prompts. Integrate via REST API or the typed SDK. Stop losing prompts in Notion and Slack. One source of truth for your whole team.
description_zh: PromptCache是您AI提示的版本控制工具——专为团队打造。获取完整的版本历史记录、类型化变量模板、基于角色的协作功能，以及一个用于共享和分叉提示的公共图库。可通过REST API或类型化SDK进行集成。不再在Notion和Slack中丢失提示。为整个团队提供唯一的数据源。

name: Oracle NetSuite Industrial
tagline: Artificial Intelligence
tagline_zh: 人工智能
description: AI Oracle NetSuite Industrialsconnected with local LLM to get data from you OracleNetsuite Account and FineTuned LLM will summarize insights and give you better reports than standard one in Oracle NetSuite
description_zh: AI Oracle NetSuite工业版与本地大型语言模型（LLM）相连，从您的Oracle NetSuite账户获取数据，而经过微调的大型语言模型（LLM）将总结洞察，并为您提供比Oracle NetSuite标准报告更优质的报告

name: AnswerManiac
tagline: Be The Answer AI Can't Stop Talking About.
tagline_zh: 成为人工智能热议的话题。
description: Get your free AI visibility report in 60 seconds. See how ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini talk about your brand. No credit card required. After you receive your audit, our team can help you grow your presence across LLM AI Search.
description_zh: 60秒内即可获取您的免费AI可见度报告。了解ChatGPT、Perplexity和Gemini如何评价您的品牌。无需信用卡。收到审核报告后，我们的团队可帮助您在LLM AI搜索中提升品牌知名度。

name: Redacto
tagline: Local AI redacts. You approve.
tagline_zh: 本地人工智能进行编辑。您进行审批。
description: Redacto is not another PDF editor. It is a focused Mac app for local AI redaction. Drop in PDFs, scans, images, DOCX, CSV, JSON, RTF or text files; Redacto detects sensitive data, places redaction boxes, and lets you approve or adjust each choice before exporting. No upload, no account, no subscription.
description_zh: Redacto并非另一款PDF编辑器。它是一款专注于本地AI密文处理的Mac应用。只需将PDF、扫描件、图片、DOCX、CSV、JSON、RTF或文本文件拖入其中；Redacto即可检测敏感数据，自动添加密文框，并允许您在导出前批准或调整每个选择。无需上传，无需账户，也无需订阅。

name: ExaminerOS
tagline: AI-Powered EdTech Assessments & Analytics for Professionals
tagline_zh: 面向专业人士的基于人工智能的教育科技评估与分析
description: ExaminerOS is a modern comprehensive AI-powered assessment EdTech platform, designed for generating, managing, conducting, and grading assessments of all kinds including exams, quiz, polls/surveys, GTKY (Get-To-Know-You) in real-time, drastically reducing the time and complexity of traditional assessment creation and administration.
description_zh: ExaminerOS是一个现代化的、全面的、由人工智能驱动的评估教育技术平台，旨在生成、管理、进行和评分各种类型的评估，包括考试、测验、投票/调查、实时GTKY（了解你），大大减少了传统评估创建和管理的时间和复杂性。

name: Reloop Studio
tagline: Promote Apps with AI UGC Videos
tagline_zh: 用人工智能用户生成内容（UGC）视频推广应用
description: Generate high-quality UGC videos powered by AI with cinematic quality. Building a product is easy now. Getting people to notice it isn't. Reloop helps founders turn their product into promo videos quickly, so you can test more creatives instead of betting everything on one expensive video.
description_zh: 利用人工智能生成具有电影级画质的高品质用户生成内容（UGC）视频。现在，打造产品变得轻而易举。但要让人们注意到它却并非易事。Reloop帮助创始人快速将他们的产品转化为宣传视频，这样你就可以测试更多的创意，而不是把所有希望都寄托在一个昂贵的视频上。

name: SceneCraft
tagline: AI-native screenwriting, from blank page to final draft
tagline_zh: AI原生剧本创作，从零开始到最终稿
description: SceneCraft is an AI-native screenwriting platform: write, structure, and produce professional screenplays right in your browser. Unlike Final Draft (zero AI) or ChatGPT (zero structure), SceneCraft maintains act structure, character voice, and formatting across a full script. Write in any language, collaborate in real time, and visualize scenes with AI storyboarding. Your co-writer, not your replacement.
description_zh: SceneCraft是一个原生AI的编剧平台：您可以在浏览器中直接编写、构建和制作专业剧本。与Final Draft（无AI）或ChatGPT（无结构）不同，SceneCraft能够在整个剧本中保持剧情结构、角色声音和格式。您可以用任何语言编写，实时协作，并通过AI故事板可视化场景。它是您的合著者，而非替代者。

name: Leohunt
tagline: The friend who always finds what you want in NYC
tagline_zh: 那位总能帮你找到纽约市你想要的东西的朋友
description: Leohunt is an AI-powered spot finder for NYC. Describe what you want in plain English — "not too loud," "cozy vibe," "for 6 people" — and get 3 curated picks in 30 seconds. Includes health inspection grades (NYC DOHMH data), happy hours, vibe analysis, map + list + chat views, save & like, and photo gallery. Block-level NYC knowledge. SoHo ≠ NoHo ≠ West Village. Free. No ads.
description_zh: Leohunt是一款基于人工智能的纽约市景点查找工具。用简单的英语描述你的需求——“不太吵”、“氛围舒适”、“适合6人”——30秒内即可获得3个精选推荐。包括卫生检查等级（纽约市卫生局数据）、欢乐时光、氛围分析、地图+列表+聊天视图、保存和点赞，以及照片库。提供纽约市街区级知识。苏荷区≠诺霍区≠西村。免费。无广告。

name: Lean-dev – Teaching AI coding assistants
tagline: lean-dev – Teaching AI coding assistants to be smart
tagline_zh: lean-dev——让AI编码助手更智能
description: I built lean-dev, an open-source AI skill for coding assistants like Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT, and GitHub Copilot. lean-dev attempts to address : 1. Think Before Coding 2. Simplicity First 3. Surgical Changes 4. Goal-Driven Execution 5. Lean Responses One interesting result during testing was a significant reduction in token usage (often around 75%) while still producing useful outputs. GitHub: https://github.com/Vishnu90Coreinn/lean-dev
description_zh: 我开发了lean-dev，这是一个开源的人工智能技能，用于像Claude Code、Cursor、ChatGPT和GitHub Copilot这样的编码助手。lean-dev旨在解决以下问题：1. 编码前思考 2. 简单至上 3. 精准修改 4. 目标驱动执行 5. 精简响应 在测试期间，一个有趣的结果是，在仍然产生有用输出的同时，令牌使用量显著减少（通常减少约75%）。GitHub链接：https://github.com/Vishnu90Coreinn/lean-dev

name: VideoGPT Free 2D Video Generator
tagline: prompts to real-time 2D video graphics using HTML canvas.
tagline_zh: 使用HTML canvas实现实时2D视频图形。
description: Generative video platform that turns natural-language user prompts into structured JSON briefs using LLMs to automatically scaffold animated architecture and explainer videos. TypeScript-based expansion pipeline that turns high-level JSON briefs into complete video projects by injecting precise canvas coordinates, layout grids, act-timing tables, and style easing functions. Shape short-form visuals, prompts, and animated previews in one AI-powered workspace.
description_zh: 生成式视频平台，利用大型语言模型（LLMs）将自然语言用户提示转换为结构化的JSON简报，从而自动构建动画架构和解说视频。基于TypeScript的扩展管道，通过注入精确的画布坐标、布局网格、动作时间表和样式缓动函数，将高级JSON简报转化为完整的视频项目。在一个由AI驱动的工作区中，可以生成短视频视觉效果、提示和动画预览。

name: Hercules
tagline: What can Hercules build for you?
tagline_zh: 赫拉克勒斯能为你建造什么？
description: Hercules makes it easy to build apps and websites by chatting with AI. Build SaaS, eCommerce, internal tools, and mobile apps in minutes.
description_zh: Hercules通过与人工智能对话，让构建应用程序和网站变得轻松。您可以在几分钟内构建出SaaS、电子商务、内部工具和移动应用程序。

name: CVClaw AI
tagline: Convert job description to ATS-optimized Resume in seconds.
tagline_zh: 几秒钟内即可将职位描述转换为适合自动招聘系统（ATS）的简历。
description: CVClaw AI is an AI-powered Resume builder that convert job description to ATS-optimized resume under 60 seconds. It enable job seekers create tailormade resume by just pasting job description.
description_zh: CVClaw AI是一款基于人工智能的简历生成工具，能在60秒内将职位描述转换为适合自动招聘系统（ATS）的简历。求职者只需粘贴职位描述，即可轻松生成量身定制的简历。

name: Resubuild
tagline: Open-source AI JSON Resume editor with PDF import & export
tagline_zh: 开源AI JSON简历编辑器，支持PDF导入与导出
description: Resubuild is a self-hostable JSON Resume editor with AI PDF import. Upload any PDF → AI extracts clean structured data. Edit with live preview, tailor for jobs, export perfect PDFs. Built with Next.js, NestJS, Supabase & Mastra AI. 100% JSON Resume compliant • MIT licensed. Live demo: https://app.resubuild.dev GitHub: https://github.com/yortyrh/resubuild
description_zh: Resubuild是一款可自托管的JSON简历编辑器，支持AI PDF导入。上传任意PDF文件→AI提取干净的结构化数据。实时预览编辑，针对职位量身定制，导出完美的PDF文件。采用Next.js、NestJS、Supabase和Mastra AI构建。100%兼容JSON简历格式• MIT许可。在线演示：https://app.resubuild.dev GitHub：https://github.com/yortyrh/resubuild

name: MyPhotoStudio
tagline: AI-powered photo sharing & studio CRM platform
tagline_zh: 基于人工智能的照片共享与工作室客户关系管理平台
description: MyPhotoStudio helps photography businesses manage bookings, clients, payments, photo galleries and online orders from a single platform. Features include AI face recognition, QR-code photo delivery, WhatsApp automation, client proofing, digital downloads, print orders and complete studio CRM tools. Designed for photographers, wedding studios and event photography businesses.
description_zh: MyPhotoStudio通过单一平台帮助摄影企业处理预订、客户管理、支付、照片画廊以及在线订单。其功能包括人工智能人脸识别、二维码照片交付、WhatsApp自动化、客户打样、数字下载、打印订单以及完整的工作室客户关系管理（CRM）工具。该平台专为摄影师、婚纱工作室和活动摄影企业设计。

name: Nivroo
tagline: Build an AI dropshipping store in 60 seconds - and trade too
tagline_zh: 60秒内打造一个人工智能代销店，还能进行交易
description: Describe your niche in one sentence — Nivroo's AI builds your whole store (brand, products, copy, SEO, checkout) in 60s. It auto-sources products, prices them, fulfils orders, and answers customers. Plus a built-in stock/crypto/forex terminal. Sell on 19 channels.
description_zh: 一句话描述你的优势——Nivroo的人工智能可在60秒内为您构建整个店铺（包括品牌、产品、文案、搜索引擎优化、结账流程）。它能够自动采购产品、定价、履行订单并回复客户。此外，还内置了股票/加密货币/外汇交易终端。可在19个渠道销售。

name: BocadoClaro
tagline: Nutrition for the Spanish market. Adapted to our lifestyle
tagline_zh: 专为西班牙市场设计的营养品。适应我们的生活方式
description: Track calories and macros without having to deal with databases: log your meals using text, photos of your plate, barcodes, recipes, and saved foods. -------------------------- Cuenta calorías y macros sin pelearte con bases de datos: registra comida por texto, foto del plato, código de barras, recetas y alimentos guardados.
description_zh: 无需处理数据库即可追踪卡路里和宏量营养素：通过文本、餐盘照片、条形码、食谱和已保存的食物记录你的餐食。

name: DevBrain
tagline: Git-aware memory for AI coding agents via Obsidian
tagline_zh: 通过Obsidian为AI编码代理提供Git感知内存
description: DevBrain gives AI coding agents a persistent, Git-aware memory layer powered by Obsidian. It automatically detects branch switches, loads branch-specific context, tracks progress, and creates structured handoffs between sessions. Multiple agents can share the same knowledge vault through a single MCP server, so decisions, blockers, and project history never get lost. Stop re-explaining your codebase, let your AI agents build on what they already know.
description_zh: DevBrain为人工智能编码代理提供了一个由Obsidian支持的持久且支持Git的内存层。它能自动检测分支切换，加载特定分支的上下文，跟踪进度，并在会话之间创建结构化的交接。多个代理可以通过单个MCP服务器共享同一个知识库，因此决策、障碍和项目历史永远不会丢失。无需重新解释你的代码库，让你的AI代理基于他们已经知道的内容进行构建。

name: NeuralRun
tagline: Education AI
tagline_zh: 教育人工智能
description: NeuralRun is a grounded AI quiz and trivia platform with citation-backed facts and a Challenge AI feature. Built for knowledge seekers, trivia hosts, and educators.
description_zh: NeuralRun是一个基于事实的AI问答和知识问答平台，提供有引文支持的事实和挑战AI功能。专为知识追求者、知识问答主持人和教育工作者打造。

name: Revisite
tagline: Turn Google Maps reviews into a complete multi-page website
tagline_zh: 将谷歌地图评论打造成一个完整的多页网站
description: Your customers already wrote your best marketing copy. It is buried in your Google reviews. Revisite reads them, finds the real reasons people keep coming back, and turns them into a complete multi-page website: landing, gallery, menu or catalogue, and contact. Pick from 5 hand-crafted themes, add per-page QR codes, and track daily visits. Most tools stop at a single page. Revisite gives you a complete website, live in minutes.
description_zh: 你的客户已经为你撰写了最佳的营销文案。这些文案就隐藏在你的谷歌评论中。Revisite会阅读这些评论，找出人们不断光顾的真正原因，并将这些原因转化为一个完整的多页网站：着陆页、图库、菜单或目录，以及联系方式。从5个手工制作的主题中进行选择，为每个页面添加二维码，并跟踪每日访问量。大多数工具仅限于一个页面。Revisite则为你提供一个完整的网站，几分钟内即可上线。

name: QuoteMate
tagline: AI quoting & invoicing for Australian tradies
tagline_zh: 为澳大利亚贸易商提供人工智能报价和开票服务
description: QuoteMate is an AI-powered quoting & invoicing app built for Australian tradies. Describe any job, get a full materials list with real-time supplier pricing, and send a professional quote in under 2 minutes. Key features: AI material suggestions, live Aussie supplier pricing, section-based quoting, quote-to-invoice in one tap, 9-stage job pipeline, Google Calendar sync, Square tap-to-pay, Xero integration, offline mode, Australian GST built in. Free plan + Pro at $49/mo.
description_zh: QuoteMate是一款专为澳大利亚工匠打造的、基于人工智能的报价和开票应用。只需描述任何工作，即可获得包含实时供应商价格的完整材料清单，并在2分钟内发送专业报价。主要功能包括：人工智能材料建议、实时澳大利亚供应商价格、基于部分的报价、一键从报价到开票、9阶段工作流、谷歌日历同步、Square一键支付、Xero集成、离线模式、内置澳大利亚商品及服务税（GST）。免费版+专业版每月49美元。

name: Swift Signage
tagline: Turn your screens into a customer retention machine
tagline_zh: 将你的屏幕变成一台客户留存机器
description: Swift Signage is a digital signage SaaS built for restaurants and retail. Manage menus, slideshows, and product showcases on any TV — updated in real time from anywhere. Beyond the screens, a built-in retention engine lets you send push notifications, run loyalty programs, and track customer segments — turning one-time visitors into regulars. No hardware lock-in. Live in minutes.
description_zh: Swift Signage是一款专为餐厅和零售店打造的数字标牌软件即服务（SaaS）。您可以在任何电视上管理菜单、幻灯片和产品展示，并随时随地实时更新。除了屏幕展示，内置的留存引擎还能让您发送推送通知、运行忠诚度计划，并追踪客户群体，从而将一次性访客转化为忠实客户。无需硬件锁定。几分钟内即可上线。

name: Votura 2.0
tagline: Explore 500+ cities with AI audio guides.
tagline_zh: 使用人工智能语音导览，探索500多个城市。
description: Most audio tour apps cost $20+ per city, need Wi-Fi, and only speak English. Votura flips that. 🌍 500+ cities. 🗣️ 12 languages. 📶 Fully offline. 🤖 AI-powered narration turns every street into a story — no tour groups, no roaming bills, no paywalls. Download before you go and explore on your own terms, anywhere in the world. We're an indie team that built the audio guide we always wanted. Votura 2.0 is it.
description_zh: 大多数语音导览应用程序每个城市要价20美元以上，需要Wi-Fi，且仅支持英语。Votura颠覆了这一传统。🌍覆盖500多个城市。🗣️支持12种语言。📶完全离线。🤖人工智能语音解说让每条街道都变成一个故事——无需跟团，无需漫游费，无需付费墙。出行前下载，以自己的节奏探索世界任何角落。我们是一个独立团队，打造了我们一直想要的语音导览。Votura 2.0就是它。

name: Crelyzor
tagline: Your card, schedule, meetings & tasks — all connected
tagline_zh: 你的卡片、日程、会议和任务——全部互联互通
description: Stop stitching together Calendly, Otter.ai, HiHello, and Todoist. Crelyzor brings everything into one platform: * Digital business cards * AI meeting transcription * Smart scheduling * Task management And unlike disconnected tools, everything works together. Share your card → someone books a meeting → AI generates notes → follow-up tasks are created automatically. The entire workflow in one tab. Built for consultants, freelancers, and founders.
description_zh: 别再东拼西凑Calendly、Otter.ai、HiHello和Todoist这些工具了。Crelyzor将所有功能整合到一个平台上：* 电子名片 * AI会议转录 * 智能日程安排 * 任务管理 与那些各自为政的工具不同，Crelyzor的所有功能都能协同工作。分享你的名片→有人预订会议→AI生成会议记录→后续任务自动创建。整个工作流程都在一个标签页内完成。专为咨询师、自由职业者和创始人打造。

name: Guidy
tagline: Real-time guidance for any software.
tagline_zh: 为任何软件提供实时指导。
description: Get the next step the moment you're stuck. Guidy is your AI desktop assistant, working in real time across any software.
description_zh: 遇到难题时，立即获取下一步操作。Guidy是您的AI桌面助手，可跨任何软件实时工作。

name: Genlook Virtual try-on API
tagline: Add AI virtual try-on to any app in two API calls
tagline_zh: 只需两次API调用，即可为任何应用添加AI虚拟试穿功能
description: Genlook is an AI virtual try-on engine behind a simple REST API and TypeScript SDK. Two HTTP calls 1. upload a photo, 2. run the try-on and your users see themselves wearing any product. It works with plain 2D product images. Drop it into any store, app, or custom flow, with an MCP server for AI agents too.
description_zh: Genlook是一个基于简单REST API和TypeScript SDK的AI虚拟试穿引擎。只需两次HTTP调用：1. 上传照片；2. 运行试穿功能，用户就能看到自己穿上任何产品的效果。它适用于普通的2D产品图片。将其集成到任何商店、应用程序或自定义流程中，同时还可以为AI代理配备MCP服务器。

name: 1GEN CATALYST
tagline: AI-Native Fundraising Operating System
tagline_zh: AI原生筹款操作系统
description: 1GEN CATALYST is the AI-native Fundraising Operating System for nonprofits. Plan smarter campaigns, improve readiness before launch, activate board and community networks, build donor trust through impact storytelling, and create fundraising momentum from one platform. Unlike traditional fundraising tools focused on collecting donations, CATALYST helps mission-driven organizations run better campaigns that inspire action, engagement, and long-term support.
description_zh: 1GEN CATALYST是非营利组织专用的AI原生筹款操作系统。通过该平台，您可以更智能地策划筹款活动，在活动启动前提升准备度，激活董事会和社区网络，通过讲述影响力故事建立捐助者的信任，并创造筹款势头。与专注于收集捐款的传统筹款工具不同，CATALYST助力使命驱动型组织更好地开展活动，激发行动、参与和长期支持。

name: CreatorWand AI
tagline: The AI command center for digital product creators
tagline_zh: 数字产品创作者的AI指挥中心
description: CreatorWand is the ultimate command center to orchestrate your entire digital product lifecycle. From market validation to multi-platform publishing and revenue optimization.
description_zh: CreatorWand是统筹整个数字产品生命周期的终极指挥中心。从市场验证到多平台发布，再到收入优化，一应俱全。

name: Rectraa
tagline: Turn WhatsApp event leads into structured CRM-ready data
tagline_zh: 将WhatsApp活动线索转化为结构化的、可用于CRM的数据
description: Rectraa helps sales teams turn event leads scattered across WhatsApp chats, business cards, audio notes, and personal notes into structured, actionable lead data. Upload your WhatsApp export and Rectraa automatically extracts contacts, identifies companies, classifies lead intent, assigns priorities, generates summaries, and prepares everything for follow-up. What normally takes hours of manual work can be completed in minutes and exported directly to Excel.
description_zh: Rectraa助力销售团队将散落在WhatsApp聊天、名片、音频笔记和个人笔记中的活动线索转化为结构化、可操作的线索数据。上传您的WhatsApp导出文件，Rectraa将自动提取联系人信息、识别公司名称、分类线索意图、分配优先级、生成摘要，并为后续跟进做好一切准备。通常需要数小时手动处理的工作，现在几分钟内即可完成，并可直接导出到Excel中。

name: Affiblast
tagline: Run your whole affiliate content stack from one place.
tagline_zh: 一站式管理您的所有联盟内容。
description: Stop juggling 7 tools. AffiBlast is an all-in-one Affiliate Content OS that lets you research topics, write high-converting multi-GEO articles, auto-publish to WP & Medium, build bonus pages, and force-index everything in under 5 minutes. Save 75% on tech stack costs and start scaling traffic for free.
description_zh: 别再手忙脚乱地使用7种工具了。AffiBlast是一款一体化联盟内容操作系统，让您能在5分钟内完成主题研究、撰写高转化率多地域文章、自动发布到WordPress和Medium、构建奖励页面以及强制索引所有内容。节省75%的技术堆栈成本，并免费开始扩大流量。

name: Assistlyai
tagline: Turn WhatsApp Into Your Smart Productivity Assistant
tagline_zh: 将WhatsApp打造成您的智能生产力助手
description: Turn WhatsApp into your personal second brain with AssistlyAI. Save reminders, notes, documents, flight details, passwords, bookings, and important information in seconds. Need something later? Just ask and retrieve it instantly. No extra apps, no complicated setup—just a smart AI assistant that helps you remember, organize, and access everything directly from WhatsApp.
description_zh: 使用AssistlyAI，将WhatsApp打造成您的个人第二大脑。只需几秒钟，即可保存提醒、笔记、文档、航班详情、密码、预订信息以及重要资料。稍后需要某项内容？只需提问，即可立即获取。无需额外下载应用，也无需繁琐设置——只需一个智能AI助手，即可帮助您直接在WhatsApp中记忆、整理和访问所有内容。

name: Capsule
tagline: The flight recorder for AI agents
tagline_zh: AI代理的飞行记录器
description: AI agents are powerful, but debugging them is often harder than fixing them. When an agent fails, engineers spend hours digging through logs, prompts, and tool outputs trying to understand what happened. Capsule is the flight recorder for AI agents—recording prompts, tool calls, memory, and execution state into a replayable artifact so teams can replay failures, identify root causes faster, and build more reliable AI systems.
description_zh: 人工智能（AI）代理功能强大，但调试它们往往比修复它们更难。当代理出现故障时，工程师们会花费数小时翻阅日志、提示和工具输出，试图理解发生了什么。Capsule是AI代理的飞行记录仪——它将提示、工具调用、内存和执行状态记录到可回放的工件中，以便团队可以回放故障，更快地确定根本原因，并构建更可靠的AI系统。

name: Koov
tagline: The all in one intelligence layer for your team
tagline_zh: 为您的团队打造一体化智能层
description: Koov builds voice agents for live meetings, on-screen overlay, customer care & CRM — one platform for conversation AI. Meeting agents support: Zoom, facetime, google meets and more
description_zh: Koov为实时会议、屏幕叠加、客户服务和客户关系管理（CRM）构建语音代理——一个会话人工智能平台。会议代理支持：Zoom、FaceTime、Google Meet等

name: StyleMind Autonomous Shopping agent
tagline: Turn browsing into buying with agentic commerce
tagline_zh: 通过代理式商务，将浏览转化为购买
description: StyleMind 2.0 is not a chatbot or recommendation widget. It is an AI sales agent for fashion e-commerce. It understands shopper intent, builds complete outfits, enables virtual try-on, applies discounts at the right moment, adds items to cart, and guides users to checkout. Unlike traditional tools that only suggest or react, StyleMind takes action in real time to increase conversions and reduce cart abandonment.
description_zh: StyleMind 2.0并非聊天机器人或推荐小部件。它是时尚电商领域的AI销售助手。它能理解购物者的意图，搭配出完整的服装，支持虚拟试穿，在适当的时候应用折扣，将商品添加到购物车，并引导用户完成结账。与传统工具仅提供建议或作出反应不同，StyleMind能实时采取行动，以提高转化率并降低购物车弃单率。

name: Truvem
tagline: Persistent memory for AI agents. Two API calls. Any model.
tagline_zh: AI代理的持久内存。两个API调用。任何模型。
description: Truvem is the memory infrastructure layer for AI agents. Two API calls. Any model. Persistent.
description_zh: Truvem是AI代理的内存基础设施层。两个API调用。任何模型。持久化。

name: Ai Invoice Maker
tagline: Professional invoices in seconds, not hours
tagline_zh: 专业发票，几秒钟即可开具，无需数小时
description: AI Invoice Maker helps freelancers, agencies, consultants, and IT businesses create professional PDF invoices in seconds. Simply describe what you need, and AI generates a complete invoice with clients, items, pricing, notes, and payment details. Choose from 15 beautiful invoice templates, manage multiple companies, back up to Google Drive, and work entirely offline. No account required. Your data stays on your device.
description_zh: AI Invoice Maker可帮助自由职业者、代理机构、咨询师和IT企业快速生成专业的PDF发票。只需简单描述您的需求，AI即可生成包含客户、项目、定价、备注和付款详细信息的完整发票。您可以从15种精美的发票模板中进行选择，管理多家公司，将数据备份到Google Drive，并完全离线工作。无需注册账户。您的数据将保存在您的设备上。

name: SystemCraft
tagline: Interactive system design practice.
tagline_zh: 交互系统设计实践。
description: SystemCraft is an interactive system design practice platform. Most prep tools give you theory. SystemCraft gives you a canvas. Read deep-dive docs for 100+ real-world systems — then open the practice canvas and design it yourself with a drag-and-drop architecture builder. ✦ 100+ systems with deep documentation ✦ Interactive drag-and-drop canvas ✦ Structured learning roadmap ✦ Progress tracking ✦ AI-assisted generation Free to use. No fluff.
description_zh: SystemCraft是一个交互式系统设计实践平台。大多数准备工具只提供理论。而SystemCraft则为你提供了一个画布。阅读关于100多个真实系统的深度文档——然后打开实践画布，使用拖放式架构构建器自行设计。✦ 100多个系统，附带深度文档 ✦ 交互式拖放画布 ✦ 结构化学习路线图 ✦ 进度跟踪 ✦ AI辅助生成 免费使用。没有花哨的功能。

name: Resuque
tagline: AI Resume Builder That Gets Past ATS
tagline_zh: 能通过ATS的AI简历生成器
description: Build a tailored, ATS-friendly resume in minutes. Paste a job description, let AI draft your bullets, and export a polished PDF — free.
description_zh: 在几分钟内打造一份量身定制且适合自动筛选系统（ATS）的简历。粘贴职位描述，让AI为您撰写要点，并导出精美的PDF文件——完全免费。

name: Echoir
tagline: Draw a card. Hear an answer. Not a chatbot.
tagline_zh: 抽一张牌。听一个答案。不是聊天机器人。
description: Echoir is an AI divination platform that gives you a reading, not a conversation. Ask one question, draw a card, get a streaming interpretation — then it ends. No chatbot loops, no AI companion, no dependency. Tarot is fully bilingual (EN/ZH). Bazi (Chinese astrology with true solar time correction), dream interpretation, and YUAN — an original 102-card deck with its own sci-fi mythology — are live in Chinese, translating step by step.
description_zh: Echoir是一个人工智能占卜平台，它为你提供的是解读，而非对话。只需问一个问题，抽一张牌，就能获得一段流媒体解读——然后结束。没有聊天机器人的循环，没有人工智能伴侣，也没有依赖性。塔罗牌完全双语（英文/中文）。八字（带有真太阳时校正的中国占星术）、梦境解读和YUAN——一套原创的102张牌，拥有自己的科幻神话——均以中文呈现，并逐步翻译。

name: memory-keeper
tagline: 99.9% DeepSeek cache hit, 3-tier context proxy
tagline_zh: 99.9%的DeepSeek缓存命中率，3层上下文代理
description: LghteihtNod.jsproy btwen penlw ad DeepSek AI. -tir rchvin fo 99.95%cace ht.
description_zh: LightNightNode.jsproy是介于penlw和DeepSek AI之间的项目。- 99.95%的测试通过率。

name: SharkCraw
tagline: Find and discover the best AI tools in one place
tagline_zh: 一站式查找和发现最佳人工智能工具
description: I built SharkCraw because I was tired of Googling "best AI tool for X" and getting outdated listicles. SharkCraw is a clean, fast AI tools directory with 500+ tools across 10 categories — Writing, Image, Video, Code, Audio, Marketing, Productivity, Search, Education, and Business. You can filter by category and pricing (Free, Free + Paid, Paid Only) to find exactly what you need in seconds. Would love your feedback on what's missing or what could be better! 🔗 sharkcraw.com
description_zh: 我创建了SharkCraw，因为我已经厌倦了在谷歌上搜索“X的最佳AI工具”时，总是得到过时的列表文章。SharkCraw是一个简洁、快速的AI工具目录，涵盖10个类别，包括写作、图像、视频、代码、音频、营销、生产力、搜索、教育和商业，共有500多种工具。你可以按类别和价格（免费、免费+付费、仅付费）进行筛选，以便在几秒钟内找到你真正需要的东西。如果你觉得有什么遗漏或可以改进的地方，我非常欢迎你的反馈！🔗 sharkcraw.com

name: Offrrd
tagline: Your AI job-search coach
tagline_zh: 您的人工智能求职教练
description: Offrrd is your AI-powered job search assistant. It doesn't just help you apply, it coaches you. Find matching jobs, tailor your resume and cover letters with AI, prep for interviews, and get a personal AI career coach that tells you exactly what to fix next.
description_zh: Offrrd是一款由人工智能驱动的求职助手。它不仅协助你申请工作，还能为你提供指导。通过人工智能，它能帮你找到匹配的工作，定制简历和求职信，准备面试，并为你配备一位私人AI职业教练，他会告诉你接下来该做什么。

name: Soilytix
tagline: AI soil intelligence for those who grow, study and restore
tagline_zh: 为种植、学习和修复土壤的人们提供AI土壤智能
description: Advanced soil microbiome analysis, built for those who grow, study, anAdvanced soil microbiome analysis for those who grow, study, and restore. We sequence the DNA in your soil and turn it into clear, decision-ready intelligence: biodiversity, soil health, and yield signals. One method, multiple outcomes. Grounded in science, built for the field and the lab.
description_zh: 先进的土壤微生物组分析，专为种植、研究及修复土壤的人士打造。我们对土壤中的DNA进行测序，并将其转化为清晰、可供决策的情报：生物多样性、土壤健康状况和产量信号。一种方法，多种结果。基于科学，专为田间和实验室打造。

name: Dawdlo
tagline: Earn when your AI agent's work pays off
tagline_zh: 当你的AI代理的工作获得回报时，你就能获得收益
description: Dawdlo is the outcome exchange for AI agent work. While your coding agent runs, one monospace line — matched on your machine — shows a relevant sponsor. You earn when the work pays off. No tracking, no generic ads, zero added latency. `npx dawdlo`
description_zh: Dawdlo是AI代理工作的成果交换平台。当您的编码代理运行时，一个与您机器匹配的等宽行会显示相关的赞助商信息。当工作获得回报时，您将获得收益。无追踪，无通用广告，零延迟。`npx dawdlo`

name: WealthWise
tagline: ✅ The bilingual portfolio tracker built for Canadians
tagline_zh: ✅ 为加拿大人打造的双语投资组合跟踪工具
description: Most portfolio trackers are built for Americans — wrong account types, USD-first, English-only. WealthWise is different: 100% Canadian and fully bilingual (EN/FR). What stands out: • Native RRSP, TFSA, FHSA & RESP tracking with real contribution room • 23 free Canadian calculators (contribution room, capital gains, FIRE, historical S&P 500/TSX/Nasdaq returns) • Projected dividends, FIRE planning & AI portfolio analysis • 14-day Premium trial, no credit card
description_zh: 大多数投资组合跟踪器都是为美国人设计的——账户类型不匹配、以美元计价、仅支持英语。WealthWise与众不同：100%加拿大本土化，且完全双语（英语/法语）。其突出之处在于：• 原生RRSP、TFSA、FHSA和RESP跟踪，并提供真实的供款空间• 23个免费的加拿大计算器（供款空间、资本收益、FIRE、历史S&P 500/TSX/纳斯达克回报）• 预测股息、FIRE规划和AI投资组合分析• 14天高级试用，无需信用卡

name: Whispeak
tagline: Private meeting transcripts and follow-ups for desktop calls
tagline_zh: 桌面通话的私人会议记录和后续跟进
description: Whispeak is a desktop companion built around user ownership of conversation data, not a cloud-first recording app. Audio stays with the user, and we plan to add end-to-end encryption to strengthen that model further. Beyond transcription, we see Whispeak becoming a private conversation memory layer for AI-native workflows, including a user's own digital twin and local AI agents such as Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw working directly with data on the user's computer.
description_zh: Whispeak是一款围绕用户对话数据所有权打造的桌面伴侣应用，而非云端优先的录音应用。音频数据始终保留在用户端，我们计划添加端到端加密功能，以进一步加强这一模式。除了转录功能外，我们还看到Whispeak正成为原生AI工作流程的私人对话记忆层，包括用户自己的数字孪生体以及Claude Code、Codex和OpenClaw等本地AI代理，它们直接处理用户计算机上的数据。

name: Dunningly - on your service
tagline: Automate invoice reminders with AI – get paid faster
tagline_zh: 利用人工智能自动化发票提醒——更快收到款项
description: Freelancers lose revenue not because clients refuse to pay – but because nobody follows up consistently. Dunningly automates that. Tracks unpaid invoices and sends AI-written reminders that adjust in tone: polite before due date, firmer after. What makes it different: • AI generates each reminder with context – not templates • Scan invoice PDFs to extract data automatically • Bulk import via CSV or Google Sheets • Free up to 5 invoices, $10/mo unlimited
description_zh: 自由职业者收入受损，并非因为客户拒绝付款，而是因为无人持续跟进。Dunningly能自动化这一流程。它追踪未付发票，并发送由人工智能编写的提醒函，提醒函的语气会进行调整：在到期日前礼貌提醒，到期日后语气则更为坚定。其与众不同之处在于：• 人工智能会根据上下文生成每条提醒函，而非使用模板 • 扫描发票PDF文件以自动提取数据 • 可通过CSV或谷歌表格批量导入 • 免费处理多达5张发票，每月10美元可无限制处理

name: GenSpend
tagline: Track your AI spend
tagline_zh: 追踪您的人工智能支出
description: GenSpend automatically tracks your AI-generation spending across tools like Runway, Kling, Midjourney and ElevenLabs, converting every credit system into real dollars. See the true cost of every finished deliverable, not just per generation. Built for creators and studios who need to know what their AI work actually costs.
description_zh: GenSpend会自动追踪您在Runway、Kling、Midjourney和ElevenLabs等工具上的AI生成支出，将每个信用系统转换为实际美元。查看每个已完成交付成果的真实成本，而不仅仅是每次生成的成本。专为需要了解其AI工作实际成本的创作者和工作室打造。

name: ZYPHERON
tagline: The Cybersecurity IDE
tagline_zh: 网络安全集成开发环境
description: AI-native offensive security IDE for red teams. Automate reconnaissance and payload crafting. You approve every attack. All evidence stays local. Built for pentesters who need proof, not theatre.
description_zh: 专为红队打造的AI原生进攻安全集成开发环境。自动化侦察和载荷制作。每次攻击均需您批准。所有证据均保留在本地。专为需要证据而非表演的渗透测试人员打造。

name: SnapSend
tagline: Send secrets & files that self-destruct — request one back
tagline_zh: 发送自毁的秘密和文件——并请求对方回传一个
description: Zero-knowledge, one-time secret sharing. Encrypt passwords, API keys, and files in your browser, get a self-destructing link — no account, never AI-trained. And it works in reverse: generate a link so anyone can send you an encrypted secret (or set up an anonymous Ask Board).
description_zh: 零知识，一次性秘密共享。在浏览器中加密密码、API密钥和文件，获取一个自毁链接——无需账号，永不接受人工智能训练。反之亦然：生成一个链接，这样任何人都可以向你发送加密的秘密（或设置一个匿名的问答板）。

name: Vexula
tagline: The all-in-one business platform for freelancers & agencies
tagline_zh: 面向自由职业者和代理机构的一站式业务平台
description: Vexula is the complete business management platform for freelancers, small businesses, and agencies worldwide. Invoicing, clients, leads, expenses, proposals, time tracking, and AI - free forever.
description_zh: Vexula是全球自由职业者、小型企业和代理机构的一站式业务管理平台。开票、客户管理、潜在客户、费用管理、提案提交、时间追踪以及人工智能——永久免费。

name: ListFast
tagline: One listing. Nine marketplaces. 30 seconds.
tagline_zh: 一份上架信息。九大市场。30秒。
description: Turn one description or photo into optimized listings for Amazon, eBay, Etsy, Shopify, TikTok Shop & more — all at once. Free forever. Pro is $49/mo vs. $129-229/mo for single-channel tools.
description_zh: 将一张描述或照片一次性转化为适用于亚马逊、eBay、Etsy、Shopify、TikTok Shop等平台的优化商品详情。永久免费。专业版每月49美元，而单渠道工具每月需129-229美元。

name: Piri Piri AI
tagline: Realtime support during meetings
tagline_zh: 会议期间的实时支持
description: PiriPiri AI listens to your meetings in real time — both sides of the call — and quietly drafts the answer before you finish hearing the question. A desktop overlay for macOS & Windows that stays invisible on screen share.
description_zh: PiriPiri AI实时监听您的会议——通话双方——并在您听完问题之前悄悄地起草答案。适用于macOS和Windows的桌面叠加层，在屏幕共享时保持不可见。

name: Knowable
tagline: The World's First Visual AI Tutor
tagline_zh: 全球首款视觉人工智能导师
description: Knowable coaches you blockers by analyzing your notebook and your problem solving process in real time as you work your way through problem sets
description_zh: 可了解的教练会在你做习题时，实时分析你的笔记本和问题解决过程，从而了解你的阻碍因素

name: Juta
tagline: Daily check-ins for aging parents. Peace of mind for family.
tagline_zh: 每日向年迈的父母报平安。让家人放心。
description: 3 warm daily texts to your aging loved one. A quiet recap to the whole family, every evening. No relay calls. Nobody has to wonder. No app. No hardware. Any phone. Juta reaches out to them first with a real conversation around what they actually love. The sibling who never calls suddenly knows dad had a good day. The adult child who has been carrying all the worry does not have to anymore. $19/month. 3-day free trial. No payment info at signup. getjuta.com.
description_zh: 每天给年迈的亲人发送三条温馨短信。每天晚上，全家会安静地回顾一下。无需转接电话。无人需要猜测。无需应用程序。无需硬件。任何手机均可。Juta首先与他们联系，围绕他们真正喜欢的话题展开真正的对话。从不打电话的兄弟姐妹突然知道爸爸今天过得很愉快。一直背负着所有担忧的成年子女不再需要担忧。每月19美元。3天免费试用。注册时无需提供付款信息。getjuta.com。

name: Dewan AI
tagline: Break Down Malaysia Parliament Hansard into Simple Language
tagline_zh: 用简单语言解析马来西亚议会会议记录
description: Most Malaysians care about Parliament but can't understand the Hansard — it's dense and full of jargon. Dewan AI analyzes Malaysia's Parliament Hansard into plain language, then pushes relevant policies to you based on your demographics. Unlike news apps, it's personalized. A student sees education policies. A B40 parent sees welfare updates. Everyone gets what matters to them — explained clearly.
description_zh: 大多数马来西亚人关心议会，但看不懂议会议事录——它内容晦涩，术语满篇。Dewan AI将马来西亚议会的议会议事录分析成通俗易懂的语言，然后根据你的个人资料向你推送相关政策。与新闻应用程序不同，它是个性化的。学生看到的是教育政策。B40（马来西亚底层40%人口）的父母看到的是福利更新。每个人都得到他们关心的内容——解释得清清楚楚。

name: HuzAgent.ai
tagline: AI Lead Qualification & Booking Assistant for Businesses
tagline_zh: 企业AI线索资格确认与预约助手
description: HuzAgent helps businesses automatically qualify leads, answer customer inquiries, and book appointments using AI. Instead of manually reviewing every form submission, email, or customer request, HuzAgent analyzes incoming leads, scores them, identifies intent and urgency, generates summaries, and recommends the next action. Businesses can connect website forms, APIs, webhooks, and other lead sources to create automated workflows that save time and improve response speed.
description_zh: HuzAgent利用人工智能技术，帮助企业自动筛选潜在客户、回复客户咨询并预约会面。HuzAgent无需人工审核每份表单提交、每封电子邮件或每个客户请求，而是对收到的潜在客户进行分析、打分，识别其意图和紧迫性，生成摘要，并推荐下一步行动。企业可以连接网站表单、应用程序编程接口（API）、网络钩子（webhook）和其他潜在客户来源，创建自动化工作流程，从而节省时间并提高响应速度。

name: Transcriptomatic
tagline: Paste a YouTube URL, get a full transcript by email
tagline_zh: 粘贴YouTube网址，通过电子邮件获取完整文字记录
description: Paste any YouTube playlist, channel, or video URL — get a single combined plain-text transcript delivered to your inbox. Free for up to 20 videos per request. No account required, no extension to install. Great for feeding YouTube content into AI tools, researching topics from educational channels, or archiving your own video scripts. Need more? Unlock up to 50 videos for a one-time $9.95.
description_zh: 粘贴任何YouTube播放列表、频道或视频网址，即可获得一个合并的纯文本转录文本，直接发送到您的收件箱。每次请求最多可免费处理20个视频。无需注册账户，也无需安装扩展程序。非常适合将YouTube内容导入AI工具、研究教育频道中的主题或存档自己的视频脚本。需要更多功能？一次性支付9.95美元，即可解锁最多50个视频的处理权限。

name: Cortex Marketing
tagline: Plan, publish, and grow social with an AI marketing copilot.
tagline_zh: 借助AI营销助手，规划、发布并拓展社交媒体。
description: Cortex is a chat-first AI marketing workspace—not another scheduling dashboard. Set goals per brand, draft in your voice via chat, run approval gates when you need them, and publish or schedule to Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, and X. Weekly AI reviews tell you what worked and what to post next. Reply suggestions and autopilot keep engagement moving without losing brand context.
description_zh: Cortex是一个以聊天为主的AI营销工作空间，而非另一个日程安排仪表板。您可以为每个品牌设定目标，通过聊天以自己的风格撰写内容，在需要时进行审核，并将内容发布或安排发布到Instagram、Facebook、LinkedIn、TikTok和X等平台。每周的AI评估会告诉您哪些内容有效，以及接下来应该发布什么。回复建议和自动回复功能可保持互动活跃，同时又不失品牌特色。

name: Aurli
tagline: AI voice notes that summarize, draft, and organize for you
tagline_zh: AI语音笔记，为您总结、起草和组织内容
description: Aurli turns your voice into something useful. Record a meeting, lecture, or idea, get a clean transcript in 70+ languages, then chat with it to summarize, draft emails, pull action items, or make study notes. Export to Text, PDF, or Word. No account needed — your notes stay on your device. Built solo for anyone who talks faster than they type.
description_zh: Aurli将您的语音转化为实用内容。录制会议、讲座或想法，获得70多种语言的清晰文字记录，然后与它聊天以进行总结、起草电子邮件、提取行动项或制作学习笔记。可导出为文本、PDF或Word格式。无需账户——您的笔记将保存在您的设备上。专为那些说话速度比打字速度快的用户打造。

name: FiatDock
tagline: The non-custodial marketplace for AI agents
tagline_zh: 人工智能代理的非托管市场
description: The non-custodial marketplace for AI agents. List your MCP service for free; agents discover and pay per call via x402 on Base. You keep 99%, paid directly to your wallet. We never hold funds.
description_zh: 人工智能代理的非托管市场。免费列出您的MCP服务；代理人在Base上通过x402发现并按每次通话付费。您将获得99%的收益，直接支付到您的钱包。我们从不扣留资金。

name: Debate Core
tagline: Two AI Agents. One Topic. No Holds Barred.
tagline_zh: 两个AI助手。一个话题。无拘无束。
description: DebateCore AI pits two AI agents against each other in structured debates on any topic — from business strategy to philosophy. See every side of every argument.
description_zh: DebateCore AI让两个AI代理人在任何话题（从商业策略到哲学）的结构化辩论中相互对抗。你可以看到每个论点的每一面。

name: Truenor
tagline: More than ideas. Build-ready business plans.
tagline_zh: 不仅仅是想法。是可执行的商业计划。
description: Truenor finds non-obvious business opportunities and turns the best one into a complete, build-ready plan — a fully editable Excel financial model (change any number, add your own line items, every total, chart, scenario and break-even recalculates) plus a shareable PDF. Not just an idea generator. From idea to conviction.
description_zh: Truenor发掘非显而易见的商机，并将其中最佳的一个转化为一个完整的、可构建的计划——一个完全可编辑的Excel财务模型（可更改任何数字、添加自己的行项目、重新计算每个总计、图表、场景和盈亏平衡）以及一个可共享的PDF。这不仅仅是一个创意生成器。从创意到确信。

name: CarryAI
tagline: Get your AI chat context with one click
tagline_zh: 一键获取您的AI聊天上下文
description: Moving through AI models? Get context with one click.
description_zh: 在AI模型中穿梭？一键获取上下文。

name: Equipment Tracker Pro
tagline: Offline AI asset tracking for HVAC & facility teams.
tagline_zh: 为暖通空调（HVAC）和设施团队提供离线人工智能资产跟踪。
description: Offline-first asset management and compliance platform for HVAC and facility teams. Runs on a local SQLite cache that syncs with Firebase so it never fails in concrete basements. Powered by the Gemini AI Scanning Suite for automated nameplate data extraction, condition assessments, and interactive field troubleshooting. Tracks tool inventories, automates EPA Section 608 leak rate math, and generates 13 custom PDF report types.
description_zh: 专为暖通空调（HVAC）和设施团队打造的离线优先资产管理与合规平台。该平台基于本地SQLite缓存运行，并与Firebase同步，确保在混凝土地下室中也能稳定运行。该平台采用Gemini AI扫描套件，可实现铭牌数据的自动提取、状态评估以及交互式现场故障排除。此外，该平台还能追踪工具库存、自动化美国环保署（EPA）第608节规定的泄漏率计算，并生成13种自定义PDF报告类型。

name: Autoshorts
tagline: Turn long videos into viral shorts with AI
tagline_zh: 利用人工智能，将长视频转化为热门短视频
description: AutoShorts is an AI-powered desktop app that turns long-form videos into YouTube Shorts, TikToks, and Reels in minutes. Upload a video, let AI find the best moments, generate clips, add captions, and export ready-to-post content. Built with Tauri and Rust, AutoShorts is fast, private, and local-first.
description_zh: AutoShorts是一款由人工智能驱动的桌面应用，能在几分钟内将长视频转化为YouTube短视频、TikTok视频和Reels。只需上传视频，让AI找出最佳片段，生成剪辑，添加字幕，即可导出即刻可发布的内容。AutoShorts采用Tauri和Rust构建，速度快、私密性强，且以本地优先。

name: Technical Graffiti
tagline: Find out if AI search can see your business. Free.
tagline_zh: 了解AI搜索能否发现您的业务。免费。
description: Run a free AI visibility check on your website in 60 seconds. Nine live signals. Instant score out of 100. No email, no account needed. See exactly what AI engines can and can't find.
description_zh: 60秒内即可为您的网站进行免费的AI可见性检测。九大实时指标。即时给出100分制的评分。无需电子邮件，也无需注册账户。准确了解AI引擎能发现什么，不能发现什么。

name: BudgetWise AI
tagline: AI Personal finance & secure privacy-first expense tracker
tagline_zh: 人工智能个人理财与安全隐私优先的费用追踪器
description: BudgetWise AI simplifies money management by combining smart expense categorization, milestone analytics, and privacy-first storage. Automatically track income, build dynamic budgets, and scale your savings without exposing sensitive financial server data.
description_zh: BudgetWise AI通过结合智能费用分类、里程碑分析和隐私优先的存储方式，简化了资金管理。它能够自动追踪收入、构建动态预算，并扩大您的储蓄规模，同时不会泄露敏感的财务服务器数据。

name: VetRecorder
tagline: AI voice recognition for veterinary practice documentation
tagline_zh: 兽医实践文档的AI语音识别
description: VetRecorder is an AI-powered speech recognition solution designed specifically for veterinary practices. It automatically documents clinical findings, diagnoses, and treatment plans by converting spoken notes into written records.
description_zh: VetRecorder是一款专为兽医诊所设计的、基于人工智能的语音识别解决方案。它通过将口头记录转换为书面记录，自动记录临床发现、诊断和治疗方案。

name: Sidekick by Growth Magic
tagline: You know what to do. Sidekick makes you do it.
tagline_zh: 你知道该怎么做。Sidekick会让你去做。
description: Sidekick is an AI accountability coach for high performers who know exactly what to do but aren't doing it. Build with the NO BS philosophy. Pick a coach, set a goal, and get daily check-ins that hold you to your word, not hype. Free to start; voice mode and shareable cards on Premium.
description_zh: Sidekick是一款面向高绩效人士的人工智能责任教练应用，他们明明知道该做什么，却迟迟不去行动。该应用秉承“不废话”的理念。选择一位教练，设定一个目标，每天进行打卡，督促你信守承诺，而非夸大其词。免费试用；语音模式和可分享卡片需升级至高级版。

name: Free Resume Studio
tagline: Free AI Resume Builder & CV Creator
tagline_zh: 免费AI简历生成器 & 个人简历创建工具
description: Create ATS-friendly resumes for free. No signup required. Use AI writing help, professional resume templates, ATS checks, and clean PDF export.
description_zh: 免费制作适合自动筛选系统（ATS）的简历。无需注册。使用AI辅助撰写、专业简历模板、ATS检测，并可导出干净的PDF格式。

name: TOKEN TRACKER
tagline: It just tracks how many tokens you have burn across platform
tagline_zh: 它只是追踪你在整个平台上销毁了多少代币
description: It just tracks how many tokens you have burn across platform
description_zh: 它只是追踪你在整个平台上销毁了多少代币

name: ValuationBot
tagline: An AI-powered equity analysts for busy value investors
tagline_zh: 为忙碌的价值投资者提供基于人工智能的股票分析服务
description: ValuationBot is stock valuation software that analyses shares for you. It reads the reports, builds the DCF model and presents the investment case, so you can invest with clarity without weeks of manual research. It also gives you the downloadable and editable DCF model. It's been used by 700 investors to analyse 3,800 stocks so far.
description_zh: ValuationBot是一款股票估值软件，能为您分析股票。它能够读取报告，构建贴现现金流（DCF）模型，并展示投资案例，让您无需花费数周时间进行手动研究，就能清晰地进行投资。此外，它还提供可下载且可编辑的DCF模型。迄今为止，已有700名投资者使用它分析了3,800只股票。

name: Kavilo Creative AI
tagline: AI images and videos for ecommerce campaigns
tagline_zh: 用于电商活动的AI图片和视频
description: Kavilo Creative AI is a focused AI creative workspace for ecommerce teams. Start with a rough product idea or reference assets, let Image Prompt Agent clarify the prompt and production settings, then generate campaign-ready product stills and short videos in Quick Create studios with upfront credit estimates and automatic refunds for failed jobs.
description_zh: Kavilo Creative AI是一个专为电商团队打造的AI创意工作空间。从初步的产品构思或参考素材开始，让图像提示代理明确提示和生产设置，然后在快速创建工作室中生成可用于营销活动的产品静态图片和短视频，并提供预估费用和失败作品的自动退款。

name: Modaic
tagline: Your expert judgment and taste, running at scale.
tagline_zh: 你的专业判断和品味，得以大规模展现。
description: The fastest way to turn your taste and expertise into automation. Arbiters are language models that make a decision, explain why, and return a (reliable) score for how sure they are -- measured from inside the model. Confident decisions are accepted, unsure decisions go to a human, then their fixes update the instructions automatically. Over time, arbiters align to your judgment and decision rules. Use them to score, classify, route, extract, and moderate -- the way your team would by hand.
description_zh: 将您的品味和专业知识转化为自动化的最快方式。仲裁者是语言模型，它们能做出决策，解释原因，并从模型内部测量其确定性，返回一个（可靠的）分数。对于有信心的决策，系统会接受；对于不确定的决策，则会转交给人类处理，然后由人类修正并自动更新指令。随着时间的推移，仲裁者会与您的判断和决策规则保持一致。利用它们进行评分、分类、路由、提取和审核——就像您的团队手动处理一样。

name: The One-Person Business AI System
tagline: The complete Claude.ai workflow for one-person businesses
tagline_zh: 面向一人企业的完整Claude.ai工作流程
description: Most solopreneurs use Claude but start from scratch every day. No system. No repeatable process. This is 22 complete, plug-and-play Claude.ai systems — one for every part of your business. Content, newsletters, LinkedIn, video scripts, sales pages, launch emails, client proposals, and more. Copy the prompt. Fill in your details. Claude does the work. No code. No team. No technical setup. Just open Claude and go.
description_zh: 大多数独立创业者使用Claude，但每天都是从零开始。没有系统，没有可重复的流程。这是22个完整的、即插即用的Claude.ai系统——涵盖你业务的每一个环节。内容、新闻通讯、LinkedIn、视频脚本、销售页面、发布邮件、客户提案等等。只需复制提示，填写你的详细信息。Claude会完成所有工作。无需代码，无需团队，无需技术设置。只需打开Claude，一切搞定。

name: Folio-Fy
tagline: Turn Your Resume Into a AI Powered Portfolio
tagline_zh: 将你的简历打造成一份由人工智能驱动的简历
description: Most professionals have impressive experience but no personal portfolio because building a website requires design, coding, hosting, and AI expertise. Folio-Fy solves this by turning your resume into a professional portfolio website in minutes and training an AI assistant on your experience. Visitors can ask questions about your skills, projects, and achievements and get instant answers—without ever opening a PDF.
description_zh: 大多数专业人士都拥有丰富的经验，但却没有个人作品集，因为建立一个网站需要设计、编码、托管和人工智能（AI）方面的专业知识。Folio-Fy通过在几分钟内将您的简历转化为专业作品集网站，并根据您的经验训练一个AI助手，解决了这个问题。访问者可以就您的技能、项目和成就提出问题，并立即获得答案——无需打开PDF文件。

name: Synthra
tagline: Craft smarter prompts with AI — free & no fluff
tagline_zh: 利用人工智能打造更智能的提示——免费且不花哨
description: Synthra helps you turn rough ideas into well-structured AI prompts. Fill in a quick guided form, and Synthra optimizes your prompt using AI — ready to paste into ChatGPT, Gemini, or any AI tool. What you get: Guided prompt builder with 20+ templates Personalized results based on your profile Regenerate until it's perfect Completely free, no ads, no paywalls Built for anyone who uses AI tools and wants better results without the guesswork.
description_zh: Synthra助您将粗略的想法转化为结构清晰的AI提示。只需填写一份快速引导表格，Synthra就会使用AI优化您的提示——准备好粘贴到ChatGPT、Gemini或任何AI工具中。您将获得：一个带有20多个模板的引导式提示生成器 根据您的个人资料提供个性化结果 不断重新生成，直到完美 完全免费，无广告，无付费门槛 专为使用AI工具且希望无需猜测就能获得更好结果的人打造。

name: Loodfun
tagline: Turn your events & content into 3D game
tagline_zh: 将你的活动和内容转化为3D游戏
description: Loodfun turns any event, launch, or course into an explorable 3D world. You get a custom environment with objects, characters, and mini-games in minutes, zero code. Send invites that play like escape games, onboard new hires, run product launches, or turn a lesson into a game people finish. Pick a theme, customize it, share a link freely.
description_zh: Loodfun可将任何活动、发布会或课程转变为可探索的3D世界。您只需几分钟即可获得一个包含物体、角色和迷你游戏的自定义环境，无需编写任何代码。发送邀请，玩逃脱游戏，培训新员工，举办产品发布会，或将课程转变为人们乐于完成的游戏。选择一个主题，进行自定义，自由分享链接。

name: Axxexor
tagline: Pressure test ideas before you build
tagline_zh: 在构建之前对想法进行压力测试
description: Axxexor turns a raw product idea into a problem statement, personas, MVP scope, competitor map, risks, and validation steps — tailored to your target market.
description_zh: Axxexor将一个初步的产品创意转化为问题陈述、用户画像、最小可行产品（MVP）范围、竞争对手分析、风险评估以及验证步骤——所有这些都根据您的目标市场量身定制。

name: Timi AI-10000+image prompt gallery
tagline: 10,000+ free AI image&video prompts.
tagline_zh: 10,000+ 免费AI图像&视频提示。
description: Explore 10000+ free AI prompts Library — Nano Banana prompts, Gemini AI photo prompts, ChatGPT image prompts, Midjourney & video prompt templates with real examples. Support Image to Prompt & Free AI Image Generator.
description_zh: 探索10000+免费AI提示库——Nano Banana提示、Gemini AI照片提示、ChatGPT图像提示、Midjourney &视频提示模板，附带真实示例。支持图像到提示和免费AI图像生成器。

name: StoryKit · Visual Essays
tagline: Stories told in numbers, drawn in ink
tagline_zh: 用数字讲述的故事，用墨水绘制的图画
description: StoryKit — visual essays on anything, layered with data.
description_zh: StoryKit——关于任何主题的视觉化文章，辅以数据。

name: TTSOut
tagline: Turn text into downloadable MP3 speech in seconds
tagline_zh: 几秒钟内即可将文本转换为可下载的MP3语音文件
description: Convert text to natural-sounding speech with TTSOut. Free online TTS tool with 80+ AI voices in multiple languages. Adjustable speed, pitch, and speaking styles. Download MP3 instantly. No registration required.
description_zh: 使用TTSOut将文本转换为自然流畅的语音。这是一款免费的在线TTS工具，提供多种语言、80多种AI语音选择。可调节语速、音调和说话风格。即时下载MP3文件。无需注册。

name: FunMedia
tagline: Create Images. Create Videos. Create Anything.
tagline_zh: 创造图像。制作视频。创造一切。
description: 🚀 Meet FunMedia — Your All-in-One AI Creative Studio Creating AI content shouldn't require switching between multiple tools. FunMedia brings image generation and video generation together in a single platform, helping creators turn ideas into stunning visual content faster than ever. Create Anything
description_zh: 🚀 认识FunMedia——您的一站式AI创意工作室 创作AI内容，无需在多个工具间切换。FunMedia将图像生成和视频生成功能整合于一个平台，助力创作者以前所未有的速度将创意转化为惊艳的视觉内容。创造无限可能

name: StelaxAI
tagline: Stop wasting time on routine.
tagline_zh: 别再在琐碎事务上浪费时间了。
description: StelaxAI replies to customers, qualifies leads and books appointments 24/7. The AI platform for salons, med spas, clinics and service businesses.
description_zh: StelaxAI全天候回复客户、确认潜在客户并预约会面。该AI平台专为沙龙、医疗水疗中心、诊所和服务型企业打造。

name: GoodBarber - AI Extension Builder
tagline: Describe a feature, AI creates it in your app.
tagline_zh: 描述一个功能，AI会在你的应用中创建它。
description: GoodBarber's AI Extension Builder lets you create custom app sections by describing them in plain language — no code, no developer. Add a "Create with AI" section, describe what you want, and the agent writes it, plugs it into GoodBarber's public APIs (geolocation, native maps, offline storage, membership, system alerts) and renders it live. Refine by chatting or edit the code. It inherits your design system and compiles native iOS & Android. Free, in Beta.
description_zh: GoodBarber的AI扩展构建器允许您通过简单语言描述来创建自定义应用部分，无需编写代码，也无需开发人员。添加一个“用AI创建”部分，描述您想要的内容，代理程序就会编写出来，并将其插入GoodBarber的公共API（地理位置、原生地图、离线存储、会员资格、系统警报），然后实时呈现。您可以通过聊天或编辑代码来完善。它继承了您的设计系统，并编译为原生iOS和Android应用。该产品目前处于测试阶段，免费使用。

name: TravelBeast
tagline: Introducing TravelBeast, the ultimate trip/itinerary planner
tagline_zh: 介绍TravelBeast，终极旅行/行程规划师
description: AI travel agent that builds a complete day-by-day itinerary - hotels, restaurants, attractions, and routes - tailored to you. Edit by chat or voice, track flights, and book in one tap, talk to it like a travel agent. It makes changes in real time. Optimized routing: stops ordered to minimize backtracking, with a live map that redraws as you edit. One-tap booking: flights, hotels, rental cars, and eSIM all from inside the itinerary. Free to start - Land based trips and cruises.
description_zh: AI旅行助手，为您量身定制完整的逐日行程——包括酒店、餐厅、景点和路线。通过聊天或语音进行编辑，一键追踪航班并预订，像与旅行助手对话一样简单。它能够实时进行更改。优化路线：行程中的站点经过排序，以最大限度地减少返程，同时提供实时地图，可在编辑时重新绘制。一键预订：航班、酒店、租车和eSIM均可从行程中直接预订。免费开始——陆地旅行和游轮旅行。

name: PreFlight
tagline: Stop AI agent from breaking database security & architecture
tagline_zh: 阻止人工智能代理破坏数据库安全和架构
description: PreFlight is a local AST-based security gate that guards your codebase against AI hallucinations. AI coding agents often "quietly" skip critical security protocols like Supabase Row-Level Security (RLS) or leak server-only logic. PreFlight parses your code's AST in real-time, mapping your architectural dependencies to catch these structural drifts. Currently in public beta. Open-source, local-first, and built for developers who want to keep the speed of AI without the security debt.
description_zh: PreFlight是一个基于本地抽象语法树（AST）的安全门，可保护您的代码库免受人工智能幻觉的侵害。人工智能编码代理经常会“悄悄地”跳过关键的安全协议，如Supabase行级安全（RLS）或泄露仅限服务器的逻辑。PreFlight会实时解析代码的AST，映射架构依赖关系以捕捉这些结构偏差。目前处于公测阶段。它是一款开源、本地优先的产品，专为希望保持人工智能速度而不产生安全债务的开发人员打造。

name: FlareCode
tagline: Parallel coding fleet, from anywhere
tagline_zh: 随时随地，并行编码团队
description: Run your whole coding fleet from anywhere. Connect a GitHub repo and hand off a task in plain English. The agent plans, edits, runs your tests, and opens a pull request you review and merge. Run many repos in parallel, from your phone or your desk. One flat price. You stay in control.
description_zh: 随时随地管理您的整个编码团队。连接GitHub仓库，用简单英语下达任务。代理程序会规划、编辑、运行您的测试，并打开一个拉取请求供您审查和合并。您可以通过手机或电脑并行运行多个仓库。统一收费。一切尽在您的掌控之中。

name: MyBibleChat — Bible App, AI Pastor
tagline: Your Daily Walk with God
tagline_zh: 你与上帝的日常同行
description: MyBibleChat — 12 Bible translations (6 fully offline), daily Scripture, prayer journal, gratitude journal, Bible Study and forgiveness. AI pastoral guidance, and live sessions with human pastors. Free on iOS & Android.
description_zh: MyBibleChat — 提供12种圣经译本（其中6种可完全离线使用）、每日经文、祈祷日记、感恩日记、圣经学习以及宽恕服务。人工智能牧师指导，以及与人类牧师的实时会话。iOS和Android系统均可免费使用。

name: SideClue
tagline: Live sales coaching without a meeting bot
tagline_zh: 无需会议机器人即可进行现场销售辅导
description: SideClue is a private desktop copilot for live sales calls. It listens to your mic and computer audio, understands the conversation, and shows short coaching cards while you talk. No bot joins Zoom, Teams, or Google Meet. Ask questions during the call, pull answers from your own docs, then get notes and summaries after.
description_zh: SideClue是一款用于实时销售通话的私人桌面辅助工具。它会监听您的麦克风和电脑音频，理解对话内容，并在您讲话时显示简短的辅导卡片。它不会加入Zoom、Teams或Google Meet。您可以在通话中提出问题，从自己的文档中提取答案，并在通话结束后获取笔记和总结。

name: Lynxify
tagline: Structured 360 feedback for small teams
tagline_zh: 针对小团队的结构化360度反馈
description: Lynxify automates 360-degree employee feedback for teams of 30–200. Define reviewees, select peers and managers, set evaluation criteria, and the platform handles the rest. Anonymous responses encourage honest input. AI-generated summaries combine scores and written feedback into a ready-to-use report. No enterprise complexity, no manual coordination. Just structured feedback that actually gets done.
description_zh: Lynxify为30至200人的团队提供360度员工反馈自动化服务。用户只需定义被评估者，选择同事和经理，设定评估标准，其余工作由平台完成。匿名回复鼓励员工提供真实意见。AI生成的摘要将评分和书面反馈结合在一起，形成一份即用型报告。无需企业级复杂操作，也无需人工协调。只需提供结构化的反馈，一切即可轻松完成。

name: Score My Insta
tagline: AI audit that scores your Instagram profile in minutes
tagline_zh: 几分钟内即可为您的Instagram个人资料打分的AI审核
description: Score My Insta gives you a complete AI-powered audit of your Instagram profile for $37. Upload your screenshots and get back: • Your Instagram score (0–100) • A rewritten bio ready to copy-paste • 30 targeted hashtags for your niche • Content strategy + 10 hook ideas • 30-day action plan to grow faster Results delivered to your email in minutes. 7-day money-back guarantee.
description_zh: “为我的Instagram打分”服务，仅需37美元，即可为您的Instagram个人资料提供全面的人工智能审核。上传您的截图，即可获得：• 您的Instagram评分（0-100）• 一份可复制粘贴的全新个人简介• 30个针对您细分领域的标签• 内容策略+10个吸引眼球的创意• 30天快速成长行动计划结果将在几分钟内发送至您的电子邮件。7天退款保障。

name: Reploxis
tagline: Safety net for vibe coders
tagline_zh: 为振动编码器提供安全网
description: Reploxis — Insurance for AI Builders. Protect your codebase with instant snapshots, one-click recovery and AI cleanup. Built for Cursor, Claude Code, and more. Every vibe coder knows the pain: AI overwrites 3 files, breaks everything, and Ctrl+Z doesn't work. Reploxis adds a safety layer – one command saves a snapshot, another restores your last working state. Works alongside git, but without the thinking. Perfect for rapid AI-assisted development.
description_zh: Reploxis——AI构建者的保险。通过即时快照、一键恢复和AI清理来保护您的代码库。专为Cursor、Claude Code等打造。每位有经验的程序员都知道这种痛苦：AI覆盖了3个文件，破坏了一切，而Ctrl+Z不起作用。Reploxis增加了一层安全保障——一个命令保存快照，另一个命令恢复您最后的工作状态。它可以与git一起使用，但无需思考。非常适合快速的人工智能辅助开发。

name: SurfLexAI
tagline: Learn languages while you read the web
tagline_zh: 在阅读网页的同时学习语言
description: SurfLexAI turns everyday web reading into language learning. Double-click any word on any page or PDF — it reads the context, gives the right meaning, and saves the word with its sentence. A built-in SM-2 spaced-repetition system brings it back right before you forget. Practice across 7 modes: flashcards, quick review, tests, writing with AI feedback, listening, chat/roleplay, and grammar lessons. 7 languages. Free forever, Pro optional. Mobile app coming soon.
description_zh: SurfLexAI将日常网页阅读转化为语言学习。只需双击任何页面或PDF上的任何单词，它就能读取上下文，给出正确的含义，并将该单词及其所在句子保存下来。内置的SM-2间隔重复系统会在你即将遗忘之前提醒你复习。提供7种练习模式：闪卡、快速复习、测试、带AI反馈的写作、听力、聊天/角色扮演和语法课。支持7种语言。永久免费，可选择购买专业版。移动应用即将推出。

name: PhilosophieBook
tagline: 18 AI philosophers debate, so you think clearer
tagline_zh: 18位人工智能哲学家辩论，让你思路更清晰
description: Browse philosophical debates where 18 AI thinkers — Socrates, Confucius, Nietzsche, Liu Cixin, Asimov, Sontag, and more — discuss modern questions alongside humans and your AI agents. Not single-AI answers — real debate, where each thinker challenges the last. Free to read, join, or post your own topics.
description_zh: 浏览哲学辩论，18位人工智能思想家——苏格拉底、孔子、尼采、刘慈欣、阿西莫夫、桑塔格等——与人类和你的AI助手一起讨论现代问题。不是单一AI的回答——而是真正的辩论，每位思想家都会挑战上一位。可自由阅读、加入或发布自己的话题。

name: Ikie
tagline: A token-efficient, self-healing terminal AI coding assistant
tagline_zh: 一个代币高效、自我修复的终端人工智能编码助手
description: Ikie is a powerful agentic coding CLI for complex work. It reads your repo, plans, edits with precision, runs your tests, and ships — all from the shell. 28 built-in tools, plan & agent modes, skills and MCP support.
description_zh: Ikie是一个功能强大的代理式编码命令行界面（CLI），适用于复杂工作。它能够读取您的代码库，制定计划，精确编辑，运行测试，并完成发布——所有这些都可以通过命令行完成。Ikie内置了28种工具，支持计划和代理模式，具备多种技能，并支持MCP。

name: Procure Copilot
tagline: Compare, approve & pay 41 retailers via AI
tagline_zh: 通过人工智能对41家零售商进行比较、审批和支付
description: AI procurement agent for restaurants, hotels & agro in Latin America. Submit your basket, compare live prices across 41 verified retailers in 8 countries, get manager approval in one click, and pay via Yape, PayPal, or Mercado Pago — in under 30 seconds. No more WhatsApp price hunting. No more spreadsheets. Powered by CLI Market — 61,000+ real shelf prices, refreshed every 4h. Plans from $29/mo.
description_zh: 拉丁美洲餐厅、酒店及农产品的人工智能采购代理。提交您的采购清单，在8个国家的41家经过验证的零售商之间实时比价，一键获得经理批准，并通过Yape、PayPal或Mercado Pago支付——30秒内完成。再也不用通过WhatsApp寻找价格，再也不用使用电子表格。由CLI Market提供支持——61,000+个真实货架价格，每4小时更新一次。套餐价格从每月29美元起。

name: InstaShare
tagline: Securely Share Claude Code chat sessions as public link
tagline_zh: 以公共链接的形式安全共享Claude Code聊天会话
description: Share or export a Claude Code chat session as a public link in one /instashare command. Anonymous-first, with API keys and secrets auto-redacted before upload. Free skill for Claude Code.
description_zh: 使用一个/instashare命令，即可将Claude Code聊天会话以公共链接的形式分享或导出。首先支持匿名，上传前会自动隐藏API密钥和机密信息。这是Claude Code的一项免费技能。

name: INTrouble
tagline: AI diagnostic assistant for industrial electrical faults
tagline_zh: 工业电气故障的AI诊断助手
description: INTrouble helps electricians and maintenance technicians diagnose industrial electrical faults step by step — on site, in real time. Select your equipment brand and fault type, and get immediate AI-guided troubleshooting following IEC standards. Works for energy distribution, energy production (including hydroelectric generators — Francis and Kaplan turbines), motors, PLCs, SCADA, control panels and more. Available in English, French, Spanish and German.
description_zh: INTrouble可帮助电工和维护技术人员在现场实时逐步诊断工业电气故障。选择您的设备品牌和故障类型，即可根据IEC标准立即获得人工智能引导的故障排除。适用于能源分配、能源生产（包括水力发电机——混流式和卡普兰式水轮机）、电机、可编程逻辑控制器（PLC）、监控与数据采集系统（SCADA）、控制面板等。提供英语、法语、西班牙语和德语版本。

name: AI Prompt Manager
