tagline: Save, organize & copy your best AI prompts. Never  again
tagline_zh: 保存、整理并复制你最佳的AI提示。从此不再遗忘
description: I built AI Prompt Manager because I was tired of scrolling through endless ChatGPT conversations looking for that one perfect prompt. It's a free Chrome extension that lets you save prompts with categories and tags, search them instantly, and copy with one click. All data stored locally on your device — no accounts, no servers, no tracking.
description_zh: 我开发了AI Prompt Manager，因为我厌倦了无休止地浏览ChatGPT对话，寻找那个完美的提示。这是一个免费的Chrome扩展程序，可以让你按类别和标签保存提示，即时搜索，并一键复制。所有数据都存储在你的设备本地——无需账户，无需服务器，无需跟踪。

name: Conduit: SSH, Mosh & SFTP
tagline: FOSS SSH, Mosh & SFTP client for Android and iOS.
tagline_zh: 适用于Android和iOS的FOSS SSH、Mosh和SFTP客户端。
description: A modern, privacy-focused SSH, Mosh, and SFTP client for Android and iOS. No account, no cloud sync, no analytics, no paid features, ever. Supports password, private key, and hardware key (YubiKey/FIDO2) auth over NFC and USB. Tabbed sessions, SSH agent forwarding, SFTP browser, app lock, and terminal themes including Catppuccin, Tokyo Night, and Gruvbox. Mosh support keeps your session alive across network switches. Everything stays on device. Apache-2.0. Free forever.
description_zh: 一款适用于Android和iOS的现代化、注重隐私的SSH、Mosh和SFTP客户端。永不使用账户、云同步、分析或付费功能。支持通过NFC和USB进行密码、私钥和硬件密钥（YubiKey/FIDO2）认证。提供标签会话、SSH代理转发、SFTP浏览器、应用锁和终端主题，包括Catppuccin、Tokyo Night和Gruvbox。Mosh支持在网络切换时保持会话活跃。所有内容均保存在设备上。采用Apache-2.0许可协议。永久免费。

name: WhiteStair
tagline: Best tool to add caption - NO SUBSCRIPTION
tagline_zh: 添加字幕的最佳工具 - 无需订阅
description: WhiteStair is an AI video caption generator. Turn any video into scroll-stopping captioned content in minutes — auto-transcribe, pick a template, and customize fonts, colors, size and position. No subscription; pay-as-you-go tokens.
description_zh: WhiteStair是一款人工智能视频字幕生成工具。只需几分钟，即可将任何视频转换为令人惊叹的字幕内容——自动转录，选择模板，并自定义字体、颜色、大小和位置。无需订阅；按需付费，使用代币。

name: Contract Review
tagline: Know what you're signing before you sign it
tagline_zh: 在签字之前，先了解你所签署的内容
description: Free AI contract review tool. Upload any contract, spot hidden risks, and get plain-English explanations in seconds. 95% cheaper than a lawyer. Contract Review uses AI to analyze any contract in seconds — NDAs, freelance agreements, leases, you name it. Get an overall risk score, a plain English summary, and your top red flags before you sign anything. Free plan included (3 contracts/month). Pro and Agency plans unlock all 11 clause sections, side-by-side rewrites, and full export options.
description_zh: 免费AI合同审查工具。上传任何合同，发现隐藏风险，并在几秒钟内获得通俗易懂的解释。比律师便宜95%。合同审查使用AI在几秒钟内分析任何合同——保密协议、自由职业协议、租赁合同，应有尽有。在签署任何文件之前，您将获得总体风险评分、通俗易懂的摘要以及最值得注意的风险点。包含免费计划（每月3份合同）。专业版和代理版计划可解锁所有11个条款部分、并排重写功能以及完整的导出选项。

name: WhatsApp Sales Bot
tagline: Sell 24/7 on WhatsApp without replying yourself
tagline_zh: 无需亲自回复，即可在WhatsApp上全天候销售
description: Tired of answering customers all day? I built a WhatsApp bot that sells for you automatically: ✅ Instant replies to inquiries ✅ Shows products + cart inside WhatsApp ✅ Takes orders + sends daily sales reports ✅ Works 24/7 while you sleep Perfect for stores, dropshippers, agencies. Built with Make + AI automation.
description_zh: 厌倦了整天回复客户吗？我开发了一个WhatsApp机器人，可以自动为您销售：✅即时回复咨询 ✅在WhatsApp内展示产品+购物车 ✅接受订单+发送每日销售报告 ✅在您睡觉时全天候工作 非常适合商店、代销商、代理商。采用Make + AI自动化技术构建。

name: Orphea
tagline: Your music, deeply understood by AI
tagline_zh: 你的音乐，被AI深刻理解
description: Orphea is your Spotify Wrapped, but all year long and across every platform. Connect Deezer, TIDAL, SoundCloud or Apple Music, or search any track, and get a deep AI read on 4 dimensions: Beat, Lyrics, Structure and Emotion. It turns your taste into a shareable Music DNA, helps you discover new tracks with a swipe-style Flow Deck, and gives artists an Artist Studio to analyze and grow their sound.
description_zh: Orphea就是你的Spotify年度总结，但它是全年无休，覆盖所有平台。连接Deezer、TIDAL、SoundCloud或Apple Music，或搜索任何曲目，你就能获得人工智能在四个维度上的深度解读：节奏、歌词、结构和情感。它将你的品味转化为可分享的音乐DNA，通过滑动式的Flow Deck帮助你发现新曲目，并为艺术家提供Artist Studio来分析和提升他们的音乐风格。

name: ValueLens
tagline: A Buffett-style stock analysis terminal for your Mac
tagline_zh: 适用于Mac的巴菲特式股票分析终端
description: ValueLens turns raw SEC filings into a full value-investing workflow on macOS: 10-year financials from EDGAR, a two-stage Owner-Earnings DCF with scenarios, Morningstar-style AI research reports, S&P 500 value screening, and buy-zone alerts. Free data sources; bring your own Claude key. One-time $39, no subscription.
description_zh: ValueLens将美国证券交易委员会（SEC）的原始文件转化为macOS上的完整价值投资工作流程：来自EDGAR的10年财务数据、包含情景分析的两阶段所有者收益折现现金流（DCF）模型、晨星风格的AI研究报告、标普500价值筛选以及买入区预警。数据源免费；需自备Claude密钥。一次性收费39美元，无需订阅。

name: Foglamp HUD
tagline: See your AI SDK agents brains at localhost!
tagline_zh: 在本地主机查看你的AI SDK代理大脑！
description: The missing observability layer for AI agents built on the Vercel AI SDK. Costs, latency, tokens, distributed traces, evals, and alerts for every generateText / streamText call — in two lines.
description_zh: 基于Vercel AI SDK构建的人工智能代理缺少可观察性层。只需两行代码，即可获取每次generateText / streamText调用的成本、延迟、令牌、分布式追踪、评估和警报信息。

name: AI Tool Hub
tagline: 发现最好用的 AI 工具，提升效率 10 倍
tagline_zh: 发现最好用的AI工具，效率提升10倍
description: 中文 AI 工具导航站，精选 30+ 款热门 AI 工具，涵盖对话、绘画、编程、视频、音乐等 8 大分类。每个工具有评分、价格、标签，完全免费。
description_zh: 中文AI工具导航站，精选30多款热门AI工具，涵盖对话、绘画、编程、视频、音乐等8大分类。每个工具都有评分、价格、标签，且完全免费

name: Uncharted Tycoons
tagline: Onchain maritime trading + strategy game on Base
tagline_zh: 基于区块链的海上贸易+策略游戏
description: Uncharted Tycoons is an onchain maritime strategy game on Base. Sail between 13 Mediterranean ports, move cargo along risky trade routes, outsmart an AI market that shifts every voyage, fend off pirates, and level up your harbors. Token prices may fluctuate; play involves risk.
description_zh: 《未知大亨》（Uncharted Tycoons）是Base平台上一款链上海事策略游戏。玩家需在13个地中海港口间航行，沿着充满风险的贸易路线运输货物，智胜每次航程中变幻莫测的AI市场，抵御海盗侵袭，并升级你的港口。代币价格可能波动；游戏存在风险。

name: naholo
tagline: naholo — coding ops, end to end
tagline_zh: naholo — 端到端的编码操作
description: Turn AI coding into military-style operation cycle that stays disciplined, recoverable, and accountable. A web app plans the operations, a CLI gives agents every tool they need in your codebase, and AI skills drive the cycle.
description_zh: 将人工智能编码转变为军事化操作流程，确保流程有纪律、可恢复且可问责。一个网络应用程序负责规划操作，命令行界面（CLI）为代理提供代码库中所需的所有工具，而人工智能技能则推动这一流程的发展。

name: AIbyPranav — 37+ Free AI Tools
tagline: 37+ Free AI Writing & Career Tools — No Signup Required
tagline_zh: 37+款免费AI写作与职业工具 — 无需注册
description: 37+ free AI-powered tools for writing essays, checking grammar, building resumes & more. Powered by Google Gemini AI. No signup, no email required.
description_zh: 37+款由谷歌Gemini AI驱动的免费AI工具，可用于撰写论文、检查语法、制作简历等。无需注册，也无需提供电子邮件。

name: SoundGTM
tagline: Run your B2B partner program from Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini
tagline_zh: 通过Claude、ChatGPT或Gemini来运营你的B2B合作伙伴计划
description: Track every deal your channel partners are working, flag risk before it becomes lossTrack partner-driven deals wherever they happen: LinkedIn, Calendly, CRM, portal. AI flags at-risk deals and quiet partners and drafts the fix. Run it headless from Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini. Zero commission fees. Free to start, no demo., and draft the outreach to fix it.
description_zh: 追踪您的渠道合作伙伴正在处理的每一笔交易，在损失发生前就标记风险。无论合作伙伴驱动的交易发生在何处：LinkedIn、Calendly、CRM、门户网站，都能进行追踪。人工智能会标记有风险的交易，并提醒合作伙伴，同时起草解决方案。您可以通过Claude、ChatGPT或Gemini无头运行该解决方案。零佣金。免费开始使用，无演示版，并可起草外联方案以解决问题。

name: MatchIQ
tagline: Your resume, brutally honest.
tagline_zh: 你的简历，非常诚实。
description: AI powered ATS resume analyzer that compares resumes against job descriptions and provides actionable insights.
description_zh: 基于人工智能的ATS简历分析器，可将简历与职位描述进行对比，并提供可操作的见解。

name: QBIZ AI
tagline: Your AI Business Advisor connected to your real business
tagline_zh: 你的AI商业顾问已与你真实业务相连
description: QBiz is an AI Business Advisor that connects to Stripe, Shopify, QuickBooks, Meta Ads and more — ask plain-English questions about revenue, cash flow, and profitability. Free for launch users.
description_zh: QBiz是一款人工智能商业顾问，可连接至Stripe、Shopify、QuickBooks、Meta Ads等平台——用户只需用简单易懂的语言提问，即可了解收入、现金流和盈利能力等信息。新用户可免费试用。

name: Coinastra
tagline: #crypto #ai #tech
tagline_zh: #加密货币 #人工智能 #科技
description: Real-time AI analysis, live market data, sentiment signals, whale alerts, and risk management for serious crypto traders. Start free today.
description_zh: 为认真的加密货币交易者提供实时人工智能分析、实时市场数据、情绪信号、大额交易提醒和风险管理。即日起免费试用。

name: VideoBud
tagline: AI demo videos straight from your live app
tagline_zh: 直接从您的实时应用中获取的AI演示视频
description: VideoBud walks your live web app with an AI browser agent, writes the script, records real screens, adds voiceover, and renders promo, demo, onboarding, and tutorial videos. No screen-recording sessions, no video editor, no agency. First video free.
description_zh: VideoBud通过AI浏览器代理为您的实时网络应用程序提供支持，编写脚本，录制真实屏幕，添加画外音，并渲染宣传片、演示、引导和教程视频。无需屏幕录制会话，无需视频编辑器，也无需代理。首条视频免费。

name: Storly
tagline: AI inventory management for small business
tagline_zh: 小型企业的AI库存管理
description: Storly is AI inventory management software for small businesses. Track products, low stock, stock movement, purchase orders, reports, staff roles, and inventory insights without messy spreadsheets.
description_zh: Storly是一款面向小型企业的AI库存管理软件。无需使用繁琐的电子表格，即可轻松跟踪产品、低库存、库存变动、采购订单、报告、员工角色以及库存洞察。

name: Invest AI
tagline: AI-powered portfolio diagnosis for Japanese investors
tagline_zh: 面向日本投资者的基于人工智能的投资组合诊断
description: Invest AI analyzes your stock portfolio with AI in real-time. Just register your holdings (Japanese stocks, US stocks, mutual funds) and AI will: - Diagnose your portfolio daily - Search real-time news and earnings reports - Give personalized advice based on YOUR data Unlike ChatGPT, Invest AI knows your actual portfolio, so advice is personalized to you — not generic. Free to use. No credit card required.
description_zh: Invest AI利用人工智能实时分析您的股票投资组合。只需注册您的持股（日本股票、美国股票、共同基金），人工智能就会： - 每日诊断您的投资组合 - 搜索实时新闻和财报 - 根据您的数据提供个性化建议 与ChatGPT不同，Invest AI了解您的实际投资组合，因此提供的建议是针对您的个性化建议，而非通用建议。免费使用。无需信用卡。

name: PropMIS
tagline: AI-powered HOA software for modern community teams
tagline_zh: 面向现代社区团队的AI驱动的HOA软件
description: AI-powered HOA management software for self-managed boards and property managers. Dues collection, vendor management, board governance, resident portal. $99/mo flat rate. 45-day free trial.
description_zh: 面向自我管理委员会和物业经理的基于人工智能的HOA（房屋业主协会）管理软件。提供费用收取、供应商管理、委员会治理以及居民门户等功能。每月固定费用99美元，提供45天免费试用。

name: Enhance AI
tagline: All in one AI platform
tagline_zh: 一体化人工智能平台
description: Enhance AI is an all-in-one AI creative platform for generating, enhancing, and transforming images with powerful tools like AI upscaling, photo restoration, text-to-image generation, and more — all in seconds.
description_zh: Enhance AI是一个一体化AI创意平台，可通过AI放大、照片修复、文本到图像生成等强大工具，在几秒钟内生成、增强和转换图像。

name: Quanttrading
tagline: AI-assisted crypto alerts without trading noise
tagline_zh: 无交易干扰的AI辅助加密货币提醒
description: Track crypto markets with cleaner alerts and AI-assisted insights. [Quanttrading] is a lightweight Android app for coin watchlists, price alerts, market movement, and simple AI summaries. It is built for people who want to follow BTC, ETH, and altcoins without opening exchange apps all day. No investment advice, no profit predictions, and no guaranteed signals. Just a cleaner way to monitor the market.
description_zh: 通过更清晰的提醒和人工智能辅助的洞察力追踪加密货币市场。[Quanttrading]是一款轻量级的安卓应用，提供代币观察列表、价格提醒、市场动态以及简单的AI摘要。它专为那些想要追踪BTC、ETH和山寨币，但又不想整天打开交易所应用的人而设计。本应用不提供投资建议，不预测利润，也不保证信号准确。它只提供一种更清晰的市场监控方式。

name: CallMelo
tagline: AI receptionist for local business
tagline_zh: 本地企业的AI接待员
description: Never miss a customer call again. CallMelo is an AI phone receptionist for local businesses. It has the best quality and pricing in the market. It answers calls, captures orders and appointment requests, and logs every call to an intuitive dashboard.
description_zh: 再也不会错过任何一个客户电话。CallMelo是一款专为本地企业打造的AI电话接待员。它拥有市场上最优质的服务和最合理的价格。它能接听电话、记录订单和预约请求，并将每个电话记录到直观的仪表板上。

name: Find Your Influence
tagline: Welcome to the center of the Creator Economy
tagline_zh: 欢迎来到创客经济的中心
description: We help brands and agencies turn creator marketing into a measurable advertising channel through AI, campaign intelligence, data and access to 47 million creators worldwide. From emerging voices to global celebrities, we connect them with relevant brand partnerships, campaigns, and opportunities that fit their audience and influence.
description_zh: 我们通过人工智能、活动情报、数据以及全球4700万创作者的资源，助力品牌和代理机构将创作者营销转化为可衡量的广告渠道。从新兴网红到全球名人，我们为他们牵线搭桥，让他们与符合其受众和影响力的相关品牌合作、活动和机遇相匹配。

name: socialmediaallin1
tagline: all your social media in one build
tagline_zh: 一站式构建你的所有社交媒体内容
description: Upload a podcast, YouTube video, webinar, or blog post. We turn it into LinkedIn posts, threads, newsletter sections, Shorts scripts, and a 30-day calendar — on brand.
description_zh: 上传播客、YouTube视频、网络研讨会或博客文章。我们会将其转化为LinkedIn帖子、话题、通讯板块、短视频脚本以及30天日历——且风格一致。

name: PromptQuery
tagline: Analyze databases, generate SQL, and create reports with AI
tagline_zh: 利用人工智能分析数据库、生成SQL语句并创建报告
description: PromptQuery lets Claude, Cursor, Codex, Copilot, and other AI agents safely query databases and do everything from data analysis to report generation to browsing schemas and managing workflows with read-only defaults and human approval for risky changes. PromptQuery is an MCP-native client for AI-powered data analysis and database management.
description_zh: PromptQuery使Claude、Cursor、Codex、Copilot和其他AI代理能够安全地查询数据库，并执行从数据分析到报告生成、浏览模式以及管理带有只读默认设置和人工批准高风险更改的工作流程等各项任务。PromptQuery是一款面向MCP的原生客户端，用于基于AI的数据分析和数据库管理。

name: Senswit
tagline: AI-Native Decision Intelligence OS
tagline_zh: 原生AI决策智能操作系统
description: SensWit is the AI-native Decision Intelligence OS that turns signals into smarter growth decisions.
description_zh: SensWit是一款基于人工智能的决策智能操作系统，能够将各种信号转化为更明智的增长决策。

name: Buzzr Sports
tagline: Rate games, follow buzz, and talk live sports
tagline_zh: 评价比赛，关注热门话题，畅谈现场体育赛事
description: Buzzr turns live sports into a social feed. Rate games 1-10, find what is worth watching tonight, follow World Cup 2026 schedules and standings, trade takes in Swipe/Swarm, chat with friends, join watch parties, and build brackets across every major league.
description_zh: Buzzr将直播体育赛事打造成一个社交信息流平台。用户可以按1-10分对比赛进行评分，查找今晚值得观看的赛事，关注2026年世界杯赛程和排名，在Swipe/Swarm中交换意见，与朋友聊天，加入观赛派对，并为各大联赛构建预测表。

name: burn
tagline: Verify your Kubernetes costs against your real cloud bill
tagline_zh: 根据您的实际云账单核实您的Kubernetes成本
description: Built burn because every K8s cost tool I tried showed estimates but none checked if those numbers matched the real bill. Pulls actual AWS CUR or Azure Cost Management data exact dollar diff per node, per disk, per load balancer. SP, RI, Spot detected from billing. Orphaned volumes and LBs flagged. Works on cloud and on-prem. Reconciliation production-tested on AWS and Azure. Featured on WebProNews. Open source. Single binary. No agent.
description_zh: 内置成本计算功能，因为我尝试过的每个K8s成本工具都只显示预估成本，但没有一个工具会检查这些数字是否与实际账单相符。它会提取实际的AWS CUR或Azure成本管理数据，以每个节点、每个磁盘、每个负载均衡器的实际美元差异为准。从账单中检测到的Spot实例、预留实例（RI）和Spot实例。标记孤立卷和负载均衡器。适用于云端和本地部署。已在AWS和Azure上经过生产测试对账。在WebProNews上获得推荐。开源。单个二进制文件。无需代理。

name: FMN
tagline: FMN is the all-in-one toolbox for trade businesses.
tagline_zh: FMN是贸易业务的一站式工具箱。
description: FMN is the all-in-one toolbox for trade businesses. Quotes, estimates, documents, supplier pricing and everyday admin, all in one place, so you can spend less time on paperwork and more time living.
description_zh: FMN是贸易业务的一站式工具箱。报价、估算、文件、供应商定价以及日常管理，全部集中一处，让您能减少文书工作的时间，将更多时间用于生活。

name: FrontScale
tagline: The Next.js template that keeps your AI agent honest
tagline_zh: 让你的AI智能体保持诚实的Next.js模板
description: Vibe coding is magic — until your codebase turns to spaghetti: duplicated code, no tests, broken structure. The agent isn't the problem; the missing guardrails are. FrontScale is a production-grade Next.js 16 template that gives your AI agent those guardrails: FSD architecture, Vitest + Playwright with a coverage gate, a security checklist, and 28 playbooks. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf — you describe what you want; it plans, codes, tests, ships. $4.99 once. Yours forever.
description_zh: Vibe编码看似神奇，但当你的代码库变得混乱不堪时，它就不那么神奇了：代码重复、没有测试、结构混乱。问题不在于代理，而在于缺少防护栏。FrontScale是一个生产级的Next.js 16模板，它为你的AI代理提供了这些防护栏：FSD架构、带有覆盖门（coverage gate）的Vitest + Playwright、安全检查清单和28个剧本。它与Claude Code、Cursor、Windsurf兼容——你只需描述你想要什么，它就能规划、编码、测试和发布。一次性收费4.99美元，永久归你所有。

name: Vibe Guard AI
tagline: AI security audits for modern developers.
tagline_zh: 面向现代开发人员的AI安全审计。
description: VibeGuard AI helps developers, indie hackers, and startup founders review code before launch. Simply paste your code, upload files, or provide a repository and VibeGuard AI will: ✅ Detect security vulnerabilities ✅ Find hardcoded secrets and API keys ✅ Identify SQL injection, XSS, and authentication issues ✅ Review backend and API security ✅ Check production readiness ✅ Analyze mobile app compliance risks ✅ Generate actionable security reports ✅ Provide launch recommendations with Ship or not.
description_zh: VibeGuard AI可帮助开发者、独立黑客和初创公司创始人进行发布前的代码审查。只需粘贴代码、上传文件或提供代码库，VibeGuard AI即可：✅检测安全漏洞 ✅查找硬编码的机密信息和API密钥 ✅识别SQL注入、XSS和身份验证问题 ✅审查后端和API安全性 ✅检查生产就绪状态 ✅分析移动应用合规风险 ✅生成可操作的安全报告 ✅提供是否发布的建议。

name: Maskin
tagline: AI made individuals faster. Maskin makes companies smarter.
tagline_zh: AI让个人更快。Maskin让公司更智能。
description: Build the loops that make your company AI-native. From customer signal to shipped bet to measured outcome — automatically. Open source.
description_zh: 构建循环，让你的公司实现原生AI化。从客户信号到已发货赌注再到测量结果——全程自动化。开源。

name: AURA — Facial Analysis for YouTube
tagline: Real-time facial analysis on YouTube — not a lie detector
tagline_zh: YouTube上的实时面部分析——并非测谎仪
description: AURA overlays real-time facial analysis on any YouTube video — 468 landmarks, FACS Action Units, expressions and microexpressions — running 100% on-device via Google MediaPipe. No uploads, no account, no tracking. It's honest about its limits: it is NOT a lie detector (facial deception detection is unreliable), so that part is clearly labeled non-diagnostic. Free, no ads.
description_zh: AURA可在任何YouTube视频上叠加实时面部分析——468个面部特征点、FACS动作单元、表情和微表情——通过Google MediaPipe在设备上100%运行。无需上传、无需账户、无需追踪。它坦诚地表明了自己的局限性：它不是测谎仪（面部欺骗检测不可靠），因此该部分明确标注为非诊断用途。免费、无广告。

name: TB Ride - Taxi Management Software
tagline: TB Ride – The Ultimate AI-Powered Taxi Business Software.
tagline_zh: TB Ride——终极AI驱动的出租车业务软件。
description: TB Ride - Taxi Management Software is an advanced, AI-powered solution designed to streamline and automate taxi and ride-hailing operations. It enables businesses to manage ride bookings, driver assignments, and fleet tracking from a centralized platform with ease. With features like intelligent dispatch systems, real-time monitoring, and contactless payment integration, it helps improve efficiency and reduce operational complexity.
description_zh: TB Ride - 出租车管理软件是一款先进的、基于人工智能的解决方案，旨在简化和自动化出租车和网约车运营。它使企业能够轻松地通过一个集中式平台管理出行预订、司机分配和车队跟踪。该软件具备智能调度系统、实时监控和非接触式支付集成等功能，有助于提高效率并降低运营复杂性。

name: Free API Cost Calculators for Developer.
tagline: Know your LLM, vector DB & API bill before it arrives
tagline_zh: 在您的LLM、向量数据库和API账单到来之前，先了解一下它们
description: 16 free calculators to estimate real API costs before you build: • LLM Token Cost (GPT-5, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek) • Vector Database Cost (Pinecone, Qdrant, Supabase) • Embedding API Cost • Payment Processor Fees (Stripe, Paddle, Lemon Squeezy) • Auth Provider Cost (Clerk, Auth0, Supabase) • Cloud VPS Comparison • Serverless Cost Calculator • + 9 more No signup. No ads. Just the numbers. Built because I kept getting surprised by API bills.
description_zh: 16款免费计算器，助您在构建之前预估真实的API成本：• LLM代币成本（GPT-5、Claude、Gemini、DeepSeek）• 向量数据库成本（Pinecone、Qdrant、Supabase）• 嵌入API成本• 支付处理商费用（Stripe、Paddle、Lemon Squeezy）• 身份验证提供商成本（Clerk、Auth0、Supabase）• 云VPS对比• 无服务器成本计算器• + 9款更多无需注册。无广告。只有数字。创建这些计算器是因为我总是被API账单惊讶到。

name: Charaliva
tagline: Roleplay that feels real — companions and sandbox cards
tagline_zh: 真实感十足的角色扮演——伙伴和沙盒卡牌
description: Charaliva is an AI character social entertainment platform for AI companion chat, roleplay, interactive story characters, and creator-made personalities. 🧡 Companions — Chat with characters who actually remember. from soft comfort to slow-burn crush to dark thrills. 💚 Stories — Play narratives that bend to you. sandbox story cards with branching choices, visible story state (trust, debt, routes, codex), NPC casts, and many endings.
description_zh: Charaliva是一个人工智能角色社交娱乐平台，提供人工智能陪伴聊天、角色扮演、互动故事角色以及创作者定制个性。🧡 陪伴者——与真正有记忆的角色聊天。从温馨舒适到慢慢升温的迷恋，再到黑暗刺激的体验。💚 故事——玩转为你量身打造的叙事。沙盒式故事卡，拥有分支选择、可见的故事状态（信任、债务、路线、百科全书）、非玩家角色（NPC）阵容以及多种结局。

name: Alee
tagline: The AI chatbot trained only on your content
tagline_zh: 仅根据您的内容训练的AI聊天机器人
description: Alee is a white-label AI chatbot you train on your OWN content — website, sitemap, PDFs, FAQ and YouTube transcripts. It answers visitors 24/7 from only that content, cites its sources, and says "I don't know" instead of making things up. One line of code to embed anywhere, in-chat lead capture, and fully white-label so agencies can rebrand and resell it. Free to start, no card.
description_zh: Alee是一款白标人工智能聊天机器人，您可以用自己的内容（网站、站点地图、PDF文件、常见问题解答和YouTube脚本）对其进行训练。它能够全天候根据这些内容回答访客的问题，引用其来源，并且会说“我不知道”，而不是编造内容。只需一行代码即可嵌入任何地方，支持聊天中捕获线索，并且完全白标，因此代理商可以重新包装并转售。免费开始使用，无需信用卡。

name: BillBoard
tagline: Track Congress in plain English.
tagline_zh: 用通俗易懂的语言追踪国会动态。
description: BillBoard is a student-built, nonprofit civic technology platform designed to make federal legislation more accessible. Using public congressional data and AI-assisted analysis, BillBoard provides plain-language bill summaries, impact explanations, estimated chances of passage, and tools for contacting elected representatives. Its mission is to reduce confusion around government, encourage informed civic participation, and make legislative information easier for everyone to access.
description_zh: BillBoard是一个由学生创建的非营利性公民技术平台，旨在让联邦立法更易于公众理解。该平台利用公开的国会数据和人工智能辅助分析，提供通俗易懂的法案摘要、影响说明、预计通过几率，以及联系当选代表的工具。其使命是减少围绕政府的困惑，鼓励公民在知情的情况下参与，并使每个人都能更容易地获取立法信息。

name: Filmiway
tagline: Worry-Free Movie Nights. Skip the Awkward.
tagline_zh: 无忧电影之夜。跳过尴尬环节。
description: Filmiway is a hand-curated directory designed for worry-free family movie nights. Skip explicit scenes instantly with exact skip timestamps. Unlike bloated, cluttered databases, Filmiway offers: • Frame-by-frame skip timestamps for mature content • A clean, lightning-fast, UX-first interface • Meticulously verified, human-curated guides (no AI guesswork) • Dynamic collections to help you discover great movies safely.
description_zh: Filmiway是一个精心策划的目录，专为无忧无虑的家庭电影之夜而设计。通过精确的跳过时间戳，您可以立即跳过露骨的场景。与臃肿杂乱的数据库不同，Filmiway提供：•针对成人内容的逐帧跳过时间戳•干净、快速、用户体验至上的界面•经过精心验证、人工策划的指南（无人工智能猜测）•动态收藏，帮助您安全地发现精彩电影。

name: Blog Post Ideas Generator
tagline: Generate SEO-friendly blog ideas that your audience will luv
tagline_zh: 生成让你的受众喜爱的、对搜索引擎优化（SEO）友好的博客创意
description: Generate fresh, SEO-friendly blog post ideas from any topic or keyword. Instantly get engaging titles, content angles, and creative inspiration to plan your editorial calendar and grow organic traffic. No signup required.
description_zh: 从任何话题或关键词中生成新颖且对搜索引擎优化（SEO）友好的博客文章创意。立即获得引人入胜的标题、内容角度和创意灵感，以规划您的编辑日程并增加自然流量。无需注册。

name: Apificial
tagline: Network request & HTM web scraper using remote browsers.
tagline_zh: 使用远程浏览器的网络请求和HTML网页抓取工具。
description: Build browser automations and live API endpoints without code. Create workflows visually or describe them in plain English, then deploy instantly. Run automations in remote browsers, intercept network requests, extract website data, and solve CAPTCHAs automatically. Turn complex web tasks into scalable APIs, automate workflows, integrate services, and build tools for AI agents—all from one platform with a marketplace to share, discover, and monetize workflows at scale.
description_zh: 无需编码即可构建浏览器自动化和实时API端点。以可视化方式创建工作流或用简单英语描述，然后立即部署。在远程浏览器中运行自动化，拦截网络请求，提取网站数据，并自动解决验证码问题。将复杂的Web任务转换为可扩展的API，自动化工作流，集成服务，并为AI代理构建工具——所有这些都可以在一个平台上完成，该平台还提供了一个市场，用于大规模共享、发现和货币化工作流。

name: Vitriny AI
tagline: AI-powered product photography for fashion   e-commerce
tagline_zh: 时尚电商的AI辅助产品摄影
description: Plataforma de IA generativa para fotos de e-commerce de moda. Gere centenas de imagens editoriais com modelos virtuais — sem estúdio, sem fotógrafo. A partir de R$ 3,68/imagem.
description_zh: 时尚电商照片生成AI平台。使用虚拟模特生成数百张编辑图片——无需工作室，无需摄影师。起价3.68雷亚尔/张。

name: Liner Developer Platform
tagline: Build search agents with 10x cheaper web search
tagline_zh: 以低10倍的成本构建搜索代理，实现网页搜索
description: Liner helps developers build AI apps with search agents and lower-cost search tools. Add web search, academic search, cited answers, deep research, and visual answers to your product. Web Search starts at $1 / 1K requests — 1/10 of OpenAI’s public web search tool-call price.
description_zh: Liner助力开发者构建配备搜索代理和低成本搜索工具的人工智能应用。为您的产品增添网页搜索、学术搜索、引用答案、深度研究和视觉答案等功能。网页搜索起价为每1000次请求1美元——仅为OpenAI公共网页搜索工具调用价格的十分之一。

name: Clientra - client management software.
tagline: The only dashboard you will need to run your agency
tagline_zh: 运营你的代理机构所需的唯一仪表板
description: Clientra — Client Management for AI Agencies. Manage clients, automate workflows, and grow your agency.
description_zh: Clientra — 面向人工智能机构的客户管理。管理客户、自动化工作流程，助力机构发展。

name: Zeus.team, AI native workspace
tagline: 100x your team's capacity with AI employees
tagline_zh: 通过AI员工，将团队能力提升100倍
description: Most AI tools help people work faster. Zeus helps companies grow without hiring. Zeus is an AI-native workspace where human and AI employees work together in shared conversations. AI employees can perform customer support, operations, research, reporting, and repetitive business tasks using your company's knowledge and workflows. Build an AI workforce that works 24/7 and scales your team's capacity without adding headcount.
description_zh: 大多数人工智能（AI）工具都能帮助人们提高工作效率。Zeus则能在不增加人手的情况下助力公司发展。Zeus是一个以AI为核心的工作空间，员工和AI员工可以在此共同协作，进行交流。AI员工能够利用贵公司的知识和工作流程，执行客户支持、运营、研究、报告撰写以及重复性业务任务。构建一支全天候工作的AI团队，在不增加员工人数的情况下，扩大团队的工作能力。

name: QuiLie - Drop the Mask
tagline: Track how often you're actually yourself.
tagline_zh: 记录你真正做自己的频率。
description: Modern life forces us to play characters - the polished worker, the happy friend, the perfect persona. But when do you stop performing? QuiLie is a private, zero-feed utility to track social masking burnout. Log your day, unmask the 5 core personas you use to survive social settings, chat with a private AI coach, and watch your real authenticity score grow a digital watercolor tree. Stop chasing public clout and see who you are when nobody is watching.
description_zh: 现代生活迫使我们扮演各种角色——光鲜亮丽的职场人、快乐的朋友、完美的人格面具。但你何时才能停止扮演？QuiLie是一款私密的、零反馈的实用工具，用于追踪社交面具下的倦怠感。记录你的一天，揭示你在社交场合中赖以生存的5个核心角色，与私人AI教练聊天，看着你的真实自我评分像数字水彩画一样逐渐增长。别再追逐公众影响力了，看看当没人关注时，真正的你是什么样子。

name: LetsDoItAi
tagline: Find the right AI tool, without the fuss
tagline_zh: 轻松找到合适的AI工具
description: Honest comparisons of Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Midjourney and 60+ more. Find the right AI tool, compare free plans, and grab free prompt guides.
description_zh: 对Claude、ChatGPT、Gemini、Midjourney以及60多种其他工具进行公正比较。找到合适的AI工具，对比免费方案，并获取免费提示指南。

name: markova
tagline: AI-Powered Marketing Automation for Growing Businesses
tagline_zh: 面向成长型企业的AI驱动营销自动化
description: Markova is an AI-powered marketing platform that helps businesses attract, engage, and convert customers. Create campaigns, automate workflows, manage leads, deploy AI agents, and communicate across multiple channels from a single dashboard. Unlike fragmented marketing tools, Markova combines automation, AI assistance, customer engagement, and analytics in one unified platform, helping businesses save time and scale faster.
description_zh: Markova是一个基于人工智能的营销平台，旨在帮助企业吸引、留住并转化客户。您可以通过一个控制面板创建活动、自动化工作流程、管理潜在客户、部署人工智能代理，并在多个渠道进行沟通。与零散分散的营销工具不同，Markova将自动化、人工智能辅助、客户互动和分析功能整合到一个统一的平台中，从而帮助企业节省时间并更快地扩大规模。

name: reviso
tagline: Ai flashcards & spaced repetition for active recall.
tagline_zh: 使用闪卡和间隔重复法进行主动回忆。
description: Reviso turns study materials into smart flashcards in seconds. Upload notes, textbook photos, handwritten pages, and AI generates question-and-answer cards automatically. It uses FSRS spaced repetition to schedule reviews, includes AI answer scoring so you do not have to self-grade, tracks progress with analytics and streaks, and supports offline review. Studying is free, with 50 AI generation credits refreshed daily and no subscription required.
description_zh: Reviso能在几秒钟内将学习材料转化为智能闪卡。上传笔记、课本照片、手写页，AI会自动生成问答卡。它采用FSRS间隔重复法来安排复习，包括AI答案评分，这样您就不必自我评分了，它还通过分析和连胜记录来跟踪进度，并支持离线复习。学习是免费的，每天刷新50次AI生成积分，无需订阅。

name: Parse Captain
tagline: Documents Intelligence Platform
tagline_zh: 文档智能平台
description: Most document parsing tools are either built for large enterprises or are simple single purpose invoice scanners. Parse Captain sits in the middle, a full document intelligence platform that SMEs can actually set up without a developer. It handles multiple document types, delivers data directly into tools you already use like quickbooks, xero, google sheets, ERPs or your internal tools with EU data residency built in.
description_zh: 大多数文档解析工具要么是为大型企业构建的，要么是简单的单一用途发票扫描器。而Parse Captain则处于中间位置，它是一个全面的文档智能平台，中小企业无需开发人员即可实际搭建。它能够处理多种文档类型，并将数据直接传输到您已经使用的工具中，如QuickBooks、Xero、Google Sheets、ERP系统或您内部内置欧盟数据驻留的工具。

name: 50 AI Prompts for Excel
tagline: Excel prompt packs for people who'd rather not Google it.
tagline_zh: Excel提示包，专为那些不愿使用谷歌搜索的人打造。
description: 50 AI Prompts for Excel — built for one job each, so there's no vague asking or guesswork about what details to include. Every prompt comes pre-structured: the columns to name, the conditions to set, the output format to expect. Just drop in your own data, paste into ChatGPT or Claude, and get a working formula, script, or fix on the first try — plus a plain-English breakdown of why it works. No blind copy-pasting. Just faster, cleaner results, every time.
description_zh: 50个Excel人工智能提示——每个提示都专为一项任务设计，因此无需含糊其辞或猜测需要包含哪些细节。每个提示都已预先构建好：要命名的列、要设置的条件、期望的输出格式。只需输入你自己的数据，粘贴到ChatGPT或Claude中，就能在首次尝试时获得一个可用的公式、脚本或修复方案——外加一个用通俗易懂的语言解释其工作原理的部分。无需盲目复制粘贴。每次都能获得更快、更清晰的结果。

name: Thryvate
tagline: Turn AI-generated content into a private, live website
tagline_zh: 将人工智能生成的内容转化为一个私密的、实时更新的网站
description: Turn any HTML, Markdown, notebook, or PDF into a private, live website protected by real authentication, so only the people you invite can access it. And it stays up to date. Connect your AI to the latest data, whether it’s Power BI, a CSV, or virtually any source, and Thryvate automatically refreshes the site. You control access, and you can see exactly who viewed it.
description_zh: 将任何HTML、Markdown、笔记本或PDF转换为受真实身份验证保护的私有实时网站，这样只有您邀请的人才能访问。而且网站内容会保持更新。将您的AI与最新数据连接，无论是Power BI、CSV还是几乎任何数据源，Thryvate都会自动刷新网站。您可以控制访问权限，并确切地查看哪些人浏览过它。

name: Nutaan CRM
tagline: AI-Powered CRM for Sales, Marketing & Customer Engagement
tagline_zh: 基于人工智能的CRM系统，适用于销售、营销与客户互动
description: Nutaan runs your email, calling and social outreach on one stack. Autonomous AI agents find leads, write the message, dial the phone and reply on socials — while you watch every signal in real time.
description_zh: Nutaan通过一套系统管理您的电子邮件、电话和社交媒体外联。自主人工智能代理会寻找潜在客户、撰写信息、拨打电话并在社交媒体上回复——而您则可以实时查看每一个信号。

name: Clauge
tagline: The AI-powered super-app for developers.
tagline_zh: 面向开发者的、由人工智能驱动的超级应用。
description: Clauge is an AI-powered desktop super-app for developers: parallel coding agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode), a spatial Atlas canvas, Kanban boards with AI coworkers and 45+ MCP tools, REST, SQL, NoSQL and SSH clients, a file explorer for S3, Azure Blob, SFTP and FTP, AI meeting notes, encrypted cloud sync, and an iOS and Android companion — one native app for macOS, Windows and Linux.
description_zh: Clauge是一款面向开发者的、由人工智能驱动的桌面超级应用：包含并行编码代理（Claude、Codex、Gemini、OpenCode）、空间地图画布、配备人工智能同事的看板以及45种以上的MCP工具、REST、SQL、NoSQL和SSH客户端、适用于S3、Azure Blob、SFTP和FTP的文件资源管理器、人工智能会议笔记、加密云同步功能，以及iOS和Android配套应用——一款适用于macOS、Windows和Linux的原生应用。

name: Aruvi
tagline: The workspace where humans and AI agents ship together.
tagline_zh: 人类和人工智能代理共同工作的空间。
description: Aruvi combines issue tracking, lightweight docs, structured knowledge, and MCP-powered agent workflows in one workspace. Assign work to humans or AI agents, give agents scoped API keys, keep every comment and status change attributed, and preserve reusable context for future work. There is also optional automatic code review on PRs with BYOK. Aruvi could be the perfect tool for you to assist in your loop engineering journey.
description_zh: Aruvi将问题跟踪、轻量级文档、结构化知识和由MCP驱动的代理工作流整合到一个工作空间中。您可以将工作分配给人类或AI代理，为代理提供限定范围的API密钥，保留每条评论和状态变更的归属信息，并为未来的工作保留可重复使用的上下文。此外，Aruvi还提供了使用BYOK对PR进行自动代码审查的选项。Aruvi可能是您在循环工程之旅中不可或缺的得力助手。

name: Guau AI
tagline: AI veterinary assistant & virtual clinic for dog health
tagline_zh: AI兽医助手与狗狗健康虚拟诊所
description: Guau es tu asistente veterinario inteligente y clínica virtual con IA. Consulta con un veterinario especialista de inteligencia artificial, monitoriza la salud de tu perro y lleva su diario médico.
description_zh: 哇，你是拥有AI技术的智能和临床虚拟兽医助手。咨询一位人工智能专家兽医，监测你狗狗的健康状况，并记录它的日常医疗信息。

name: Tinrec
tagline: One-click to generate meeting notes, actions, & docs.
tagline_zh: 一键生成会议笔记、行动事项和文档。
description: Tinrec is a next-generation AI meeting assistant that quickly turns conversations, meetings, classes, and interviews into structured docs that are ready to read, share, and deliver. With smart AI transcription and generation, Tinrec supercharges info capture, content organizing, and team collaboration, ensuring every conversation delivers real value.
description_zh: Tinrec是一款下一代人工智能会议助手，它能迅速将对话、会议、课堂和访谈内容转化为结构化的文档，这些文档可直接阅读、分享和交付。凭借智能的人工智能转录和生成功能，Tinrec极大地增强了信息捕捉、内容组织和团队协作的能力，确保每一次对话都能带来真正的价值。

name: The Camel Calculator - AI Look Rater
tagline: AI rates your looks and tells you how to level up
tagline_zh: AI会评估你的长相，并告诉你如何提升等级
description: Upload a selfie and an AI vision model rates your looks, style and clothing, then gives you specific, kind tips to level up your next photo. Your score is paid out in camels for fun. Free, no sign-up, in 30 languages. It also rates your overall vibe and fit.
description_zh: 上传一张自拍，人工智能视觉模型会对你的长相、风格和服装进行评分，然后给出具体且贴心的建议，以提升你下一张照片的水平。为了好玩，你的分数会用骆驼币来支付。该服务免费、无需注册，支持30种语言。它还会对你的整体气质和合身度进行评分。

name: DeskTrust
tagline: AI daily work summaries for remote teams, not dashboards
tagline_zh: 为远程团队提供AI每日工作总结，而非仪表盘
description: DeskTrust uses AI to turn your team's daily activity into a plain-English work summary — what each person actually got done, not just hours logged. Get auto timesheets, an hour-by-hour breakdown, a live team dashboard, and client-ready reports. Built for agencies, staffing firms and remote teams who want clarity without micromanaging. Privacy-first with an employee pause control. Windows + macOS. 30-day free trial, from $4.99/seat.
description_zh: DeskTrust利用人工智能技术，将您团队的日常活动转化为通俗易懂的工作总结——每个人实际完成的工作内容，而不仅仅是记录的工作时长。您可获得自动生成的时间表、每小时的详细记录、实时团队仪表板以及客户可用的报告。该产品专为希望清晰了解工作情况而无需微观管理的代理机构、人力资源公司和远程团队打造。它以隐私为先，设有员工暂停控制功能。支持Windows和macOS系统。30天免费试用，起价4.99美元/座席。

name: Swimio
tagline: AI swim coach with Apple Watch tracking & smart workouts
tagline_zh: 配备Apple Watch追踪和智能训练功能的AI游泳教练
description: Swimio combines AI coaching, advanced Apple Watch swim tracking, and personalized workout generation in one platform built specifically for swimmers. Create workouts tailored to your goals, follow them directly from your Apple Watch, track pace, SWOLF, stroke efficiency and heart rate, and get actionable performance insights after every session. Built for swimmers, coaches and teams who want more than a simple lap counter.
description_zh: Swimio将人工智能教练、先进的Apple Watch游泳追踪功能和个性化训练生成功能集于一体，打造了一个专为游泳者设计的平台。您可以根据个人目标定制训练计划，直接通过Apple Watch进行跟踪，同时追踪速度、SWOLF（游泳效率评分）、划水效率和心率，并在每次训练后获得实用的表现分析。该平台专为游泳者、教练和团队打造，满足他们对于简单圈数计数器的更高需求。

name: Buy by Agentcard
tagline: Order DoorDash from Claude
tagline_zh: 从Claude那里订购DoorDash外卖
description: you can now buy Doordash from Claude. connect Agentcard to your Openclaw, Claude or whatever you use, ask for what you want and we handle the rest. it feels magic. install from agentcard.sh and make your first order for free!
description_zh: 现在，您可以通过Claude购买Doordash。只需将Agentcard与您的Openclaw、Claude或其他所用平台进行连接，说出您想要的东西，其余的事就交给我们处理。这简直就像魔法一样。从agentcard.sh进行安装，即可享受首单免费的优惠！

name: prmpts
tagline: Save, organize and share AI prompts
tagline_zh: 保存、整理和分享AI提示
description: prmpts.app is the fastest way to write, save, and share AI prompts. No sign-up. No bloat. Just open the editor, write (or let AI help), and get a shareable link that lasts 7 days (or forever with free signup). Perfect for prompt engineers, indie makers, developers, and heavy AI users who want to reuse their best prompts across Grok, Claude, ChatGPT, Midjourney, and more — without copying/pasting chaos. What’s different: Dead-simple, instant sharing, and focused purely on speed and collaboration.
description_zh: prmpts.app是编写、保存和分享AI提示的最快捷方式。无需注册。没有冗余功能。只需打开编辑器，编写（或让AI辅助），即可获得一个有效期为7天的可分享链接（注册免费版则永久有效）。非常适合提示工程师、独立创作者、开发人员和重度AI用户，他们希望在Grok、Claude、ChatGPT、Midjourney等平台上重复使用他们最佳的提示，而无需进行繁琐的复制粘贴操作。与众不同之处在于：极其简单，即时分享，并且纯粹专注于速度和协作。

name: ToneBridge
tagline: Rewrite work messages into the right tone, in 4 languages
tagline_zh: 用四种语言将工作信息改写为恰当的语气
description: Working in a second language? The hard part isn't translation — it's tone. ToneBridge rewrites your draft into the right workplace tone across Korean, Japanese, English & Chinese, with 8 tone modes — and explains why. Free to start, right inside Gmail, Slack & LinkedIn.
description_zh: 使用第二语言工作？最难的不是翻译，而是语气。ToneBridge能将你的草稿重写为适合韩国语、日语、英语和中文的工作场合语气，并提供8种语气模式——并解释原因。在Gmail、Slack和LinkedIn中即可免费开始使用。

name: Selector
tagline: Copy precise UI context for AI coding agents
tagline_zh: 为AI编码代理复制精确的UI上下文
description: Selector is a tiny bookmarklet for people who build with AI coding agents. Click any UI element, copy one clean prompt, and paste it into Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or any assistant. It captures the page route, stable locator, visible text, React component context when available, and just enough visual details to make the target unambiguous. No extension. No account. No backend. Just a small tool for pointing at the exact thing you want to change.
description_zh: Selector是一款小巧的书签工具，专为使用AI编码助手进行开发的人员设计。只需点击任何用户界面（UI）元素，复制一个清晰的提示，然后粘贴到Claude Code、Codex、Cursor或任何助手工具中。它会捕获页面路径、稳定的定位器、可见文本、React组件上下文（如果可用），以及足够的视觉细节，以确保目标明确。无需扩展程序。无需账户。无需后端。它只是一款小工具，用于指向您想要更改的确切内容。

name: ImmigrantA
tagline: UK immigration intelligence, grounded in official guidance.
tagline_zh: 英国移民情报，基于官方指导。
description: UK immigration rules are complex, fragmented, and constantly changing. Immigranta is an AI assistant that helps applicants, sponsors, lawyers, and recruiters get answers faster. Ask questions in plain English and receive responses grounded in official UK immigration sources, complete with citations and links you can verify. No guessing. No hallucinations. Just trusted, source-backed immigration guidance when you need it. 🚀
description_zh: 英国移民法规复杂、零散且不断变化。Immigranta是一款人工智能助手，可帮助申请人、担保人、律师和招聘人员更快地获得答案。用简单的英语提问，即可获得基于英国官方移民资料的回复，回复中附有您可验证的引用和链接。无需猜测。没有幻觉。只需在需要时获得值得信赖、有资料支持的移民指导。🚀

name: Compliance AI
tagline: AI audit reports for SOX, SOC 2, and ISO 27001
tagline_zh: 针对SOX、SOC 2和ISO 27001的AI审计报告
description: Codify Compliance AI analyzes any control description against SOX, ISO 27001, SOC 2, NIST 800-53, CIS Controls, and PCI-DSS — and returns a structured audit report in under 20 seconds. Every report includes: risk score, audit opinion, key risks, control gaps, remediation recommendations, and framework alignment. Free to start. Startup ($99/mo) and Enterprise ($499/mo) plans available.Compliance. Simplify Audits.
description_zh: Codify Compliance AI能够根据SOX、ISO 27001、SOC 2、NIST 800-53、CIS Controls和PCI-DSS标准，对任何控制描述进行分析，并在20秒内返回一份结构化的审计报告。每份报告均包含：风险评分、审计意见、关键风险、控制差距、补救建议以及框架一致性。可免费试用。提供创业版（每月99美元）和企业版（每月499美元）两种方案。合规。简化审计。

name: UGCBundle
tagline: 100s of UGC videos for promoting your app
tagline_zh: 数百个用户生成内容（UGC）视频，用于推广您的应用
description: Download 100+ authentic human reaction clips for TikTok and Meta ads. No AI avatars. No creator wait times. From $19. Instant ZIP download with commercial license.
description_zh: 下载100多个真实的人类反应视频片段，用于TikTok和Meta广告。无AI头像。无创作者等待时间。19美元起。商业许可，即时ZIP下载。

name: check3000
tagline: AI analysis for your business idea — honest & fast
tagline_zh: 为您的商业构想提供人工智能分析——真诚且迅速
description: AI-powered analysis for business ideas, products and markets. Evaluate opportunities, risks and competition over 5, 10 or 20 years – instantly, without an agency.
description_zh: 基于人工智能的商业创意、产品和市场分析。无需中介，即可即时评估5年、10年或20年内的机遇、风险和竞争情况。

name: Joinways
tagline: The event CRM that fills itself out.
tagline_zh: 能够自我填充的事件客户关系管理系统。
description: Centralize event inquiries, plan bookings, send quotes and e-signatures from one platform built for venues. Book more events. Free 30-day trial, no card.
description_zh: 通过专为场地打造的平台，集中处理活动咨询、规划预订、发送报价和电子签名。预订更多活动。30天免费试用，无需绑定银行卡。

name: SherlockX
tagline: Reverse Image Search iPhone — Search by Image Online
tagline_zh: iPhone 反向图片搜索 — 在线图片搜索
description: Use SherlockX to run a reverse image search on iPhone. Upload a photo, find where it appears online, and check for reused images, possible AI fakes, and objects — no app required.
description_zh: 使用SherlockX在iPhone上进行反向图片搜索。上传一张照片，查找它在网上的出现位置，并检查是否存在重复使用的图片、可能的人工智能伪造图片以及物体——无需安装任何应用程序。

name: Promptozia.ai
tagline: Ready to use workflows for real business tasks
tagline_zh: 为真实业务任务准备即用型工作流程
description: Access 1000+ AI prompts, templates and workflows for marketing, sales, operations, content creation and education. Free during early access.
description_zh: 获取1000多个AI提示、模板和工作流程，适用于营销、销售、运营、内容创作和教育领域。早期访问期间免费。

name: Formward
tagline: EU-hosted form backend — GDPR-clean, no data leaves Europe
tagline_zh: 欧盟托管表单后端——符合GDPR标准，数据不离开欧洲
description: Formward is an EU-hosted form backend for developer who care about privacy. Point your HTML form at a Frmward endpoint — it catches submissions, filters spm, sends email alerts, and stores results on Swedishinfrastructure. No data leaves Europe. GDPR-compliat by design. AI enrichment. No JavaScript required. ree tier available. Perfect for EU-based companies nd developers who can't send form data through US-baed services.
description_zh: Formward是由欧盟托管的表单后端，专为注重隐私的开发者打造。只需将您的HTML表单指向Frmward的端点，它就能接收提交内容、过滤垃圾邮件、发送电子邮件提醒，并将结果存储在Swedishinfrastructure上。数据不会离开欧洲，从设计上就符合GDPR标准。支持AI增强功能，无需使用JavaScript。提供免费套餐。非常适合无法通过美国服务发送表单数据的欧盟企业和开发者。

name: Aihoo.app
tagline: We are alunching the Aihoo.app Free GEO Audit
tagline_zh: 我们正在推出Aihoo.app免费地理审计功能
description: Aihoo.app is the leading Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) platform. Automatically optimize your website to be discovered, cited, and recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude. Aihoo.app é a melhor plataforma em GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). Otimize seu site para aparecer no ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini e Claude de forma automática.
description_zh: Aihoo.app是领先的生成引擎优化（GEO）平台。自动优化您的网站，使其能被ChatGPT、Perplexity、Gemini和Claude发现、引用和推荐。

name: Blinx
tagline: Blinx: UX feedback in minutes from a synthetic user
tagline_zh: Blinx：几分钟内即可从合成用户那里获得用户体验反馈
description: Drop in a URL or a screenshot, and Blinx sends a synthetic user through your interface, records a short video of them navigating and thinking aloud, and returns a heuristic findings report grounded in the Nielsen Norman heuristics. It's the UX feedback you get between research cycles: fast enough to run before a design review, and specific enough to act on. Works on live sites, gated pages (via screenshot), and Figma mockups.
description_zh: 只需提供一个网址或一张截图，Blinx就会通过你的界面发送一个合成用户，录制一段他们浏览和思考的短视频，并返回一份基于尼尔森·诺曼启发式原则的启发式发现报告。这是你在研究周期之间获得的用户体验反馈：足够快，可以在设计评审之前运行，并且足够具体，可以采取行动。适用于实时网站、门控页面（通过截图）和Figma原型。

name: Framecast
tagline: Turn Claude HTML animations into clean, watermark-free video
tagline_zh: 将Claude HTML动画转换为干净无水印的视频
description: Turn Claude HTML animations into clean, watermark-free video — rendered frame-by-frame for YouTube, TikTok & Reels. One drop, every format. From $2.99.
description_zh: 将克劳德HTML动画转换为干净无水印的视频——为YouTube、TikTok和Reels逐帧渲染。一次下单，所有格式。起价2.99美元。

name: onCall
tagline: One Stop Solulution For Meeting Analysis
tagline_zh: 会议分析一站式解决方案
description: onCall auto-joins your Zoom and Meet sales calls, researches prospects first, and scores every deal 0–100 with MEDDIC, SPIN, or BANT — minutes after you hang up.
description_zh: onCall会自动加入您的Zoom和Meet销售通话，首先对潜在客户进行研究，并在您挂断电话后的几分钟内，使用MEDDIC、SPIN或BANT对每笔交易进行0-100的评分。

name: Streamr AI
tagline: Experience people treating you better with AI.
tagline_zh: 体验人们用人工智能更好地对待你。
description: Streamr AI is an app that lets you have a fake hyper-realistic AI live stream with an accurate AI live chat that can see and hear you, and you can change the number of viewers watching. Showing this to people will make them think you are a truly famous, therefore you get treated as a famous person. People will treat you differently in very extreme ways, extreme ways that the average person cannot experience. This project is currently viral on social media.
description_zh: Streamr AI是一款应用，它能让你拥有一个虚拟的超真实AI直播流，并配备一个能看见和听见你的精准AI实时聊天功能，而且你可以调整观看的观众人数。向人们展示这个应用会让他们以为你是一个真正的大名人，因此你会受到名人的待遇。人们会以非常极端的方式对待你，那种普通人无法体验的极端方式。这个项目目前在社交媒体上疯传。

name: Sotto
tagline: Never forget a memory again. Just speak.
tagline_zh: 再也不会忘记任何一段记忆。只需说出来。
description: Sotto is a private voice journal for people who think out loud. Press record, speak naturally, and Sotto transcribes and structures your thoughts into reflections, mood, and tags automatically. Choose Offline mode (Vosk, on-device, zero network) or Accurate mode (Groq Whisper, Zero Data Retention). Encrypted local storage. No ads, no tracking, no account. Built solo with Kotlin Multiplatform. English + Hindi supported, more languages coming.
description_zh: Sotto是一款专为那些喜欢自言自语的人设计的私人语音日记应用。按下录音键，自然地说话，Sotto会自动将您的想法转录并整理成反思、心情和标签。您可以选择离线模式（Vosk，设备内置，零网络）或精确模式（Groq Whisper，零数据保留）。本地存储加密。无广告、无跟踪、无账户。采用Kotlin Multiplatform独立开发。支持英语和印地语，更多语言即将推出。

name: PulseAgent
tagline: The Analyst Who Never Sleeps
tagline_zh: 从不睡觉的分析师
description: PulseAgent is an autonomous AI analytics agent that watches your metrics 24/7, learns your baselines, and sends you a sharp daily briefing with "what changed and what to do about it." What it does: Monitors GA4, Stripe, and custom APIs 24/7 Learns your normal patterns no config needed Catches anomalies before users do Delivers a daily digest with ranked insights and suggested actions Pricing: Free forever for small teams. Pro at $29/mo (launch discount — 50% off for the first 100 signups)
description_zh: PulseAgent是一款自主的AI分析代理，它全天候监控您的指标，学习您的基线，并为您发送一份清晰的每日简报，指出“发生了什么变化以及如何应对”。它的功能包括：全天候监控GA4、Stripe和自定义API无需配置即可学习您的正常模式比用户更早发现异常提供每日摘要，包含排名见解和建议操作定价：小型团队永久免费。专业版每月29美元（首100名注册用户可享受50%折扣的启动折扣）

name: PicRedo:AI Photo Editor
tagline: AI photo,photo editor,retouch
tagline_zh: AI照片，照片编辑器，修图
description: Turn one photo into polished AI edits, portraits, product shots, headshots, styles, makeovers and creative images in seconds.
description_zh: 在几秒钟内，将一张照片变成精美的AI编辑作品、肖像照、产品照片、头像照、风格照、美妆照和创意图片。

name: Vinkius
tagline: mcp, mcp servers, ai infrastructure, claude, ai agents
tagline_zh: mcp、mcp服务器、人工智能基础设施、claude、人工智能代理
description: 5,100+ MCP servers for Claude, Cursor, and every AI tool. One-click setup, built-in security, and full control over how your AI connects.
description_zh: 为Claude、Cursor以及所有AI工具提供5100多台MCP服务器。一键设置，内置安全保障，全面掌控您的AI连接方式。

name: Prospector by Synter
tagline: Your outbound agent, right inside Slack
tagline_zh: 你的出站代理，就在Slack内部
description: Nobody likes dashboards. So we built Prospector instead — an outbound agent that lives in Slack. Just ask: How are my campaigns doing? Who engaged with this post and is worth reaching out to? It reads your outbound, builds lists from real engagement, and answers in a sentence. Prospector runs outbound, Synter runs paid media, and they share the same audiences. Try it: /prospector /pipeline /campaigns /contacts /report
description_zh: 没人喜欢数据面板。所以我们开发了Prospector——一个嵌入Slack的出站代理工具。只需问：我的广告系列表现如何？谁与这条帖子互动过，值得联系？它能读取你的出站数据，根据真实互动构建列表，并给出简洁的答案。Prospector负责出站操作，Synter负责付费媒体，它们共享相同的受众群体。来试试吧：/prospector /pipeline /campaigns /contacts /report

name: ComplyAgent
tagline: EU AI Act compliance for SMBs, without a consultant
tagline_zh: 中小企业无需顾问即可遵守欧盟《人工智能法案》
description: ComplyAgent helps SMBs comply with the EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, and ISO 42001 without incurring a six-figure consulting fee. Inventory your AI, classify each system once, and get audit-ready docs plus AI literacy training. Try the free risk classifier, no signup needed.
description_zh: ComplyAgent助力中小型企业（SMBs）遵守欧盟《人工智能法案》、美国国家标准与技术研究院（NIST）的《人工智能风险管理框架》（AI RMF）以及ISO 42001标准，同时无需支付高达六位数的咨询费用。您只需对人工智能系统进行盘点，对每个系统进行一次分类，即可获得审计就绪文档以及人工智能素养培训。尝试免费风险分类器，无需注册。

name: Nexus Command™
tagline: AI leadership intelligence for restaurant managers
tagline_zh: 餐厅经理的AI领导力智能
description: Nexus Command is an AI-powered leadership platform built exclusively for restaurant operations professionals. The Helios Leadership Suite runs five intelligence modules that activate automatically based on what a manager describes — conflict resolution, accountability coaching, daily debriefs, operations analysis, and high-stakes decision support. No commands. No prompts. Just describe the situation. Built from 28 years in restaurant operations.
description_zh: Nexus Command是一个专为餐厅运营专业人士打造的、由人工智能驱动的领导力平台。Helios领导力套件包含五个智能模块，它们会根据经理的描述自动激活——冲突解决、责任辅导、每日汇报、运营分析以及高风险决策支持。无需指令。无需提示。只需描述情况。该平台基于28年的餐厅运营经验构建而成。

name: Sidenote
tagline: Chat with any doc in your browser — every answer cited
tagline_zh: 在浏览器中与任何医生聊天——每个回答都有引用
description: An AI reading assistant in your browser. Ask any PDF, doc or wiki a question — Confluence, Notion, Google Docs, arXiv — and every answer cites the exact passage. Click a citation, the page scrolls to it. If the doc doesn't answer, it says so.
description_zh: 您浏览器中的AI阅读助手。向任何PDF、doc或wiki（如Confluence、Notion、Google Docs、arXiv）提问，每个答案都会引用确切的段落。点击引用，页面就会自动滚动到该段落。如果文档中没有答案，它会明确指出。

name: MartechAI by Derail Logic
tagline: AI-powered marketing workspace for growing teams
tagline_zh: 为成长中的团队打造的人工智能营销工作空间
description: MartechAI is an AI-powered marketing workspace for growing teams, agencies, and small businesses. It connects campaigns, CRM, content, email, landing pages, SEO, analytics, social workflows, tasks, and AI-assisted insights in one platform so teams can reduce tool sprawl, improve visibility, and manage marketing execution with more clarity.
description_zh: MartechAI是一个由人工智能驱动的营销工作平台，专为成长中的团队、代理机构和小型企业设计。它在一个平台上整合了营销活动、客户关系管理（CRM）、内容、电子邮件、落地页、搜索引擎优化（SEO）、数据分析、社交媒体工作流程、任务以及人工智能辅助的洞察，使团队能够减少工具分散，提高可见性，并更清晰地管理营销执行。

name: Regret Later
tagline: An AI lawyer that defends your worst ideas in court
tagline_zh: 一个在法庭上为你最糟糕的想法辩护的人工智能律师
description: Regret Later is the Court of Questionable Decisions. Type your bad idea — "text my ex at 2am", "put my savings into a memecoin" — and an AI lawyer argues FOR it (😈 defense) or AGAINST it (😇 prosecution), with a verdict, confidence score, and a dramatic closing statement. Free, no login. $2.99 unlocks the Full Brief: extra arguments, a closing statement, and a downloadable "Official Court Brief" PDF.
description_zh: “后悔药”是一个充满争议的决策法庭。输入你的坏主意——“凌晨2点给前任发短信”，“把我的积蓄投进加密货币”——然后，一位AI律师会为你辩护（😈辩护）或控告（😇控告），并给出裁决、置信度评分和戏剧性的结案陈词。免费使用，无需登录。支付2.99美元可解锁完整案情摘要：额外的论点、结案陈词和可下载的“官方法庭摘要”PDF。

name: InternshipUncle
tagline: Agentic app to get students real internships.
tagline_zh: 帮助学生获得真实实习机会的应用程序。
description: Readiness before applying to any role, Auto applying as per role description.
description_zh: 在申请任何职位前做好准备，根据职位描述自动申请。

name: Cleo
tagline: AI assistant that books your beauty clients 24/7
tagline_zh: 24/7 AI助手，为您预约美容客户
description: Cleo is an AI assistant for beauty salons and academies. It replies to client DMs on Instagram, Messenger, WhatsApp, SMS and email within a minute, 24/7 — knows your offer and schedule, and turns conversations into booked appointments or course sign-ups. Transparent: it says it's an AI and hands tricky cases to a person. Includes a commission-free booking page on your own domain.
description_zh: Cleo是一款专为美容院和学院打造的人工智能助手。它能够全天候（24/7）在一分钟内回复客户在Instagram、Messenger、WhatsApp、短信和电子邮件中的私信，了解您的优惠信息和日程安排，并将对话转化为预约或课程报名。透明：它会明确表明自己是人工智能，并将复杂的情况转交给人工处理。此外，它还包含一个位于您自己域名的免佣金预约页面。

name: Pura Vox: Private Offline Voice Diary
tagline: Record your daily thoughts and moods instantly with voice.
tagline_zh: 用语音即时记录你的日常想法和心情。
description: Built with full offline AI transcription, all your voice notes and text stay locally on your iPhone permanently.Noaccount sign up, no ads, no hidden data tracking. Core Features One-tap voice recording with built-in offline AI transcription Real-time voice emotion recognition while speaking Anytime voice playback to listen back to your inner thoughts Attach photos, generate exclusive journal stamps and build your personal stamp wall Your personal journal deserves full privacy.
description_zh: 该应用采用完全离线的人工智能转录技术，您的所有语音笔记和文本将永久保存在您的iPhone本地。无需注册账户，无广告，无隐藏数据追踪。核心功能：一键录音，内置离线人工智能转录；说话时实时语音情绪识别；随时语音回放，倾听内心想法；可添加照片，生成专属日记戳，打造个人戳墙。您的个人日记值得拥有完全的隐私。

name: VisaPod
tagline: AI agent for visa applications
tagline_zh: 签证申请的AI助手
description: VisaPod is an AI agent for complex visa applications, starting with the U.S. DS-160. It turns documents into a complete, review-ready form, checks missing information upfront, and fills the real CEAC workflow end to end.
description_zh: VisaPod是一款针对复杂签证申请的人工智能助手，从美国DS-160表格开始。它将文件转换为一份完整的、可供审查的表格，预先检查缺失的信息，并从头到尾填写真正的中国电子签证申请中心（CEAC）工作流程。

name: Tunect Labs
tagline: Engineering Scalable Digital Experiences for the Future
tagline_zh: 为未来打造可扩展的数字化体验
description: Tunect Labs — Enterprise software engineering, QA automation, AI solutions, and full-stack development for global organizations.
description_zh: Tunect Labs — 为全球组织提供企业软件工程、质量保证自动化、人工智能解决方案以及全栈开发服务。

name: API Circle Studio
tagline: API workspace you can git diff and your AI can drive
tagline_zh: API工作区，你可以进行git diff，你的AI也可以进行驱动
description: API Circle Studio is a Git-backed, AI-native API workspace for developers. Build collections, environments, mocks, assertions, and execution plans across Desktop, Web, VS Code, CLI, and MCP. Workspaces live as JSON you can diff, review, and sync through Git — while Claude, Cursor, Copilot, and ChatGPT can read, author, and run requests through MCP. Source-available, local-first, and built for API teams that want ownership.
description_zh: API Circle Studio是一个由Git支持、原生AI的API工作区，专为开发者打造。您可以在桌面、Web、VS Code、CLI和MCP上构建集合、环境、模拟、断言和执行计划。工作区以JSON格式呈现，您可以通过Git进行差异比较、审查和同步——而Claude、Cursor、Copilot和ChatGPT则可以通过MCP读取、编写和运行请求。该工作区提供源代码，以本地优先为原则，专为希望拥有自主权的API团队打造。

name: HiredSmartly
tagline: Brutally honest AI resume review in 60 seconds @ only $1
tagline_zh: 60秒内完成犀利诚实的AI简历评估，仅需1美元
description: Most resume tools either cost $50+ or give you generic tips that don't help. HiredSmartly gives you a real AI review, scored across 10 recruiter checkpoints, in just 60 seconds. Not just a spell check. A full breakdown: ATS score, impact score, formatting, keyword alignment, and 3 specific fixes ranked by priority. Built for US, UK, UAE, Australia, India job markets. Each review is calibrated for your target country's hiring norms. One dollar. No subscription. Download your results as PDF.
description_zh: 大多数简历工具要么要价50美元以上，要么只能给你一些毫无帮助的通用建议。而HiredSmartly则能在短短60秒内为你提供一份真正的AI评估报告，该报告会根据10个招聘人员的检查点为你打分。这不仅仅是一次拼写检查。报告会详细列出：自动筛选系统（ATS）得分、影响力得分、格式、关键词对齐，以及按优先级排列的3项具体修改建议。该工具专为美国、英国、阿联酋、澳大利亚和印度等就业市场打造。每份评估报告都会根据你的目标国家的招聘规范进行校准。仅需一美元，无需订阅。你可以将评估结果下载为PDF格式。

name: MusicAny
tagline: MusicAny turns text prompts into original songs
tagline_zh: MusicAny将文本提示转化为原创歌曲
description: MusicAny is an AI music generator and AI song generator for original songs, background music, and AI music videos. Try a free AI music generator online for creators.
description_zh: MusicAny是一款AI音乐生成器和AI歌曲生成器，可用于创作原创歌曲、背景音乐和AI音乐视频。为创作者提供在线免费试用AI音乐生成器。

name: NervoScan
tagline: Contactless vital signs for any AI agent, via MCP
tagline_zh: 通过MCP为任何AI代理提供非接触式生命体征监测
description: Non-contact heart rate, HRV, blood pressure & more from a 10-second face scan. No wearables, works in your browser.
description_zh: 仅需10秒面部扫描，即可获取非接触式心率、心率变异性（HRV）、血压等数据。无需佩戴可穿戴设备，直接在浏览器中即可使用。

name: AiToolsObserver
tagline: Your guide to navigating the rapidly growing AI ecosystem
tagline_zh: 您在快速发展的AI生态系统中的导航指南
description: AiToolsObserver helps users discover, compare, and evaluate AI tools through curated listings, insights, and trend analysis. The platform continuously scans the AI ecosystem to surface emerging tools, use cases, and workflows. Submitted tools can gain visibility through directory listings, comparisons, rankings, news coverage, and editorial content, helping AI companies reach founders, marketers, developers, and early adopters.
description_zh: AiToolsObserver通过精选列表、深入见解和趋势分析，帮助用户发现、比较和评估人工智能（AI）工具。该平台持续扫描AI生态系统，以展示新兴工具、用例和工作流程。提交的工具可以通过目录列表、比较、排名、新闻报道和编辑内容获得曝光，从而帮助AI公司接触到创始人、营销人员、开发人员和早期采用者。

name: Jaiton Technologies
tagline: Website development Service Bangalore
tagline_zh: 班加罗尔网站开发服务
description: Jaiton Technologies provides AI solutions, IoT systems, cloud applications, UI/UX design, and custom software development services for startups and enterprises worldwide.
description_zh: Jaiton Technologies为全球初创企业和企业提供人工智能解决方案、物联网系统、云应用、用户界面/用户体验设计以及定制软件开发服务。

name: NxtLure
tagline: AI Search Visibility Engine
tagline_zh: 人工智能搜索可见性引擎
description: NxtLure tracks how often AI engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot) cite your brand, scores it across 10 visibility factors, and tells you exactly what to fix. Check for free or pricing starting at $19...
description_zh: NxtLure会追踪AI引擎（ChatGPT、Claude、Perplexity、Gemini、Copilot）引用您品牌的频率，根据10个可见性因素对其进行评分，并告诉您具体需要改进的地方。可免费试用，或从19美元起订购。。。

name: Global Arbitrage & Liquidity Router
tagline: Stop slippage, save $15k+ per trade, and trade at 7ms speed.
tagline_zh: 止损滑点，每笔交易节省15,000美元以上，交易速度达7毫秒。
description: High-frequency scanner monitoring real-time arbitrage opportunities across Crypto/Forex/Stocks. Key Features: Ultra-Low Latency: Signals in <10ms. Verified: Tracked $18,850 simulation profit. Smart Routing: Save $15k+ per execution. Your strategy stays yours—we never access or store your private keys. Built for traders who value speed and reliability. Don't let slippage cost you thousands.
description_zh: 高频扫描仪实时监控加密货币、外汇和股票之间的套利机会。主要特点：超低延迟：信号传输时间小于10毫秒。经过验证：模拟跟踪获利18,850美元。智能路由：每次执行节省15,000美元以上。您的策略始终属于您——我们绝不会访问或存储您的私钥。专为重视速度和可靠性的交易者打造。别让滑点让您损失数千美元。

name: MissedCallIO
tagline: Every missed call answered. Every lead captured.
tagline_zh: 每一个未接来电都接了，每一个线索都抓住了。
description: MissedCallio is an AI receptionist that instantly answers missed calls, engages callers naturally, captures lead information, and sends business owners a complete summary—so every opportunity gets a response, even when you're unavailable.
description_zh: MissedCallio是一款人工智能（AI）接听助手，能即时接听未接来电，自然地与来电者互动，捕捉关键信息，并向企业主发送完整摘要——这样，即使您不在，每个机会也能得到回应。

name: ccglass
tagline: See what your coding agent sends to the model
tagline_zh: 查看你的编码代理向模型发送了什么
description: A local dashboard for inspecting coding-agent traffic: prompts, tool schemas, tool calls, streamed responses, token usage, cost, latency, and request diffs.
description_zh: 一个用于检查编码代理流量的本地仪表板：提示、工具模式、工具调用、流式响应、令牌使用情况、成本、延迟和请求差异。

name: Kobble AI
tagline: Build regulated financial products from a prompt
tagline_zh: 根据提示构建受监管的金融产品
description: AI builders like v0, Replit, and Bolt are great at building software. None of them can build a regulated financial product. Kobble AI can. Describe what you want to launch - a branded card, a payment wallet, a KYC-gated account - and we build it. The regulated infrastructure (cards, accounts, payment rails, KYC/KYB, AML) is already in place. Built on an Australian AFSL, Mastercard Principal Issuer status, and AUSTRAC registration. The full regulated stack. From a prompt.
description_zh: v0、Replit和Bolt等AI构建商在构建软件方面表现出色。但他们都无法构建受监管的金融产品。Kobble AI却能做到。只需描述您想要推出的产品——品牌卡、支付钱包、KYC（了解您的客户）门控账户——我们即可为您构建。受监管的基础设施（卡片、账户、支付轨道、KYC/KYB、反洗钱）已经就绪。基于澳大利亚金融服务许可证（AFSL）、万事达卡主要发行商身份以及澳大利亚交易报告和分析中心（AUSTRAC）的注册。完整的受监管堆栈。从提示开始。

name: AEOmatic
tagline: Get cited by AI — not just ranked by Google
tagline_zh: 被人工智能引用——而不仅仅是谷歌排名
description: AEOmatic is the first free WordPress plugin built for Answer Engine Optimization — making your content visible in AI-generated answers from ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude & Google AI Overviews. It reads your content and generates accurate, type-specific schema — not the same generic JSON-LD every other plugin outputs. Plus llms.txt generation, AI crawler control for 17 bots, AEO content audit scoring, and AI discovery headers. 100% free. No account. No API keys.
description_zh: AEOmatic是首个专为问答引擎优化打造的免费WordPress插件——让您的内容在ChatGPT、Perplexity、Claude和Google AI概览等AI生成的答案中可见。它读取您的内容，并生成准确、特定类型的模式——不同于其他插件输出的通用JSON-LD。此外，它还支持llms.txt生成、17种爬虫的AI爬虫控制、AEO内容审核评分以及AI发现头。100%免费。无需账户。无需API密钥。

name: Grokified
tagline: 50% off every Grok model — change one line of code
tagline_zh: 每个Grok模型50%折扣——只需更改一行代码
description: Grokified is a drop-in proxy for the xAI Grok API — 50% off every model with one line of code. Swap base_url to api.grokified.com/v1, use a Grokified key, and you pay half of xAI list price. Same endpoints, same format, <5ms latency. The deal: 50% off until you've saved $5,000 (first $10K at half price), then 3% off for life. $5 free credits, no card needed. Top up from $1. Supports grok-4.3, grok-4.20, grok-build-0.1, images, video, voice. Prompts are never logged.
description_zh: Grokified是xAI Grok API的即插即用代理——只需一行代码，每个模型即可享受50%的折扣。将base_url替换为api.grokified.com/v1，使用Grokified密钥，您只需支付xAI标价的一半。端点相同，格式相同，延迟<5毫秒。优惠活动：在节省5000美元之前（前10000美元半价），享受50%的折扣，之后终身享受3%的折扣。赠送5美元免费信用额度，无需绑定银行卡。充值最低1美元。支持grok-4.3、grok-4.20、grok-build-0.1、图像、视频、语音。提示内容永不记录。

name: IdeateHub
tagline: AI teardowns of real SaaS — find the wedge, not the clone
tagline_zh: 真正SaaS的AI拆解——找到切入点，而非克隆版
description: A growing library of AI-generated teardowns of real, profitable SaaS (Supabase, PostHog, Plausible, Resend…). Each scores viability across 7 dimensions, gives a BUILD/PIVOT/KILL verdict out of 35, and names the underserved wedge a solo dev can actually win. For indie hackers who can build anything but don't know which thing. 10 teardowns free, no login. $49 once, lifetime, no subscription.
description_zh: 一个不断壮大的AI生成的真实盈利SaaS（如Supabase、PostHog、Plausible、Resend等）拆解库。每个拆解都会从7个维度评估可行性，给出35分制的“构建/转型/淘汰”评价，并指出独立开发者真正能获胜的未被充分服务的细分市场。适合那些什么都能构建，却不知道该构建什么的独立开发者。10次拆解免费，无需登录。一次性付费49美元，终身使用，无需订阅。

name: lovelab · relationship simulator
tagline: AI simulates 5 events of a relationship
tagline_zh: 人工智能模拟了5段关系事件
description: AI simulates 5 events of a relationship between two social-media accounts.
description_zh: 人工智能模拟了两个社交媒体账户之间关系的5个事件。

name: AiTwin.me
tagline: Browser Rendered Realtime AI Avatars. Make your twin today.
tagline_zh: 浏览器渲染的实时AI头像。今天就制作你的双胞胎吧。
description: Plug your existing AI agent into our AI Twin and go from text to real-time human conversations.
description_zh: 将您现有的AI代理接入我们的AI Twin，即可实现从文本到实时人类对话的转变。

name: ARI Software
tagline: Your Open Source, Self-Hosted AI-Native Personal Workspace
tagline_zh: 您的开源、自托管、AI原生个人工作空间
description: The open source, self-hosted, AI-native productivity platform you self-host. Dozens of built-In modules and build your own In minutes - no coding needed. Full data control. Fully extendable. Completely yours.
description_zh: 您自托管的开源、自托管、原生AI的生产力平台。数十个内置模块，您可在几分钟内自行构建——无需编码。完全数据控制。完全可扩展。完全属于您。

name: QSTMARKETS
tagline: Free financial terminal for retail investors
tagline_zh: 面向零售投资者的免费金融终端
description: QSTMarkets is a free, command-driven financial terminal for retail investors and finance students. Real-time charts, SEC fundamentals, options analytics, macro, credit and AI analysis in one keyboard-first workspace. No subscription.
description_zh: QSTMarkets是一款面向零售投资者和金融专业学生的免费、指令驱动的金融终端。在一个以键盘操作为主的工作空间中，用户可以获得实时图表、美国证券交易委员会（SEC）基本面数据、期权分析、宏观分析、信用分析和人工智能分析。无需订阅。

name: patternfetch
tagline: Token-compact market briefs for AI trading agents
tagline_zh: 面向人工智能交易代理的通证紧凑型市场简报
description: One call turns a ticker + timeframe into a compact market-state brief: patterns, support/resistance, regime, interpreted indicators, and a one-line summary. MCP + REST, one-click OAuth, pay-per-call by card or USDC (x402). Free demo, no signup.
description_zh: 一个电话即可将股票代码+时间范围转化为简洁的市场状态简报：形态、支撑/阻力位、市场状态、解读指标以及一行总结。MCP+REST，一键OAuth，按卡或USDC付费（x402）。免费演示，无需注册。

name: PDF Everyday
tagline: Free online PDF tools — merge, compress, OCR & more
tagline_zh: 免费在线PDF工具 — 合并、压缩、OCR及更多功能
description: Free online PDF tools: merge, split, compress, rotate, convert, watermark, protect, unlock, organize, crop, search PDFs with OCR — even scanned documents. 21 tools, 100% free, no sign-up required.
description_zh: 免费在线PDF工具：合并、拆分、压缩、旋转、转换、添加水印、保护、解锁、整理、裁剪、使用OCR搜索PDF——甚至扫描文档。21种工具，100%免费，无需注册。

name: TryOPC - AI驱动的OPC超级个体社区平台
tagline: 超级个体社区，大模型SaaS
tagline_zh: 超级个体社区，大模型SaaS
description: 1、技术： TryOPC是国内唯一接入多个模型的OPC社区，上线了4款模型产品，业务支撑底子搭完。数据安全三层面防护跑通，已基本合规。 2、产品方面： 原型成熟度和UI体验明显拉开竞品，入驻、SaaS服务、政策获取、招标采购完整闭环已打通，获同类创始人好评。 3、用户获取方面： 公众号137人，注册用户92人，算力消耗20万+。合作财务代理2家。数据不大，但在增长。
description_zh:
1. Technology: TryOPC is the only OPC community in China that has integrated multiple models, with four model products launched and a solid foundation for business support established. The three levels of data security protection have been successfully implemented, and compliance has been basically achieved.

2. Product Aspects: The prototype maturity and UI experience significantly differentiate us from competitors. We have established a complete closed loop for onboarding, SaaS services, policy acquisition, and bidding procurement, earning praise from similar founders.

3. User Acquisition: We have 137 followers on our official account and 92 registered users, with a computing power consumption of over 200,000. We have partnered with two financial agents. Although our data is not large, it is growing

name: CaIoT DeviceHub
tagline: Access real Android devices—or contribute yours and earn
tagline_zh: 访问真实的Android设备——或贡献您的设备并获得收益
description: 🚀 Launching CaIoT DeviceHub! Access real Android devices in the cloud for mobile app testing, AI agent validation, geo-specific workflows, ad verification, troubleshooting, and QA—without building your own device farm. Have spare Android phones? Contribute them to the network and earn when they're used. We're looking for early adopters and feedback. https://hub.caiot.co/ #ProductHunt #Android #QA #AI #MobileTesting
description_zh: 🚀 推出CaIoT DeviceHub！无需构建自己的设备农场，即可在云端访问真实的Android设备，用于移动应用测试、AI代理验证、地理位置特定的工作流程、广告验证、故障排除和质量保证。手头有闲置的Android手机吗？将它们贡献给网络，并在使用时获得收益。我们正在寻找早期采用者和反馈。https://hub.caiot.co/ #ProductHunt #Android #QA #AI #MobileTesting

name: RetainIq
tagline: AI decision intelligence for SaaS customer retention
tagline_zh: SaaS客户留存的AI决策智能
description: RetainIQ is the first a prioritized action layer for SaaS retention and recovery. RetainIQ replaces dashboards with AI decision intelligence for B2B SaaS retention. Instead of showing customer data, it prioritizes who to contact, why they matter, and the next best action based on revenue impact. It continuously learns from outcomes to improve recommendations, helping teams recover revenue, reactivate users, and reduce churn.
description_zh: RetainIQ是首个针对SaaS留存和恢复的优先行动层。RetainIQ用人工智能决策智能取代了B2B SaaS留存的仪表板。它不再显示客户数据，而是根据收入影响，优先列出要联系的对象、他们的重要性以及下一步最佳行动。它不断从结果中学习，以改进建议，帮助团队恢复收入、重新激活用户并减少流失。

name: LeetCode Coach
tagline: AI mentor that tells you exactly what to solve next
tagline_zh: AI导师，会告诉你下一步要解决的具体问题
description: LeetCode Coach analyzes your public LeetCode profile and generates personalized recommendations based on your solving history. Features: • AI-powered weakness analysis • Personalized next-problem suggestions • Topic-wise insights • Explainable recommendations • Progress tracking • Beginner-friendly guidance Built for students, interview candidates, and competitive programmers who want structured practice instead of random grinding.
description_zh: LeetCode Coach会分析您公开的LeetCode个人资料，并根据您的解题历史生成个性化推荐。功能包括：• 基于人工智能的弱点分析 • 个性化的下一题建议 • 针对特定主题的见解 • 可解释的推荐 • 进度跟踪 • 适合初学者的指导 专为学生、面试候选人和希望进行结构化练习而非随机刷题的竞技程序员打造。

name: Yet Another Web Analytics
tagline: Self-hosted web analytics with no UI, just AI
tagline_zh: 无需用户界面，仅凭人工智能实现自托管网络分析
description: Yet Another Web Analytics (yawa) is a self-hosted web analytics tool with no UI. Instead of dashboards, you query your data through your LLM client using MCP, asking Claude or any compatible AI assistant questions about your traffic in plain language.
description_zh: Yet Another Web Analytics（yawa）是一款无需用户界面的自托管网络分析工具。您无需使用仪表板，而是通过LLM客户端使用MCP查询数据，用通俗易懂的语言向Claude或任何兼容的AI助手询问有关流量的信息。

name: AstroScroll
tagline: Seven astrology systems. One cosmic verdict.
tagline_zh: 七大占星体系。一个宇宙的裁决。
description: AstroScroll is an astrology oracle built for the 600 million people in India + People across the globe who believe in astrology — and deserve better than recycled sun-sign filler. AstroScroll combines 7 systems — KP, Vedic, Prashna, Karmic, Western, Tarot, and a synthesized Verdict — into one precise reading in under 30 seconds. Every claim names a specific planet and date window. No "good vibes ahead." No vague filler.
description_zh: AstroScroll是一款专为印度6亿人以及全球各地信仰占星术的人们打造的占星术预言工具——他们值得拥有比重复利用的星座运势更好的内容。AstroScroll将七大体系——克利须那派、吠陀、帕什纳、业力、西方、塔罗牌和综合结论——融合在一起，在30秒内提供一份精准的解读。每条声明都指明了特定的行星和日期范围。没有“未来运势良好”之类的模糊填充内容。

name: Faceless Reels Generator
tagline: From topic to fact-checked faceless reels
tagline_zh: 从话题到经过事实核查的匿名视频短片
description: FacelessReels is a faceless reels AI that turns any topic into fact-checked faceless reels with research, narrative shaping, and video generation.
description_zh: FacelessReels是一款人工智能工具，能够通过研究、叙事构建和视频生成，将任何话题转化为经过事实核查的匿名短视频。

name: AmpUp
tagline: Open-source AI chat for your GTM stack - own the base layer
tagline_zh: 为您的GTM（增长-转化-留存）堆栈提供开源AI聊天功能——掌握基础层
description: A chat agent that lives on top of your CRM, calls, and tools over MCP. The base layer is open source and free, so clone it and own it today. Bring in the hosted layers (memory, analytics, coaching) the moment they stop being your job. - Try it: https://chat.ampup.ai - Clone it (OSS): https://github.com/A79-ai/gtm-agentic-chat
description_zh: 一个基于您的CRM、电话和MCP工具之上的聊天代理。基础层是开源且免费的，所以今天就克隆它并拥有它。一旦托管层（内存、分析、辅导）不再由您负责，就引入它们。- 尝试一下：https://chat.ampup.ai - 克隆它（开源软件）：https://github.com/A79-ai/gtm-agentic-chat

name: Samvid Memory Studio
tagline: One install. Every AI on your machine finally remembers.
tagline_zh: 一次安装，你机器上的每个人工智能都能记住。
description: You've explained your stack, your preferences, your decisions, dozens of times over & over again. Inspired by human memory, Samvid Memory Studio solves that recursive loop. Install once, and every AI tool on your machine shares a persistent, local memory. Claude knows what Cursor learned. Cursor remembers what you decided last week. Memories gather. Connections deepen. Meaning emerges. No cloud. No account. Runs entirely on your machine.
description_zh: 你已经无数次地解释了你的技术栈、偏好和决策。受人类记忆的启发，Samvid Memory Studio解决了这种递归循环的问题。只需安装一次，你机器上的每个AI工具就会共享一个持久的本地记忆。Claude知道Cursor学到了什么。Cursor记得你上周的决定。记忆汇聚，连接加深，意义浮现。无需云服务，无需账户，完全在你的机器上运行。

name: AI Bug Triage Prompt
tagline: Stop patching crash sites. Start finding root causes.
tagline_zh: 别再修复崩溃的网站了。开始查找根本原因吧。
description: When you paste a stack trace and ask an AI to fix it, it usually patches wherever the error surfaces not where the bug originates. I built a prompt that forces the model to work the problem in order: read the symptom literally, rank hypotheses by likelihood with confidence levels, identify the actual origin (not just the throw site), then propose a fix and a way to verify you actually found the root cause not just made the error move.t: instantly share code, notes, and snippets.
description_zh: 当你粘贴一个堆栈跟踪并要求人工智能修复它时，它通常会在错误出现的地方进行修复，而不是在错误起源的地方。我构建了一个提示，迫使模型按顺序解决问题：逐字逐句地阅读症状，根据置信度对假设按可能性进行排序，确定实际起源（不仅仅是抛出位置），然后提出修复方案和验证方法，以确保你真正找到了根本原因，而不仅仅是让错误转移。t：立即共享代码、笔记和片段。

name: HPSILab MCP
tagline: Options intelligence for AI agents — IV, Monte Carlo & more
tagline_zh: 人工智能代理的选项智能——第四部分，蒙特卡洛方法及其他
description: HPSILab MCP is an 8-tool MCP server that brings institutional-grade options analytics directly into AI agents and coding environments like Claude, Cursor, and Windsurf. Connect once, Ask your AI agent: analyze_stock NVDA, Full Report — structured markdown research note synthesizing all signals Remote MCP endpoint: https://hpsilab.com/mcp Python SDK: pip install hpsilab-mcp Website: https://hpsilab.com GitHub: https://github.com/haiyunsky/hpsilab-mcp-server
description_zh: HPSILab MCP是一款配备8个工具的MCP服务器，它能够将机构级期权分析直接整合到AI代理和编码环境中，如Claude、Cursor和Windsurf。只需连接一次，即可向您的AI代理发出指令：analyze_stock NVDA，获取完整报告 — 结构化Markdown研究笔记，综合所有信号。远程MCP端点：https://hpsilab.com/mcp Python SDK：pip install hpsilab-mcp 网站：https://hpsilab.com GitHub：https://github.com/haiyunsky/hpsilab-mcp-server

name: Samepage Signals
tagline: Your second brain for product management
tagline_zh: 您产品管理的得力助手
description: Built specifically for the best product leaders, Samepage Signals automatically surfaces the information and insights that are most important to you across all of your tools and web, in one place.
description_zh: Samepage Signals专为顶尖的产品领导者打造，能自动将您所有工具和网络中对您最重要的信息和见解集中呈现于一处。

name: Orbit
tagline: Understand Your AI Better, Move Faster, Build More
tagline_zh: 更懂AI，更快行动，更多创造
description: Orbit makes Claude Code and Codex understandable at a glance, so you can run a whole fleet of agents on one living canvas and always know exactly what each one is doing. Start free on your own Claude or Codex sub, or try Pro free for 7 days.
description_zh: Orbit让Claude Code和Codex一目了然，这样你就可以在一个生动的画布上运行一整队的代理，并且始终确切地知道每个代理在做什么。你可以免费试用自己的Claude或Codex子账户，或者免费试用Pro版7天。

name: TicketReel
tagline: Resolve a ticket. Get a video. Automatically.
tagline_zh: 解决一个工单。获取一个视频。自动完成。
description: TicketReel lives inside your Intercom inbox and turns resolved support tickets into branded AI avatar video walkthroughs - automatically. Resolve a ticket, click Generate, and get a 60-second presenter video with burned-in captions, ready to send to the customer or publish straight to your help center. No screen recording, no webcam, no editing, no new tabs. Your team keeps working in Intercom exactly as they do today - TicketReel just makes sure every resolution becomes a reusable asset.
description_zh: TicketReel嵌入您的Intercom收件箱中，能自动将已解决的支持工单转化为带有品牌特色的AI头像视频演示。解决工单后，点击“生成”，即可获得一段60秒的演示视频，视频中带有嵌入式字幕，可直接发送给客户或直接发布到您的帮助中心。无需屏幕录制、无需网络摄像头、无需编辑、也无需打开新标签页。您的团队仍可像往常一样在Intercom中工作——TicketReel只是确保每个解决方案都能成为可重复使用的资产。

name: Meeyra
tagline: Real-time AI translator for your online meetings
tagline_zh: 为您的在线会议提供实时人工智能翻译
description: Meeyra translates live speech in meetings — no bots, no app switching, no delays. Just share a link. Guests join from any browser instantly. Your words translate across 42+ languages in real time as you speak. Built for global teams, educators, and anyone who's struggled with language barriers in meetings. ✓ Real-time speech-to-text translation ✓ Live captions & full transcription ✓ End-to-end encrypted sessions ✓ No download required for guests Small team. v1.0. 🌍
description_zh: Meeyra 可在会议中实时翻译发言——无需机器人，无需切换应用，无延迟。只需分享一个链接。参会者即可通过任何浏览器立即加入。您发言时，您的内容将实时翻译成42种以上的语言。专为全球团队、教育工作者以及任何在会议中遭遇语言障碍的人士打造。✓ 实时语音转文字翻译 ✓ 实时字幕和完整转录 ✓ 端到端加密会话 ✓ 参会者无需下载 小团队。v1.0。

name: Germany Copilot AI
tagline: AI assistant for migrants in Germany
tagline_zh: 德国移民的AI助手
description: 🇩🇪 AI Assistant for Life in Germany
description_zh: 德国生活AI助手

name: Voxxhire
tagline: AI interviews, CV tools & career prep — speak your way in.
tagline_zh: 人工智能面试、简历工具和职业准备——用你的方式来表达。
description: Most interview prep is passive. Voxxhire makes it active. Practice voice interviews with AI feedback, scan your CV against ATS filters, check your job-fit score before you apply, and generate cover letters that actually match the role. Built for candidates who want to walk into interviews prepared, not just hopeful. Coming soon: structured AI-assisted interviews for hiring teams, with every decision staying in the hands of your HR team.
description_zh: 大多数面试准备都是被动的。Voxxhire则让面试准备变得主动。通过AI反馈练习语音面试，根据ATS筛选条件扫描简历，在申请前检查你的岗位匹配度评分，并生成真正符合职位要求的求职信。专为那些希望有备而来、而非心怀侥幸地参加面试的求职者打造。即将推出：为招聘团队提供结构化的AI辅助面试，所有决策权均在人力资源团队手中。

name: Baseline
tagline: The qualitative foundation for your thesis
tagline_zh: 你论文的定性基础
description: Chatbot equity research is piecemeal, where you ask a tool about a company and receive an answer in isolation. Baseline, first developed internally by a family office, runs research across 3,500+ stocks and scores them on a comparable rubric. Research is pre-packaged, standardized, and built on optimized prompts, so you're not re-running the same analysis a chatbot makes you rebuild. For time constrained buy-side investors, it also highlights the long tail of overlooked quality SMID cap stocks.
description_zh: 聊天机器人股票研究是零散的，你向工具询问一家公司的情况，只会收到一个孤立的答案。Baseline最初由一家家族理财室内部开发，它对3500多只股票进行研究，并根据可比标准对它们进行评分。研究是预先打包好的、标准化的，并且建立在优化的提示之上，因此你无需重复运行聊天机器人让你重新构建的相同分析。对于时间有限的买方投资者而言，它还突出了被忽视的优质中小市值股票的长尾效应。

name: LocalBlox — Done
tagline: Done-for-you marketing kits for local businesses
tagline_zh: 为本地企业提供的定制营销套餐
description: LocalBlox is a done-for-you marketing kit built specifically for local businesses. Unlike complex marketing software or expensive agencies, LocalBlox provides ready-to-use landing page copy, Instagram captions, and email marketing templates in one package. Designed for restaurants, salons, and gyms, it helps business owners launch campaigns faster, save time, and focus on growing their business.
description_zh: LocalBlox是一款专为本地企业打造的全方位营销套件。与复杂的营销软件或昂贵的代理机构不同，LocalBlox在一个套餐中提供了即用型的落地页文案、Instagram描述和电子邮件营销模板。该套件专为餐厅、沙龙和健身房设计，可帮助企业主更快地启动营销活动，节省时间，并专注于发展业务。

name: Craft Widgets
tagline: Playable and custom widgets for your iPhone Home Screen
tagline_zh: 适用于iPhone主屏幕的可玩性和自定义小部件
description: Craft Widgets turns your iPhone and iPad Home Screen into something personal: 500+ ready-made widgets, playable widgets like 2048 and Sudoku, Lock Screen and StandBy widgets, plus a visual editor with layers, fonts, colors, and AI so you can design your own.
description_zh: Craft Widgets将您的iPhone和iPad主屏幕变成个性化空间：500多个现成小部件、可玩的小部件（如2048和数独）、锁屏和待机小部件，以及一个具有图层、字体、颜色和人工智能功能的可视化编辑器，让您能够设计自己的小部件。

name: SerpDo
tagline: One click. Claude boosts your SEO.
tagline_zh: 一键操作。克劳德助您提升SEO。
description: Connects to your Google Search Console and gives you an SEO-focused prompt to fix your site's biggest issues. I got tired of "unactionable" GSC data. So I made SerpDo to connect to your GSC, read your traffic, and tell you exactly what to fix today. Not some vague "report". A real task list. It finds pages losing clicks, spots low CTR issues, flags keyword cannibalization, scores your pages, and drafts the content fixes you need. Free to try. No GSC experience needed.
description_zh: 连接至您的谷歌站长工具（Google Search Console），并为您提供以SEO为重点的提示，以解决您网站的最大问题。我厌倦了“无法操作”的谷歌站长工具数据。因此，我开发了SerpDo，它可以连接至您的谷歌站长工具，读取您的流量数据，并准确告知您今天需要修复哪些问题。这不是一份含糊的“报告”，而是一份真正的任务清单。它会找出点击量下降的页面，发现点击率低的问题，标记关键词同质化，为您的页面打分，并为您起草所需的内容修复方案。免费试用，无需谷歌站长工具经验。

name: Devpilot
tagline: A simpler way to manage infrastructure and DevOps workflows
tagline_zh: 一种更简单的管理基础设施和DevOps工作流程的方法
description: Devpilot is an AI-powered platform for managing deployments, infrastructure, and DevOps workflows from one place. It automates routine tasks, reduces manual setup, and helps teams scale without complex configurations. Built for founders and engineers who want to ship faster without handling infrastructure overhead.
description_zh: Devpilot是一个由人工智能驱动的平台，可一站式管理部署、基础设施和DevOps工作流程。它自动化了常规任务，减少了手动设置，并帮助团队无需复杂配置即可实现扩展。该平台专为希望加快产品发布速度而无需处理基础设施开销的创始人和工程师打造。

name: Investhesis
tagline: Value any stock by yourself — now inside your AI
tagline_zh: 自主评估任何股票——现在，让你的AI来帮你
